name: Team Bochetto
subject: ENDORSEMENT ALERT
body:
|
---
Today we announced another endorsement by another distinguished Fraternal Order of Police lodge! See the endorsement press release below. This endorsement, along with the many others we’ve received shows our campaign’s momentum and that **George is undoubtedly the law and order candidate** :
### **Bochetto Announces New Endorsements, Will Headline Rally to 'Save Our Statue & Back the Blue' In Pittsburgh**
For Immediate Release - April 7, 2022 Contact: [Press@BochettoForSenate.com](mailto:Press@BochettoForSenate.com) **PHILADELPHIA, PA -** Today, U.S. Senate candidate George Bochetto announced that he will headline a rally on April 23, 2022, at 1:00 p.m., at the Christopher Columbus statue in Schenley Park in Pittsburgh. The rally will be themed **'Save Our Statue and Back the Blue.'** He also announced new endorsements cementing his status as the Law & Order candidate in the race. Today, Bochetto announced that he was endorsed by the Fraternal Order of Police Lodge 1 in Pittsburgh. It is the first FOP Lodge in the United States, and one of the largest, representing thousands of voters. The Lodge performed an exhaustive candidate vetting process and voted unanimously to endorse Bochetto. This comes on the heels of endorsements by other law enforcement groups across the Commonwealth of Pennsylvania. Also today, Bochetto announced that he was endorsed by critical members of President Trump's impeachment team, former Pennsylvania Attorney General Bruce Castor and Michael van der Veen, who successfully argued Trump's second impeachment case in the United States Senate. "I am honored and humbled by the support our campaign is receiving from the heroes in blue, distinguished titans of the legal profession, and my Italian American brothers and sisters. I am proud to defend our heritage from the woke mob that wants to erase it, and I will never defund the police," said Bochetto. He continued, "Our campaign stands for the rule of law and the values that have made America the greatest nation on earth. Pennsylvanians from all walks of life are joining our campaign because we are inclusive. We are pro-America. We are for law and order. We are pushing back against the radical left, and we are winning." For the rally, Bochetto is joining forces with the Italian Sons and Daughters of America, whom Bochetto represents in a lawsuit to block the removal of the 50-foot Christopher Columbus statue, as well as the Columbus statue in Philadelphia. He will discuss the Pittsburgh litigation and potential outcomes, and the importance of cases like it. Bochetto will also be joined by law enforcement groups supporting his campaign, which collectively represent tens of thousands of Pennsylvania voters. He will honor the men and women in blue who keep Pennsylvanians safe day in and day out. The Bochetto campaign is supported by and partnering with:
* The Italian Sons & Daughters of America
* Pittsburgh's Fraternal Order of Police Lodge 1
* Philadelphia's Fraternal Order of Police Lodge 5
* Bucks County's Lodge 53
* Penn Police Lodge 113
* Temple University Police Association
* Custodios Italian Police Association
* Salea Latino Police Association
* SEPTA Transit Police

For media wishing to RSVP for the event, please respond to press@bochettoforsenate.com by April 15.

—-------------------------------- If you would like to support George Bochetto for U.S. Senate, you can click below to donate now! [](https://bochettoforsenate.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYhRECXP9zpGAeiJcLx1o7CFULDvFQHgtUZnpAZW9LK18VYXhcoaS8ALPMVfAZJLerQ&e=674a0be7cca5db25cb3914af0eb7eb00&utm_source=bochettoforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=endorsement_email&n=1) Thank you for your support, Team Bochetto
P.S. In case you missed George’s radio interview, click [here.](https://bochettoforsenate.nationbuilder.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRbVD79UyeehGIoIaQC_TuqY&e=674a0be7cca5db25cb3914af0eb7eb00&utm_source=bochettoforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=endorsement_email&n=2)
Bochetto for Senate · PA 19102, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://bochettoforsenate.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=674a0be7cca5db25cb3914af0eb7eb00&utm_source=bochettoforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=endorsement_email&n=3).

name: Paul Gazelka
subject: It's time to build bridges

body:
We need to make Minnesota better for everyone! [ | | |
---|---|--- ](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=f2791f6c0b624fb1bed47b7bfa80216b&_e=Tlf4bKZBTfIGTwW_GMcrE_H7XDhXpDIL9OFcZ9svGCWtNDRXtiF8Tfw-zo2rCa2LSe9FZ25OzS-r7MRiWsiCXVeLM2L0N1w2Kng1WJ-IRu0zyRTZJhnYwiPuWwi7fSKCYmWzZRomjRDNQvO_bUkfIbPuT572W62Fii61DzqKYZxdyYNmgfQyrHg6pUwBQj0NAb8GRbQAVSRpTeWCPuJt5vGwt89JuUXZV0CvBFXvjBCUw0tSHVeJSZxXe8UM092m6sXPeOEPEi5SUq9M650xUQ%3D%3D)
My friend,

It takes more than going along with the 'norm' to win this November.

_We need to work to broaden our base._

That's why I've worked so hard on building relationships with groups like the Local 49ers, Pipefitters, Electrical Contractors, and the Carpenters' Unions. Groups that used to only vote Democrat are starting to come around and realize that years of Democrat policies have done **NOTHING** for them.

I've also been working in Minneapolis and St. Paul for the last six years with many minority communities. Black and Latino Pastors, the Hmong Community, and the Cambodian Community, just to name a few.

I know that the Republican Party needs to grow to thrive, and as your Governor I will continue my work building bridges with ALL communities and proving that everyone thrives under conservative, success-driven policies.

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

body:

| | | **URGENT: Republicans could be on the verge of DEFEATING Senator Mark Kelly and flipping the Senate!**

Rush $5 now to re-elect Democrats like Mark and defend our razor-thin majority>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/7283?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20220407-ArizonaUpdate-KellyPileOn-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220407-ArizonaUpdate-KellyPileOn-Pros-sl1&akid=3714%2E9716520%2EI7G-4v)**

We’ll cut to the chase, team: **Mark Kelly’s re-election could be in serious danger.**

Senator Kelly won his race in Arizona by only _2 points_ in 2020, and now he’s one of the GOP's top targets.

Donald Trump has already flown to Arizona to rally his MAGA base to _“kick Mark Kelly the hell out of the United States Senate,”_ and a GOP dark money group just launched **MILLIONS of dollars worth of attack ads!**

**Recent polls show that Mark’s lead has DROPPED to only 2 points again -- which means we can’t let attacks like these go unanswered!** This grassroots team must step up TODAY, or else we’ll hand power right back to Mitch McConnell.

[**We're still $4,126 BEHIND on our $25,000 fundraising goal, and our records show you haven’t chipped in yet today. Rush $5 now to help re-elect Democrats like Mark Kelly and defend our razor-thin majority >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/7283?amount=5&t=7&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20220407-ArizonaUpdate-KellyPileOn-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220407-ArizonaUpdate-KellyPileOn-Pros-sl1&akid=3714%2E9716520%2EI7G-4v)

body:
|
| | | Peter, It's Dan Crenshaw. I just got this text and my heart sank:

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60069071:JIH4HYoNo:m:1:3253819041:C57760CC45C5CB6BA768583AB24320C4:r)
---

This is bad. _Really bad._

I know this isn't what you want to hear right now: _**but Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left have BUCKETS of money at the ready. Falling short of our goal simply isn't an option - falling short means we lose the House Majority for good.**_

---

Button")
---

I REFUSE to sit back and allow the Radical Left to take over our country. I know you won't either, which is why today I'm coming to you with a humble request:

**[Can I count on you to rush a 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 minutes? $5, $10, $25, or even just $1 will go a long way to ensuring we close the fundraising gap.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60069071:JIH4HYoNo:m:1:3253819041:C57760CC45C5CB6BA768583AB24320C4:r "Can I count on you
to rush a 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 minutes? $5, $10, $25, or even just $1 will go a long way to ensuring we close the
fundraising gap.")**

I can't extend this offer to everyone and I can only offer it to you for a limited time - but it's critical you rush support before the deadline. _If we fail to make our mark, the Liberal Media, pollsters, and pundits will say it 's indicative of the electoral outcome and everything will snowball. _

**[BUT, if every patriot who gets this email chips in, we'll crush our fundraising goal and leave the Radical Left in the dust. Remember, all donations made in the next 45 minutes will be 300% matched >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60069071:JIH4HYoNo:m:1:3253819041:C57760CC45C5CB6BA768583AB24320C4:r "BUT, if every
patriot who gets this email chips in, we’ll crush our fundraising goal and leave the Radical Left in the dust. Remember, all donations made in
the next 45 minutes will be 300% matched >>>")**

---
| | | [300% MATCH NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60069071:JIH4HYoNo:m:1:3253819041:C57760CC45C5CB6BA768583AB24320C4:r "Generic Button")
---

We're in a great position to take back the House from Nancy Pelosi - we're just FIVE SEATS AWAY from restoring an America First Agenda in Washington. But Pelosi knows it, just as well as we do, _and she 's panicking._

_She 's dialing up dark money donors.

She's depositing max-out checks.

And last month she outspent and outraised us by MILLIONS._

**Pelosi 's working day and night to ensure we fail. If we fall short of our goal, the Left will BURY us. We can't let Pelosi win, simply because she outspent us. **

There's no way we make our mark without you, Peter.

**[I can't extend this deadline again - even for Top Patriots like you. So please, rush your 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 min.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60069071:JIH4HYoNo:m:1:3253819041:C57760CC45C5CB6BA768583AB24320C4:r "I can’t extend this deadline again – even for Top Patriots like you. So please, rush your 300% matched donation before the
link closes in 45 min.")**

Thank you,

name: Marco Rubio
subject: Please read even though it's long
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
I'd like to thank you in advance for taking the time to read this and hear me out.
|
---
| | | Peter,

I'd like to thank you in advance for taking the time to read this and hear me out. I know I've been emailing, texting, and calling more than normal right now, but I need to start this month strong and need you to listen to me.

I hope you know me to be an honest man of integrity, so I thought I'd take a second to walk you through why I'm running for office and why this deadline means so much.

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60071348:JthMhYoaN:m:1:3317145305:A0B4C3CC755B58FA568A37255A91220E:r "2")
---

This is a photo of my dad (of course wearing a Miami Dolphins shirt). He was the best role model for being a father, a friend, and an American.

He and my mom thankfully came to America before the murderous dictator Fidel Castro came to power and turned Cuba to a dangerous socialist wasteland. After my parents saw what he had done to their homeland, they decided to stay put in America and get to work to achieve the American Dream.

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60071348:JthMhYoaN:m:1:3317145305:A0B4C3CC755B58FA568A37255A91220E:r "1")
---

Eventually, my sister and I became first generation college graduates, and while we had to take on student loans to do so, we knew the work ethic our parents instilled would help us pay them down once we graduated.

I met my wife Jeanette in college and we got married in 1998. We started our beautiful family of four kids: Amanda, Daniella, Anthony, and Dominick. We eventually adopted two dogs, Winston and Arthur (who I found with my laptop typing some emails to you recently...).

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60071348:JthMhYoaN:m:1:3317145305:A0B4C3CC755B58FA568A37255A91220E:r "3")
---

All jokes aside, being a father to my wonderful kids is by far my favorite and most important job, and I will never take that for granted.

I first ran for Senate because I saw what Barack Obama and Joe Biden's policies were doing to families like mine. More families were living paycheck to paycheck at the expense of tax-and-spend Democrats. My parents taught me to work if I wanted to make a change, so that's exactly what I did.

My dad never got to see me become a U.S. Senator in the country he immigrated to in order to make a better life for us, but I carry his work ethic and family values with me every day in the Senate to honor him, and now, I'm teaching my kids exactly what he taught me.

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60071348:JthMhYoaN:m:1:3317145305:A0B4C3CC755B58FA568A37255A91220E:r "4")
---

After seeing the dysfunction in Washington firsthand, I decided to run for President so I could bring my passion for America to the White House. My loving family was right by my side, and I couldn't have been more grateful for their support.

I wanted to stop Hillary Clinton at all costs, and eventually, that meant dropping out of the race and working with Donald Trump to win. Throughout his term, we worked on pro-family and pro-veteran bills to make America great and restore the American Dream.

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60071348:JthMhYoaN:m:1:3317145305:A0B4C3CC755B58FA568A37255A91220E:r "5")
---

This brings me to my main point: I'm running for Senate because I will never stop fighting to restore the American Dream.

I feel so blessed looking through these photos, and I wanted to share them with you so you can understand where I am coming from.

Reaching these deadlines may seem like a fundraising ploy, but this is real. **The number we raise is being released, and if we 're outraised again, that will be a major step back in our fight to restore the American Dream. **
**[I hope you'll make a donation today and help me start strong:](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60071348:JthMhYoaN:m:1:3317145305:A0B4C3CC755B58FA568A37255A91220E:r "I hope you’ll make a donation today and join this fight before tomorrow’s
deadline:")**
---
| | | [I'LL JOIN YOU, MARCO!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60071348:JthMhYoaN:m:1:3317145305:A0B4C3CC755B58FA568A37255A91220E:r "I'LL JOIN YOU, MARCO!")
---
Thank you so much for taking the time to read this,
Marco Rubio
---
| |
* * *
---
| | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60071349:JthMhYoaN:m:1:3317145305:A0B4C3CC755B58FA568A37255A91220E:r "MarcoRubioFooter")
---
| _A personal note from Marco Rubio_ :

Peter, did you see what my former Trump Impeachment Manager opponent said about our race?

Demings is a do-nothing Democrat with a laughable record. Schumer and his cronies are propping her up with their multi-million dollar warchests all because they know she'll be a RUBBER STAMP for their radical agenda. If we let up and the Democrats win in Florida, they will KEEP control of the Senate and continue to force their dangerous agenda through Congress. So here's the deal:

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60071349:JthMhYoaN:m:1:3317145305:A0B4C3CC755B58FA568A37255A91220E:r "Footer Gif")

I really do need your help, Peter. People think they need to write huge checks in order to make a difference but that's just not true. I need folks who can give $8, $10, $12.55 or even $17 today.

You know I've reached out a lot, so don't complain if we lose. I'm committed to winning. Are you?
| | [I'M COMMITTED TO WINNING](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60071349:JthMhYoaN:m:1:3317145305:A0B4C3CC755B58FA568A37255A91220E:r "I'M COMMITTED TO
WINNING")
---

| Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
---

Miami, FL 33153

body:
Peter, conservatives across Wisconsin won on Tuesday thanks to people like yourself who showed up to the polls. The future of our state is full of hope and promise, but we need your help to carry this momentum through November.
Hi Peter,**This past Tuesday, conservatives were elected to local offices across the state.** Conservatives candidates won seats on school boards, city councils, county boards, and in critical judicial races. **_This is CRUCIAL for the future of our state. _****[Help us keep up the momentum by donating now! We need to keep the pressure on the liberals in Madison and across the country.](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zkdkkkl-idtjvlhlh-r/)** We saw two huge conservative victories in the races for the Court of Appeals and the Kenosha County Executive. Judge Maria Lazar is a constitutional conservative who will uphold the rule of law. Samantha Kerkman was the first Republican EVER to be elected as the Kenosha County Executive.**Tuesday brought huge wins for the conservative movement. But we can 't let the momentum stop in the spring elections. **To implement change on the state and federal levels, we must turn our attention to the fall elections. [**Please donate to help defeat Tony Evers and fire Nancy Pelosi.**](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zkdkkkl-idtjvlhlh-y/) **We 've all seen what happens when we get out and vote. ****Now, let 's make sure we keep the momentum going to make sure we see more conservatives win across the country in November. **Thank you, Bryan
--
**Bryan Steil**
Congressman [Help Us Fight Back](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zkdkkkl-idtjvlhlh-j/) [](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zkdkkkl-idtjvlhlh-t/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zkdkkkl-idtjvlhlh-i/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zkdkkkl-idtjvlhlh-d/) [ Forward ](https://steilforwisconsininc.forwardtomyfriend.com/j-idtjvlhlh-C89B6A88-zkdkkkl-l-k) | PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Hunter’s Laptop
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
Peter: You may think that the media finally reporting on Hunter Biden's Laptop is good news - I don't. Let me be clear. I believe everything that's on Hunter's laptop is true. It proves the Chinese funneling money to Joe Biden, aka "The Big Guy" as we suspected all along. **But ask yourself, "Why, now?" What after 2 years the media suddenly cares?** [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60072242:6Lu7cYoNl:m:1:3317145305:5F386033201F7D279F804952F043EA34:r "Join the Fight")It's simple. They're trying to get ahead of the story now so that they can dismiss it as "old news" when the other shoe drops before November's election. But we can't wait a minute longer. Biden is a criminal and it's time to do something about it. **[That's why I filed a bill in Congress demanding the Impeachment of Joe Biden aka "the Big Guy" and I need your help to keep the pressure on Congress.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60072242:6Lu7cYoNl:m:1:3317145305:5F386033201F7D279F804952F043EA34:r "That’s why I filed a bill in Congress demanding the
Impeachment of Joe Biden aka “the Big Guy” and I need your help to keep the pressure on Congress.")** **[Can I count on you to donate $25, $50, or $100 today?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60072242:6Lu7cYoNl:m:1:3317145305:5F386033201F7D279F804952F043EA34:r "Can I count on you to donate $25, $50, or $100
today?")** The Left and their allies in Big Tech and the media have long stopped caring about the truth. That was painfully evident the first time we found out about Hunter Biden's laptop. When the New York Post reported on Hunter's laptop, the Deep State unleashed its fury to discredit the story. 50 ~~intelligence operatives~~ Deep State hacks called it Russian disinformation, Facebook censored the story, and Twitter even banned the New York Post's account outright. Just like they've done to me and President Trump, they blocked the truth! If we don't impeach Biden soon, we'll never find out the full story and the Left's effort to protect Grandpa Joe is going to work. **[That's why I need your help to keep the pressure up on Congress to impeach Joe Biden. Can I count on you to chip in $100, $250, or $500 today?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60072242:6Lu7cYoNl:m:1:3317145305:5F386033201F7D279F804952F043EA34:r "That’s why I need your help to keep the pressure up on
Congress to impeach Joe Biden. Can I count on you to chip in $100, $250, or $500 today?")** They know I'm right which is why the Leftists are doing all they can to block my attempts to impeach Joe Biden. They will stop at nothing to shut me up to keep me from exposing the truth. That's why Big Tech has repeatedly banned my accounts from Twitter and Pelosi works hard to keep a microphone out of my hands on Capitol Hill. DC swamp monsters are even funneling campaign donations to both my Democrat and GOP challengers. It's like they know exactly how much the Chinese control Joe Biden through their bribes that they've funneled through Hunter. **[They're throwing everything AND the kitchen sink at me. That's why I need freedom-fighters like you to dig deep and help me continue the battle to impeach the criminal sitting in the Oval Office with your $100, $250, or $1,000 donation today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60072242:6Lu7cYoNl:m:1:3317145305:5F386033201F7D279F804952F043EA34:r "They’re throwing everything AND the
kitchen sink at me. That’s why I need freedom-fighters like you to dig deep and help me continue the battle to impeach the criminal sitting in
the Oval Office with your $100, $250, or $1,000 donation today.")** **Bottom line, they 're scared to death that all of it will come out if Biden does get impeached. That's why it's imperative that you help me continue this fight.** I'm ready to expose the facts and impeach Joe Biden, but I can't succeed without your help. **[Please join my efforts today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60072242:6Lu7cYoNl:m:1:3317145305:5F386033201F7D279F804952F043EA34:r "Please join my efforts today.")** Thank you. God Bless America.
Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA) | | [IMPEACH JOE BIDEN!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60072242:6Lu7cYoNl:m:1:3317145305:5F386033201F7D279F804952F043EA34:r "IMPEACH JOE BIDEN!")

name: Kevin Roberts, Ph.D.
subject: You won’t hear this on Facebook
body:
I’m sending you an email because I wanted to make sure this message reached you. As I’m sure you know, Facebook, Google
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8fr31n4tb9uk14p8io3tm3e9n69sij9prbv4ttg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s5i69oj2cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65srn63g62phmm3gm1phic5oj9pb2epq35d1gsdo6fdpickq76p3hclirdcjgs9g6fkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3ap5l69g7cob6ejgb6or7m2qmash5u)
| | | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1uj6qc5vmpn3bnv2kovgju31uh5r9v5ohjlnptg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s5i69oj2cdh2bs)
---
Hello Fellow Conservative, I’m sending you an email because I wanted to make sure this message reached you. As I’m sure you know, Facebook, Google, and other Big Tech companies such as Twitter have chosen to become **destructive of core American principles** that sustain us as a free society. They censor and suppress conservative ideas. For example, approaching the 2020 election Facebook recklessly concealed a major news article from one of the nation’s oldest newspapers simply because it posed a risk to their narrative. And that’s just one instance. They’ve also suspended and de-platformed many conservative voices in the last two years. Heritage’s own online team still has posts about election integrity, religious freedom, conservative principles, and more throttled online—with no clear explanation why. By now it’s clear that Big Tech’s ideological bias **targets and censors conservative voices, shrinks the marketplace of ideas, and undermines the foundation of our republic.** At least through email, I’m pretty sure my voice will reach you. And that’s why I’m asking you **to stand with us.** Right now, Heritage is strategically taking action to _counter _Big Tech’s bullying tactics. **You can sign our Big Tech Petition to be a part of this fight by clicking this link:** **[https://secured.heritage.org/sign-thf-big-tech-petition/](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z05aijul4d90g2evp6doeiiuonf7lugqgn2mnmro_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s5i69oj2cdh2bs)** Heritage has a strategy for stopping the Radical Left’s agenda as championed by Facebook, Google, Twitter, and others in Big Tech. They are giants. They are powerful. But their agenda _can _be stopped. And with your help, it _will_ be. [**Join us in standing against them by signing this petition today.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ze1oq9p4r7n3s85a4qvcgupqk16vn9u2brpl0t40_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s5i69oj2cdh2bs) Thank you, and all the best, Kevin Roberts, Ph.D. President, The Heritage Foundation
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

body:
The REAL Pandemic Currently, many Americans have awakened to the fact that the pandemic of 2020 was nothing more than a "Plandemic" of elites like Kl
| | |
---
## The REAL Pandemic
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=6674227.5083.1.38cd2218dc775a4257a8c5c2f643ab3d)
---
Currently, many Americans have _awakened_ to the fact that the pandemic of 2020 was nothing more than a "**[Plandemic](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=6674227.5084.1.695f6eeba61b71b7249bdfec4f170d22)** " of elites like **Klaus Schwab** and **[Yuval Noah Harari](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=6674227.5085.1.e047568db93e432053b7115f3fc7cc58)** to exercise control of the masses through fear with puppets like **Anthony Fauci**.
We now know that the original **COVID19 models** that said 2.2 million Americans would die by the end of the summer of 2020 were false. We know that the **COVID19 PCR tests** were falsely calibrated to show a higher infection rate than that which was actual reality. We also know that there has been from the beginning safe and effective therapeutics for COVID19 such as **Hydroxychloroquine** , **Budesonide** and **Ivermectin**.
The real pandemic in America is the **Woke Sexuality** agenda of the Left that has an _end goal of legalized pedophilia._
The agenda of the **LGBTQ** movement, **Disney** , **Hollywood** , **Woke kindergarten teachers** and **corrupt politicians** are leading this nation off the cliff into the moral abyss.
There is a growing movement to legitimize "_attraction to children_ " under the umbrella of the **LGBTQ** movement.
**These are sick, twisted and evil people.**
We need to protect the children of America from Woke Sexuality, Gender Confusion and Pedophilia.
There is a reason on Day 1 of being in the US Senate that I will release what I am calling the **Millstone Act**. This piece of legislation will cutoff ALL Federal funding to any school district in America that teaches **Critical Race Theory** or **Woke Sexuality**.
I am committed to protecting the children of America from predators in the classroom.
Jesus said in _Luke 17:2_ : "It would be better for them to be thrown into the sea with a millstone tied around their neck than to cause one of these little ones to stumble."
Join me in the fight for the children of America!
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer

clean_body: = Hello, We have an incredible announcement to share: Lieutenant Colonel Alexander Vindman just endorsed Admiral Mike Franken to help him defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue! You probably know Lt. Col. Vindman from when he bravely testified to Congress during Trump’s first impeachment hearings after he overheard the infamous “perfect” phone call between Donald Trump and Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy. (You know, the one where Trump tried to withhold military aid to Ukraine...) Now he’s endorsing Mike Franken because “we need to elect Admiral Mike Franken to the U.S. Senate to protect democracy here at home and abroad." With over 36 years of service in the Navy, Mike Franken would be the most senior military person ever elected to the Senate. All the early polls show a close race, but Mike’s not taking any corporate PAC money. So if he’s going to fight back against McConnell’s Super PAC lies and send Grassley packing this November, Mike’s counting on grassroots donors like you to give now: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = We’re so grateful to have you on the team. When we defeat Chuck Grassley this November, it’ll be because we did it together. Thank you, Team Franken Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc PO Box 13401 Des Moines, IA 50310 United States

Donald Trump Jr. and Kimberly Guilfoyle retweeted the video to their followers because the media must be exposed for their role in spreading misinformation ot the American public in order to influence and election.

|

"The proof was always undeniable--Hunter Biden and his father Joe Biden sold out America for shady foreign deals and to appease their Communist Chinese handlers. This was exactly what Russia wanted, for the American media to carry their water and sow disinformation to sway an election against President Trump. When I'm in the U.S. Senate, I will call for hearings on the collusion between media outlets, Democrats, and Russian intelligence in order to bring those who perpetrated this fraud to justice."

name: Sarah Palin
subject: Major Announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Alaska
body:
America is at a tipping point. | Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9878%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=SsSCqnVmluErIc4%2btRqOng&sysid=1)
America is at a tipping point. | Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.
Friend,

**Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.**

I first entered politics 30 years ago, when I was elected to city council in Wasilla. I still live in Wasilla; my family is here; my son goes to school here. My heart will ALWAYS be in Alaska, even when I’m representing you in Washington, D.C.

America is at a tipping point. As I’ve watched the far left destroy our country, I knew I had to step up and join the fight. And now I’m asking you to do the exact same thing.

I can’t do this without your support.

That’s why for a short time, when you make your next contribution of ANY AMOUNT, you’ll automatically cement your name as an **Official Founding Supporter**.

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW TO BECOME AN OFFICIAL FOUNDING SUPPORTER. >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c28641%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8GCJ7Rb4cTBDa%2fDF%2bAIAOg&sysid=1)**

This is your chance to go down in history. YOU are the reason I’m running, and YOU will be the reason we win.

_**[Please contribute $35 by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to join the fight and mark your status as an Official Founding Supporter. >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c28642%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FKA4ZUQOts6D5w2yYgL8tQ&sysid=1)**_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c28643%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DrjVWTVRxn4LZ%2bye5807qg&sysid=1)

At this critical time in our nation’s history, we need leaders who will combat the left’s socialist, big-government, America-last agenda.

This country was built by heroes, and the radical left dishonors their legacies by opening our borders to illegal immigrants, mortgaging our children’s future, and selling out our nation’s interest to the highest bidder.

I’m in this race to win it and join the fight for freedom alongside other patriots willing to sacrifice all to save our country.

I just have one simple question for you:

**WILL YOU JOIN ME?**

**[Please contribute $35 by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to join the fight and mark your status as an Official Founding Supporter. >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c28642%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FKA4ZUQOts6D5w2yYgL8tQ&sysid=1)**

Thank you & God Bless America.

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c28643%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DrjVWTVRxn4LZ%2bye5807qg&sysid=1)
Sarah Palin

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c28644%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nRg9lq9dkk7g6V4Evkh4ug&sysid=1)**

---

| | Friend,

Unfortunately, it seems that all the Biden Administration does is spend more tax dollars. **His trillion-dollar spending sprees have sunk the American economy – forcing hard working families to cut corners so that they can make ends meet.**

**Pay raises can’t keep up with inflation, and American businesses are unable to provide for their employees thanks to Biden’s socialist economics. **
---
| [PUT THE AMERICAN ECONOMY FIRST](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za679stm8rcrlrf1gnoijnrtrqapqlk3hb1qr8i0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s5h64o75cdh2bs "PUT THE AMERICAN ECONOMY FIRST")
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcb677nb25se1eed27k71gtoa9mmeqnem6bvg93g_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s5h64o75cdh2bs)
---
| **Worst of all, Biden’s energy crisis could have been avoided if he had simply kept President Trump’s energy policies in place. **

When President Trump was in office, he made America energy independent. **At the end of President Trump’s term, gas was a little over $2.00 a gallon.**

Biden would rather have working Americans spend close to double the price for sub-par energy from foreign dictatorships like Russia and Venezuela. **America can’t handle more America Last energy policies, we need to make our nation energy independent again. **

**Can I count on your support in my fight to reclaim the House majority and make America Energy Independent again?**
---
| [TAKE BACK THE HOUSE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmsc1jc325m1nekk761f6trt7bqh075a52785qkg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s5h64o75cdh2bs "TAKE BACK THE HOUSE")
---

---
| For America, Mike D. Rogers

name: Team Nikki
subject: “Better than Trump”
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Peter —

Ron DeSantis has always kept questionable company. So it’s not surprising that just last week, Alex Jones called DeSantis “better than Trump” and gave DeSantis his full support.

For the record, this is the same Alex Jones who:

❌ Called the survivors of the Parkland shooting “crisis actors”
❌ Claimed the Sandy Hook massacre was a hoax
❌ Gave prominent antisemites a national platform
❌ Is the nation’s leading proponent of dangerous, delusional, and harmful conspiracy theories

In short, if you’re looking for a radical, far-right, white supremacist nutjob, Alex Jones is your man. And now, he’s throwing his weight behind DeSantis.

This is DeSantis’ plan — buddy up to far-right figureheads like Alex Jones, pass dangerous, authoritarian policies that hurt Florida families, and ride the wave of MAGA money all the way to the White House in 2024, leaving us to clean up the mess he’s made.

But we’re not going to let him do that, Peter. Together, we’re going to take a stand against him and his far-right backers like Alex Jones and bring something new to Florida. If you’re with us, click here to chip in $20 right now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-apr-2022?refcode=407alexjones]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.
Express Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-apr-2022?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=407alexjones] Express Donate $20 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-apr-2022?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=407alexjones] Express Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-apr-2022?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=407alexjones] Express Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-apr-2022?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=407alexjones] Express Donate $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-apr-2022?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=407alexjones] Another Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-apr-2022?refcode=407alexjones]

Peter, Floridians didn’t need Donald Trump the first time around. We certainly don’t need a “better” version — a version who can better hurt Florida families, sow hatred and division, and put our lives at risk for political gain.

We need something new — something better. We need Nikki as our next Governor. Click here to chip in $20 and help us make it happen. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-apr-2022?refcode=407alexjones]

Thanks!

— Team Nikki

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor

Miami, FL 33143

\- Complete **CONTROL** by the Far Left in California
\- Two more **LONG** years of Pelosi and Washington Democrats in power
\- Continued border crisis, more inflation, and cost of living **SKYROCKETING**

I'm counting on you,
Young Kim

clean_body: This came as a surprise to all of us Hi Peter, my name is Young Kim and I'm really worried. I just received shocking news that my far-left opponent raked in a STAGGERING $1.4M in the first quarter to defeat me and keep Pelosi in power in 2022. My race is becoming the most competitive and expensive in 2022, and we will only win with all hands on deck. Pelosi 's circle knows that winning my toss-up seat will give them the House majority, and they are bombarding my campaign with the help of their uber-rich Hollywood donors. This is a major wake up call. If we don't step up our game, It will be GAME OVER for Republicans and our nation will see: \- Complete CONTROL by the Far Left in California \- Two more LONG years of Pelosi and Washington Democrats in power \- Continued border crisis, more inflation, and cost of living SKYROCKETING I'm counting on you, Young Kim We 'll get straight to the point, Peter: We are completely dependent on grassroots support to fuel our efforts against the Democrats. YOU are the reason Young is in Congress today, and YOU will be the reason she 's able to continue our fight for small business support, lower taxes, slashing red tape, cutting back unnecessary government spending, more educational opportunities for our children, fixing our broken immigration system, and keeping the American Dream alive for generations. name: Kim Rogers, DASS Executive Director
subject: This is a long email, but I need you to take a look
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25]
Team, I’ll be honest. This is a long email. But it’s critical that you read all of it.
Before you start reading, I need you to know about a critical deadline that’s coming up.
We have a critical mid-month deadline coming up in exactly a week, and we need to post the strongest fundraising numbers possible to show the far-right we’re fired up and ready to win in November. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?amount=10&refcode=EM_FR_040822_B1_AC_30D] Can the team and I count on your support? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?amount=10&refcode=EM_FR_040822_B1_AC_30D]
CHIP IN NOW >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?amount=10&refcode=EM_FR_040822_B1_AC_30D]
Here’s the situation. Thanks to massive amounts of mega-donor money flowing into the GOP, advertising in states like Georgia, Michigan, and Arizona will be expensive this year.
Democrats are fighting back, but that’s driving up costs even more. This will be the most expensive midterm election EVER!
When the team and I sat down to budget out our advertising for the rest of the election, we realized we need to supercharge our grassroots fundraising, or we won’t be able to keep up.
Before 2020, most people didn’t even know who their Secretary of State was, or even what party they belonged to.
But Trump’s lies and the rise of election conspiracy theories have brought new importance to the position – and we need to make sure voters know that. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?amount=10&refcode=EM_FR_040822_B1_AC_30D]
So, here’s my plan: we need an unprecedented number of grassroots donations before our mid-month deadline on April 15th. This will give us enough resources to run our advertising campaigns and will show the far-right that this team has the momentum behind it to win.
Crunching the numbers we need 1,000 grassroots gifts before the deadline next Friday. I know it’s a lot, but we don’t have any other choices. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?amount=10&refcode=EM_FR_040822_B1_AC_30D]
Now that you know the stakes, can I count on you to rush $10 to help us hit this goal and elect Democratic Secretaries this November? >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?amount=10&refcode=EM_FR_040822_B1_AC_30D]
CHIP IN $5 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=EM_FR_040822_B1_AC_30D]
CHIP IN $10 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=EM_FR_040822_B1_AC_30D]
CHIP IN $25 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=EM_FR_040822_B1_AC_30D]
CHIP IN $50 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=EM_FR_040822_B1_AC_30D]
ANOTHER AMOUNT >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?refcode=EM_FR_040822_B1_AC_30D&amount=5]
DASS is a national organization supporting the election of Democratic Secretaries of State who are committed to protecting and preserving voting rights and ballot access for all Americans through fair, honest, open, and accurate elections.
Help us fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda by pitching in today!
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=footer-button&amount=25]
This email was sent to: email. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on our Democratic agenda. If you no longer wish to receive these emails click here to unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/72a1b408-8cb6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a/8413c7df-44b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDEzYzdkZi00NGI3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LEkNRr_9_o-Jjemgk4kxYJHkk_Ob2rGWcPDd0b_nv80=&id=130343606 .
https://www.demsofstate.org/ [https://www.demsofstate.org/]

Friend,

I’ve said this more than once, but I’ll say it again to keep beating a dead horse: **I’ll never stop fighting the Radical Left.** I’m running for re-election in 2022 because I know that there needs to be at least one straight shooter in Washington.

**
* Our children’s futures
* Our economy’s future
* Democracy’s future
**

subject: I know this isn’t what you want to hear right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
| | | Patriot, It's Dan Crenshaw. I just got this text and my heart sank:

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60072466:620tnYoN5:m:1:3299561967:C2EBB444B30B3C2D4D77A457F621D015:r)
---

This is bad. _Really bad._

I know this isn't what you want to hear right now: _**but Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left have BUCKETS of money at the ready. Falling short of our goal simply isn't an option - falling short means we lose the House Majority for good.**_

---
| | | [300% MATCH NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60072466:620tnYoN5:m:1:3299561967:C2EBB444B30B3C2D4D77A457F621D015:r "Generic Button")
---

I REFUSE to sit back and allow the Radical Left to take over our country. I know you won't either, which is why today I'm coming to you with a humble request:

**[Can I count on you to rush a 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 minutes? $5, $10, $25, or even just $1 will go a long way to ensuring we close the fundraising gap.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60072466:620tnYoN5:m:1:3299561967:C2EBB444B30B3C2D4D77A457F621D015:r "Can I count on you
to rush a 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 minutes? $5, $10, $25, or even just $1 will go a long way to ensuring we close the
fundraising gap.")**

I can't extend this offer to everyone and I can only offer it to you for a limited time - but it's critical you rush support before the deadline. _If we fail to make our mark, the Liberal Media, pollsters, and pundits will say it 's indicative of the electoral outcome and everything will snowball. _

**[BUT, if every patriot who gets this email chips in, we'll crush our fundraising goal and leave the Radical Left in the dust. Remember, all donations made in the next 45 minutes will be 300% matched >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60072466:620tnYoN5:m:1:3299561967:C2EBB444B30B3C2D4D77A457F621D015:r "BUT, if every
patriot who gets this email chips in, we’ll crush our fundraising goal and leave the Radical Left in the dust. Remember, all donations made in
the next 45 minutes will be 300% matched >>>")**

---
| | | [300% MATCH NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60072466:620tnYoN5:m:1:3299561967:C2EBB444B30B3C2D4D77A457F621D015:r "Generic Button")
---

We're in a great position to take back the House from Nancy Pelosi - we're just FIVE SEATS AWAY from restoring an America First Agenda in Washington. But Pelosi knows it, just as well as we do, _and she 's panicking._

_She 's dialing up dark money donors.

She's depositing max-out checks.

And last month she outspent and outraised us by MILLIONS._

**Pelosi 's working day and night to ensure we fail. If we fall short of our goal, the Left will BURY us. We can't let Pelosi win, simply because she outspent us. **

There's no way we make our mark without you, Patriot.

**[I can't extend this deadline again - even for Top Patriots like you. So please, rush your 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 min.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60072466:620tnYoN5:m:1:3299561967:C2EBB444B30B3C2D4D77A457F621D015:r "I can’t extend this deadline again – even for Top Patriots like you. So please, rush your 300% matched donation before the
link closes in 45 min.")**

Thank you,

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60072466:620tnYoN5:m:1:3299561967:C2EBB444B30B3C2D4D77A457F621D015:r)
---
Dan Crenshaw

---
| |
* * *

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60072467:620tnYoN5:m:1:3299561967:C2EBB444B30B3C2D4D77A457F621D015:r "Red Wave Image
Link")

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60072467:620tnYoN5:m:1:3299561967:C2EBB444B30B3C2D4D77A457F621D015:r "Can we count on you to step up?")**

I’m Cait, and I’m the Digital Fundraising Director here on Team Crist. It’s my job to get Charlie’s message out online so we can defeat Governor DeSantis and bring about a Florida that works for all Floridians — and I’m so excited to send you a message today.

name: Jameson Ellis
subject: Re: Here's how to beat Dan Crenshaw...
body:
| | | | |
---
| | Good morning fellow patriots,

First, I want to give a shoutout to Jennifer Kratky from True Texas Project for bringing something to my attention yesterday...

Since conservatives like you want to invest their money wisely and like to know where their money is going, she suggested it might be helpful to educate folks on what type of things are costing the campaign money each month.

Here is a breakdown of what your campaign donations are currently directed towards...

* $500 Monthly: We have tools for Internal Processes & Infrastructure like ISP for recording and reporting to the FEC so that we remain compliant with federal law... And the more money we raise, the amount we pay incrementally increases. We also have to pay someone to manage that infrastructure and submit the financial reporting to the FEC every quarter.

* $150 Monthly: Creative tools & social media management platforms.

* $500 Monthly: Continuing to get our message out in front of voters in prep for the 2024 primaries.

Please keep in mind this isn't taking into account the fact that we aim to raise $200k by January 2023 so that we can hit the campaign trail strong, right out of the gate.

Unfortunately, there's also a deficit in the bank account of $500 due to donations stopping and bills still coming.

Here's how to beat Dan Crenshaw

Now, here's something very eye-opening...

Dan Crenshaw raised $9M from January 2021 to March 2022.

We raised $45k from June 2021 to March 2022.

With $45k, we took 17% of the vote.

To outright beat Dan Crenshaw in the Primaries requires 50% of the vote plus 1 vote.

Now consider this...

If we would have tripled everything, we would have beat Dan Crenshaw outright.

Let me explain...

17% X 3 = 51%

To have reached that number, we would've needed to also triple the amount we raised.

$45k X 3 = $135k

If we would've tripled the amount of money we raised, we could have afforded to triple both our efforts and our reach.

This means if we would've raised just $135k, we wouldn't have just forced a run-off with Dan Crenshaw... we would have succeeded in our mission to Fire Dan Crenshaw and I would be your next Congressman for TX-2.

No matter what anyone says, running a true grassroots campaign against an establishment Congressman with millions of dollars takes both effort and a substantial amount of money.

I hope these results not only proved that I am a viable candidate in YOUR eyes, but also that OUR message was massively successful, effective, and resonated with the constituents of TX-2.

It is for this reason that I hope I have earned your continued financial support... and that I humbly, yet unapologetically ask for it.

If I have earned it, please click here to make a campaign contribution: [https://secure.anedot.com/jamesonellisforcongress/donate](https://jamesonellis.lt.acemlna.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZzZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbSUyRmphbWVzb25lbGxpc2ZvcmNvbmdyZXNzJTJGZG9uYXRl&sig=7CiUeV4QNYpJq5hBgZRjRNoNi7zBy6ic5QsWhH7Ze3oN&iat=1649432009&a=%7C%7C611311006%7C%7C&account=jamesonellis%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=cabcbe31a720242486b887158a77876f&i=69A85A1A447)

In order to carry out my responsibilities as an... | Peter, We're starting the second quarter out strong, and we have a number of upcoming events I hope you'll be able to attend. In order to carry out my responsibilities as an elected leader, I want to meet with the people I will represent and listen to your concerns. That's why I have scheduled a number of events for you to attend. You and I can meet up and discuss what issues matter to you most. Unlike my radical opponent Chris Pappas, I REFUSE to be out of touch with the people of New Hampshire... Conservative voices have been ignored for far too long by the woke mainstream media and corrupt establishment politicians. to see my full list of upcoming events, and respond directly to this email if there are any you are able to attend. I look forward to seeing you soon, Peter. Tim Baxter Candidate for Congress Personal Cell Phone: (603)-997-8108 | | Baxter for Congress, PO Box 1741, Seabrook, New Hampshire 03874, United States

name: Alek Skarlatos
subject: 240 rounds of ammunition and a jar of gasoline
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alek For Oregon
body:
I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60076167:JLbHZYorN:m:1:3317145305:9B9EF17E0518CB93284577CF42374EA9:r)
---
Peter,

Like so many Americans, I watched the scenes of Afghanistan's fall with disbelief, extreme sadness and even anger. You see, I served the greatest country on Earth in Afghanistan back in 2015. But Afghanistan wasn't the only place I looked terrorism directly in the eyes...

**August 21 st 2021 marked six years since the fateful late-summer afternoon that changed my life and those of my two best friends - forever.**

**I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when my best friends and I decided to take a vacation in Europe**. We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when a terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over and kill us all.

As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat -As an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. **Which is why I, my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop this terrorist.**

This split-second decision prevented what witnesses contend could have become a mass slaughter. There is a reason I was able to make this split-second decision to intervene, Peter - **I have and always will be willing to give my life in the fight for freedom, in the image of true American values.**

[**At the end of this email, I am going to ask you to donate $3 to my campaign for Congress, in honor of the sixth anniversary of the Thalys train attack. But first, you need to understand why we need an American fighter like myself in Washington.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60076167:JLbHZYorN:m:1:3317145305:9B9EF17E0518CB93284577CF42374EA9:r)

[**DONATE $3 TODAY -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60076167:JLbHZYorN:m:1:3317145305:9B9EF17E0518CB93284577CF42374EA9:r)
Now, our homeland is in danger. Not from radical Islamic terrorists, but radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. Leftist legislation is assaulting our Nation, our communities, and the American Dream.

Right now, Democrats are:
* Opening and destroying our borders. They are g**ranting dangerous amnesty** that will flood every corner of America.
* **Raising our taxes** like we have never seen, and making common goods like gas and groceries unaffordable.
* **Defunding the police,** leading to a surge in violent crime
* **Erasing historical figures** from our schools like George Washington and Abraham Lincoln
* Teetering on the edge of a **dangerous foreign policy crisis**

These power-hungry Democrat elitists like Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden don't care about the people they represent. **They only care about their own radical agenda.**

The Biden Democrats' grip on power in Washington is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security. The only way to pull America out of this leftist tailspin is by taking back the House in 2022. **We need a fighter in Congress, Peter and I hope that hearing my story proves to you that I am the man for the job.**

My life's mission has always been to represent the America I know and love - the world's bastion of freedom and economic prosperity. [**I am taking that mission and putting it into action by running for Congress, by fighting for my neighbors and their wellbeing in Washington.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60076167:JLbHZYorN:m:1:3317145305:9B9EF17E0518CB93284577CF42374EA9:r)

This will not be an easy road, which is why I am reaching out to you. I will need the financial support of every American patriot; every single dollar will help. [**Can I count on you to join my team with a donation of $3 today?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60076167:JLbHZYorN:m:1:3317145305:9B9EF17E0518CB93284577CF42374EA9:r)

[**DONATE $3 TODAY -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60076167:JLbHZYorN:m:1:3317145305:9B9EF17E0518CB93284577CF42374EA9:r)

Thank you very much,
Alek Skarlatos
Republican for Congress

| Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. [**To support Alek's campaign chip in $5 or more today!**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60076167:JLbHZYorN:m:1:3317145305:9B9EF17E0518CB93284577CF42374EA9:r)
---|---

subject: I can’t wait to work together, Friend
body:
| | Friend, **I want to start this message by introducing myself. I’m D’Angelo Virgo, the Pennsylvania State Director for NextGen America.** For the past couple of years, I’ve helped move our community forward as a candidate for state representative, policy writer, and organizer. I’m so excited to be a part of NextGen but even more excited to work with you all. I look forward to the many goals we can and will achieve together! **[Act now: Sign up to volunteer with our team here at NextGen PA to help mobilize and energize young people across the commonwealth!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43916526/339271313/1498270726?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Mjc5YWM5MS00Y2I3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FIix_y8i_s5gaiBUxTQilt9aWZ0ONNzC6GTKCYnOFjs=&emci=ba131727-79b6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=5279ac91-4cb7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=6787172)** As you may already know, NextGen Pennsylvania has hit the ground running to get young people registered and ready for the upcoming 2022 midterm elections. **Our organizers and activists are working every day to mobilize young people on campuses across the commonwealth and in communities that are often overlooked in our electoral process.** And we’re just getting started — by the time the midterm elections roll around on November 8, we’re going to **make sure every young Pennsylvanian voter is ready to make their voice heard at the ballot box.** This year, we have the chance to help decide the path forward in Pennsylvania. With federal and statewide elections for the U.S. Senate, U.S. House of Representatives, and governor, our votes will help form a future that we want for our communities. I hope you continue to fight for our communities and democracy with us. Stay tuned for ways to take action with us for the upcoming primary election on May 17 — I’ll be reaching out soon! **[Stay in touch: Be the first to know about our upcoming events and actions by signing up to volunteer with us!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43916538/339271328/-67813215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Mjc5YWM5MS00Y2I3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FIix_y8i_s5gaiBUxTQilt9aWZ0ONNzC6GTKCYnOFjs=&emci=ba131727-79b6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=5279ac91-4cb7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=6787172)** In solidarity,

D’Angelo Virgo
Pennsylvania State Director
NextGen America

name: Rand Paul
subject: Did Biden forget how the economy works?
body:
Biden, Pelosi, and AOC all seem to have forgotten anything they learned in an economics class... or even basic 8th-grade math cl
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2dlg2jmc89830v0kguf6uj85sld49rgrq3k6hgg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf1plhmerr3dthmdr32ohge8rb4d7568rj1dbhekpjedj1msrm2c30carj0sdkmsrt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m8omctb2mdg6fdj3coo71cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn48d245p25oh4cdgm9ob6c1g6cpj24no)
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zajfnht825lae9shhg16m8j692cvos0v0bsa2c0o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s5j60o36cph2bs)

Friend,

Biden, Pelosi, and AOC all seem to have forgotten anything they learned in an economics class... or even basic 8th-grade math classes.

Do you see the horrific ideas coming out of Washington D.C.?
* Raising the minimum wage to $20+
* Passing over $3 Trillion budgets
* Allowing inflation to destroy the value of the dollar
* They've even proposed minting a "$1 Trillion coin" to fund the budget...

These ideas are not only madness but economic suicide.**The Foundation for Economic Education 's (FEE) high school students know more about basic economics and math than Joe Biden (and they can stay awake during class)!**

FEE is educating both high school and college students about the true principles of free markets, entrepreneurship, individual liberties, and personal responsibility. Their flagship program,** "FEE In the Classroom"** is teaching students these important lessons and values in order to save our Republic from socialism.

**Make no mistake:** If AOC had attended a FEE In the Classroom seminar we would not be in this mess.

[_**Which is why I am PERSONALLY supporting FEE In the Classroom and am asking all of my supporters to contribute or even sponsor a FEE In the Classroom program. Please click here to contribute $1,000, $500, $250, $100, $50, or even $10**_**.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z06fi3bgqtma7d2375gv1b1u294f9qirt9rceav0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s5j60o36cph2bs)

_You and I will never win unless we reach young people with our message_.

The truth is we have an uphill battle ahead of us.

Big government, Critical Race Theory, radical activists, and cancel culture have all played a part to indoctrinate our country's youth inside the classroom.

But I am optimistic and fully believe FEE can turn the tide against socialism in the classroom.

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdu1p5e7vm9u3poan28d69mo0i9em60l63ekcqfo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s5j60o36cph2bs)

When young people hear our message it resonates with them.
* Young people want to be free and independent
* Entrepreneurship and problem solving is appealing to young high school and college students
* Privacy and individual liberty is important to younger generations
* Our country's youth want fulfilling and well-paying jobs... Well, you're not going to get that with socialism

**DO NOT give up on young people. **

We can win hearts and minds. And that's exactly what FEE is doing with FEE In the Classroom.

FEE students are among the brightest men and women I meet. In fact, I've even had FEE staff testify in front of Congress and some former FEE students have worked in my office or on my campaigns.

[_**I am inviting you to support the Foundation for Economic Education by making a donation of $10, $20.22, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4q8jl1ovbosenm0m5mgqsg2nb0e502edmqv1qfg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s5j60o36cph2bs)**.** FEE's mission means a great deal to me and I have told their president, Zilvinas Silenas, I would help him raise $10,000 from my personal supporters.

It would mean a lot to me if you helped me reach this goal. Please use one of the links below to donate:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7tnhr9ee8bm2d89gfsmaeu0g96am413l8ulq58o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s5j60o36cph2bs)
[_**Donate $20.22 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6j2bimof9qthet285edm1674iu0op954t781t7o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s5j60o36cph2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zga4i5lrpflhsr9h7fl56e2t1lm68n9gm9eg5vn0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s5j60o36cph2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z610mkbp3es20ga2ks2cj8hg8r181kf67to0o7cg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s5j60o36cph2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgd78ebr251ddpckqhfkpebu5c4gg1b2h46k1leo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s5j60o36cph2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrtgkbg2esqisofhjljk3eg4vt623rfmamas2m40_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s5j60o36cph2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z75c13cnr84rdepno0mq4s9tnthi8t1lgcsljk68_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s5j60o36cph2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>> **_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3euj38bnrfnf48n3tur92eln4qdv8nqjs1cb0c0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s5j60o36cph2bs)

**Here is something you won 't read in an email every day... This email nor FEE will solve our problems in the next 24 hours.**

_I am asking you to make a long-term investment in the future of our Republic_.

FEE's students learn the ideas of liberty, free enterprise, the principles of our Founding Fathers, and have an impact on our culture and public policy process. But it takes time.

The organization was founded in 1946 and rose to prominence during the Cold War. FEE served as the greatest voice for the ideas of liberty in this time and influenced many leaders such as Ronald Reagan and Margret Thatcher.

The ideas of liberty defeated communism and we can win again against the rising tide of socialism in the classroom. But I need your help.

[_**Please make a generous donation to FEE today and help me reach my goal of raising $10,000 for this important organization. You can click here to donate**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zh186p4v2t437l17mrv8dd9aumthiasp01v70510_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s5j60o36cph2bs)**.**

Thank you,

Senator Rand Paul

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvis1kokpiblk2pp8keile4a8kr8ntttomldkbs8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s5j60o36cph238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

body:
| | | | Peter,

**You should have received an email notifying you that your House Republicans Membership is EXPIRED.**

You only have one more chance to renew your status with us and confirm you are a Republican who is willing to fight. **[Will you please confirm before the deadline passes?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60076535:69zotYoQN:m:1:3317145305:A185CFF1A9B771E938A4F59351462E2D:r "Will you please confirm before the deadline passes?")**

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60076535:69zotYoQN:m:1:3317145305:A185CFF1A9B771E938A4F59351462E2D:r)
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60076535:69zotYoQN:m:1:3317145305:A185CFF1A9B771E938A4F59351462E2D:r "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---

**House Republicans need you to become a 2022 Sustaining Member in order to win back the Majority.**

House Democrats are retiring on a near-daily basis. Nancy Pelosi is at her wit's end. YOU could be the tipping point that sends it all crashing down!

By renewing your membership, you will become a part of history and restore American greatness.

But if you fail to ignore this offer and miss our deadline, you will kill Republicans' chances of winning back the House and hand over power to Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and Kamala Harris once again.

The choice is yours. But don't take long!

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60076535:69zotYoQN:m:1:3317145305:A185CFF1A9B771E938A4F59351462E2D:r "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---

Thank you,

Taylor, NRCC Membership Office

---
| |
* * *

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60076536:69zotYoQN:m:1:3317145305:A185CFF1A9B771E938A4F59351462E2D:r "Red Wave Image Link")

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60076536:69zotYoQN:m:1:3317145305:A185CFF1A9B771E938A4F59351462E2D:r "Can we count on you to step up?")**

name: Sarah Palin
subject: Become a Founding Supporter

body:
America is at a tipping point. | Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.
Peter,

**Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.**

I first entered politics 30 years ago, when I was elected to city council in Wasilla. I still live in Wasilla; my family is here; my son goes to school here. My heart will ALWAYS be in Alaska, even when I'm representing you in Washington, D.C.

America is at a tipping point. As I've watched the far left destroy our country, I knew I had to step up and join the fight. And now I'm asking you to do the exact same thing.

I can't do this without your support.

That's why for a short time, when you make your next contribution of ANY AMOUNT, you'll automatically cement your name as an **Official Founding Supporter**.

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW TO BECOME AN OFFICIAL FOUNDING SUPPORTER.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60076547:JQwj_YohN:m:1:3317145305:B6F523720D4DFE46A398D8813051E896:r)**

This is your chance to go down in history. YOU are the reason I'm running, and YOU will be the reason we win.

_**[Please contribute $35 by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to join the fight and mark your status as an Official Founding Supporter.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60076547:JQwj_YohN:m:1:3317145305:B6F523720D4DFE46A398D8813051E896:r)**_

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60076547:JQwj_YohN:m:1:3317145305:B6F523720D4DFE46A398D8813051E896:r)

At this critical time in our nation's history, we need leaders who will combat the left's socialist, big-government, America-last agenda.

This country was built by heroes, and the radical left dishonors their legacies by opening our borders to illegal immigrants, mortgaging our children's future, and selling out our nation's interest to the highest bidder.

I'm in this race to win it and join the fight for freedom alongside other patriots willing to sacrifice all to save our country.

I just have one simple question for you:

**WILL YOU JOIN ME?**

**[Please contribute $35 by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to join the fight and mark your status as an Official Founding Supporter.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60076547:JQwj_YohN:m:1:3317145305:B6F523720D4DFE46A398D8813051E896:r)**

Thank you & God Bless America.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60076547:JQwj_YohN:m:1:3317145305:B6F523720D4DFE46A398D8813051E896:r)
Sarah Palin

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60076547:JQwj_YohN:m:1:3317145305:B6F523720D4DFE46A398D8813051E896:r)**

subject: I want to meet you next Thursday, April 14th!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heimlich for Congress**
body:
| | | | [ ](https://heimlichforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93d2b220a5efc44f0b96119a2&id=90cfa2fc2a&e=544bb4cd89)
---
| | |
---
| I’m excited to tell you about a great event happening next week. On Thursday, April 14th, some friends have organized a “Meet Phil” reception at Ludlow Wines in Clifton. I’d love to see you there! It will be a chance for you to share with me your hopes and concerns — about the state of our democracy, the war in Ukraine or any issues that concern you. Whether you’re a Republican, a Democrat or an Independent, I’m really looking forward to connecting with you. WHEN: Thursday, April 14 at 6:00pm WHERE: Ludlow Wines, 343 Ludlow Ave., Cincinnati **Early voting has already started._The election is less than a month away._** Even if you can’t attend, I’d be grateful if you could share information about [my campaign](https://heimlichforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93d2b220a5efc44f0b96119a2&id=9afe772942&e=544bb4cd89). We’re on [Facebook](https://heimlichforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93d2b220a5efc44f0b96119a2&id=6e862b6b21&e=544bb4cd89) and [Twitter](https://heimlichforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93d2b220a5efc44f0b96119a2&id=41680e940f&e=544bb4cd89). Please tell your friends, family and colleagues that I’m dedicated to protecting our democracy and defeating my opponent Warren Davidson, who has planted himself firmly in the “Putin wing” of the Republican party. Please chip in whatever you can — $5, $10, $100, $1000 — so we can continue to get the word out to voters. **Your donation can help to protect our democracy** from politicians like my opponent who seem bent on destroying it.
---
| [I WANT TO HELP](https://heimlichforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93d2b220a5efc44f0b96119a2&id=e5c5fafc93&e=544bb4cd89 "I WANT TO HELP")
---
| We can win this race. But we have to act now. Thank you for your support,
---
|
---
| | | | OUTRAGE OF THE WEEK
---
| My opponent continues to show his true colors when it comes to the invasion of Ukraine. Just this week, he voted against support for NATO and, incredibly, joined Marjorie Taylor Greene and five other extremists to [oppose investigating Russia](https://heimlichforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93d2b220a5efc44f0b96119a2&id=b48c02cef4&e=544bb4cd89) for war crimes committed in Ukraine.**Davidson. Must. Go.**
---
| [I WANT TO HELP](https://heimlichforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93d2b220a5efc44f0b96119a2&id=2a2cf7499f&e=544bb4cd89 "I WANT TO HELP")
---
| | STAY UPDATED ON THE LATEST
---
| Follow me on [Twitter](https://heimlichforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93d2b220a5efc44f0b96119a2&id=ac8bc40276&e=544bb4cd89) and be sure to retweet! Like me on [Facebook](https://heimlichforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93d2b220a5efc44f0b96119a2&id=c1e172e320&e=544bb4cd89) and share, share, share! Subscribe to my [YouTube](https://heimlichforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93d2b220a5efc44f0b96119a2&id=06ef7847bd&e=544bb4cd89) channel to see the latest uploads!
---

name: =?UTF-8?B?4piGQ0kgb24gYmVoYWxmIG9mIEhpbGxzZGFsZSBDb2xsZWdl?=
subject: Unlock the Federalist Papers
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vs-hk1qHNN

"The Constitution is kind of trash." That's what a guest-with
an Ivy League degree-said recently on a highly-rated daytime talk
show.
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/os-hk1qHNN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
Fellow American,

"The
Constitution is kind of trash."

That's
what a guest-with an Ivy League degree-said recently on a
highly-rated daytime talk show.

You've
likely seen how "progressives" in the media, Big Tech, and
politics are amplifying attacks on our nation's principles of
limited government and personal liberty with outrageous
statements like "The Constitution is kind of trash."

And like
that television pundit I mentioned, they are pushing a narrative
that our Constitution is flawed, outdated, and incapable of
dealing with the challenges of our time.

Thankfully, a few early champions of the Constitution-Alexander
Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison-gave you and me the perfect
guide to understanding its timeless principles: The Federalist
Papers.

Written
between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius,
The Federalist Papers were originally published as newspaper
editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution.

Thomas
Jefferson described them as "the best commentary on the
principles of government which ever was written."

And these
documents are just as relevant today as they were back then. If
we're serious about solving the current issues in our country, we
shouldn't run from them. We should embrace them.

That's
why I want to send you our entire 10-lesson course, "The
Federalist Papers," on DVD today when you make a tax-deductible
donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.

"The
Federalist Papers" course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for
viewing in your home or a small group.

You might
also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal
study. Hillsdale's faculty teach the course, and it will deepen
your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even
more.

These
DVDs also make a great gift for someone unfamiliar with our
nation's founding principles-maybe even a friend or family
member.

But
supplies are limited. So, be sure to get this special edition of
"The Federalist Papers" on DVD today. More than 200,000 people
have already taken this course, so this DVD box set won't last
long.

You can
use this secure link to receive your copy of "The Federalist
Papers" right now:

https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers

Warm
regards,

Bill
Gray, '01
Vice
President
National
Donor Outreach
Hillsdale
College

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com

body:
Join us!| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43901315/339219248/-950812558?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzgwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTEzNzlhYS0zNGI3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j7adOHUUKvKEdgcdswO5tNtXaW3vzW4QSMRl1fR3Wsg=&emci=2d99f9d1-b2b3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=f11379aa-34b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=5354188)
---
| |
---
| | Hi Peter, Join us as we welcome 4th Congressional District Candidate Ashley Ward to Person County on April 10th! Everyone, regardless of party affiliation, is encouraged to join us. Folks will get to hear from Ashley herself - she'll share her story, vision for the 4th District, and why she's running for Congress. Folks can ask questions and connect with her directly. Then, the campaign will share how everyone can get involved! For any additional questions about the event, please reach out to Anderson Clayton, Chair of the Person County Democrats, at 919-451-6960 or at [persondems@gmail.com](mailto:persondems@gmail.com).
---

clean_body: Join us!| | | | | | | Hi Peter, Join us as we welcome 4th Congressional District Candidate Ashley Ward to Person County on April 10th! Everyone, regardless of party affiliation, is encouraged to join us. Folks will get to hear from Ashley herself - she'll share her story, vision for the 4th District, and why she's running for Congress. Folks can ask questions and connect with her directly. Then, the campaign will share how everyone can get involved! For any additional questions about the event, please reach out to Anderson Clayton, Chair of the Person County Democrats, at 919-451-6960 or at mailto:persondems@gmail.com. | | = | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Friends of Ashley Ward Friends of Ashley Ward P.O.
