body:
Senate Conservatives Fund is proud to endorse Herschel Walker for U.S. Senate in Georgia.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgb4e8vt0kvved7s9bgochdeaor6p68ga0jt6tpo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s5gm2ob4cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf3cth6cpm2tpl62qm2dbjmho74pblmaqe9oljm9qe1phgempnedtjcdgr1p9kmurt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coqm9d9icup38phlcipm9ptgmlin49fg)
| | |
---
---
|
---
Fellow Conservative: Senate Conservatives Fund is proud to endorse **Herschel Walker** for U.S. Senate in Georgia.
You may remember Walker as a star running back for the University of Georgia Bulldogs and then in the NFL. But your kids and grandkids will remember him as a stalwart conservative patriot who helped make America great again.
Walker is one of the top conservative Senate candidates of this election cycle. The media wants to portray him as a celebrity candidate, but it's his ideas and toughness they really fear.
Walker is running on the conservative issues that matter most:
▶︎ Border security
▶︎ Energy independence
▶︎ Backing the Blue
▶︎ The 2nd Amendment
▶︎ Pro-family values
**[Please make a generous contribution to his campaign.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2jvp2bbtflv9hcie1uupj33oh27mdtce6ajn0rg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s5gm2ob4cjh2bs)**
Walker is a pro-life, pro-gun, pro-constitution, America-First leader. He won the full endorsement of President Donald Trump, and Senate Conservatives Fund is putting all our strength behind him, too.
**Georgia is a critical battleground state for Senate control.** The incumbent Democrat, Raphael Warnock, is a left-wing radical – extreme for any state, but especially for Georgia.
Warnock is one of the woke, socialist Democrats who helped unleash Biden-flation, open our borders, and put teachers' unions ahead of parents and children in our schools.
Replacing him with a conservative star like Herschel Walker is like winning two elections in one. And SCF's support is crucial – to show conservatives around the country that THIS is the race, and HERSCHEL WALKER is the candidate.
**[Please do your part today and send $10, $25, $50, or more to help Herschel Walker run to Washington!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcph0gboongnhe1gnuptiell70j63qvglru3dobg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s5gm2ob4cjh2bs)**
_SCF will pay all processing fees so Herschel can spend 100% of your contributions on voter contact._
Let's work together to win this race so we can take control of the Senate away from the Democrats AND build a conservative Senate controlled by leaders who will fight for our future.
Thank you for considering this request and for being part of our team. Sincerely,
---
---
Mary Vought Executive Director Senate Conservatives Fund
---
|
---
SUPPORT HERSCHEL WALKER
---
---

subject: We Nailed It This Last Quarter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marc McMain for Congress, Inc
body:
The numbers are in from last quarter and they look GREAT! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bbbf66a36252/campaign-update-9003797?e=2429acb6f7)
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Peter,

The numbers are in from last quarter and they were phenomenal, We raised $210,000 to put us at $300,000 left to spend. Most congressional races are lucky to raise that in total, let alone have it to spend the last 45 days before a primary.

Folks, the momentum is in our favor. Not only have we raised a ton of money, but our grassroots efforts have taken off. Just last month, we knocked on over 3,000 doors and dozens of events. If you know me, you know I'm not the kind of guy to brag, but I'm proud of this campaign. No one is out working as hard as we are. Whether it's attending events, raising money, or knocking on doors. We are excelling in every category.

---

name: Benfield Survey Team
subject: SURVEY: Biden and Gun Rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erika Benfield for Congress
body:
Do you trust him? Hi Peter, Erika Benfield is running for Congress as a proud, law-abiding gun owner. She fully believes in your Constitutional right to keep and bear arms. **We have a quick one-question survey, and we’re showing the results to Erika._[Do you trust Biden with your gun rights?](http://links.erikabenfieldforcongress.com/u/click?_t=173be99f161745d58770eac36407ef89&_m=93ec91bce9ae4c39a3dbfbd6ae3477f7&_e=pIaZUzbPcHxf822sGApEiZhccykyBvGtLgxDfiEBLnDF09rFAWeoivsJ20gKFvGWiw1YIVwDme8WjsUbuO2ndiUA_A7Q3rwQMXMmhADde2r5PY4CAUF-ee-xArSAJgbirVLmgLNyTdRJhg-SOgOAtmjyis7CXtPwU68lRjZHIyV4CijuOK2RGNIf1QfeoFh353isLQ3tNKyBhh87NPsTV9WwnE550cB5t4swtQy2mes0aU5t6x02w97SImvT5sunAMK-KXuhi-kEdMzr801k_9E027aNQKvXS3nGvDfBV_IUFdduGOCAMzTc6OgPVgTMy4_L30Tw1X6Be3yIVhX2gA%3D%3D)_** [](http://links.erikabenfieldforcongress.com/u/click?_t=173be99f161745d58770eac36407ef89&_m=93ec91bce9ae4c39a3dbfbd6ae3477f7&_e=pIaZUzbPcHxf822sGApEiZhccykyBvGtLgxDfiEBLnDF09rFAWeoivsJ20gKFvGWiw1YIVwDme8WjsUbuO2ndiUA_A7Q3rwQMXMmhADde2pM0o7HV_FlAxfTag31q_SROGH0D14iihL50_1EmC3DnazufjwQMsdAPG8t9IJcRbKmob4svQTTc0cfCf1QkPKX_71j7j3ZYl6KiEKcTj9QK2N6GZYro02RmGcA5u5QXNLv-8pam-RwhjM3QQtloI4KGnAibcMx4jQepgb7-qYiNUQbqapRHnS9_mojpXEjzOmI7zkDTR6LToWnDaXsfU6zRVfQYgX5vXsbGX1Ds76SMQ%3D%3D) Biden’s record of bashing law-abiding gun owners is a **complete joke**. Crime continues to skyrocket, yet his administration wants to “defund the police” and leave you without a way to protect yourself. Biden and the Democrats have done nothing but strip away our Second Amendment rights for decades! **The buck stops here.** We’re going to make sure Erika Benfield wins Florida’s 7th Congressional District so she can put an end to the Democrat gun grab!

body:
Check out the news >>> | | | Team, Did you see the news? After announcing her run for Mayor of Houston, Amanda is getting the word out about her vision to move all of Houston forward! [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXaUIaJN6Fy9F2job4EIBumyygdiH80WQHkZauKxwmmNeqPdnjqJzNi7MHeuAx2P9deEEM75t78-tkC9OVigwkFM7C-i9kmUIExhYE3s4anYFJQdxNT6fm5aavS8o_XVoqu9FwZt9HDmWDj4OAoLAq3RJkq-FdMPtOE9_oLxIjfwvFlq0bpf6zEoXvb6VQlM_s2354MwnLYnG00xsiZgA3f3s5N_odGpKLOGCboUXDsl6/3l1/zhzA51a3R6euncj7x_pxeQ/h0/o5LNHLHAyfOD7RpRi7VdOFKMOo8KWKLw_IyNm8KM28I) In an interview with ABC13, Amanda said that Houston needs big thinkers, big dreamers, and people who can execute those visions. [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDII6JAn9xZ1CQuZcahNuxlOeYE9acLIUF-e02zJbwCi3PF9lt2DUTFYLqlhmM_iaElGlaPGDcJVPNokEJnbp_XAgSGmFt6h9tW7eWTKp8i326V6hYC836M9tHOCyGFGAg6niXes9VbLP3x5s_odNCBpzjtP0vm8PAuHYFULB960zgP4f3WH0rxjv8q3Ufifx32dg86iFafIUmnjMP2u9dWz4Z6ubEP6eoWOKOzu_zy9R4Nof6vUSCNg1MK7cZLmlZetUGbOtbLDY-Fc8-LJoJbIvfAy7zamM1jRqD4OJoGfMKT_dRaUL9o5bCVE0KSRfeOp-qArZRVaXxxVK4p5Vzewab-rOf0zKHbGuaLoslrQupoQXiDrr1o9sXnWim9vE6Q/3l1/zhzA51a3R6euncj7x_pxeQ/h1/MnTimlntsrHM22YXW-BODFfB8Q61oDz2Hd3ACHe7ncA) Amanda’s experience as a former City Council Member and catalyst for change in the city gives her an edge over the other candidates. She has consistently been a champion for change and envisions Houston becoming a hub for innovation and technology. [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDCWXA81OaFcham40C6ZT4TDsKCRUsE7SBCgPMqMhGewebVYs0XftNSoZ0cmf-hftpOLl2CMKoaACp9cViJGp3V7_MWWRqWSb4TIbi6DbDFcKJjUCwF5a7qm0C3Av-chDnhdo3FAdL7qcQjbN02yVHalGjblrRQQil9MKROR_UwLrmDWc9avlO0TEFmcKCIPq8W1129Fj28EBGrN71iZEKTvCjmhqd4nyD-Q2hyq7zfVLKgS5W4p9dWF01wFna04UpcQnAxuxUJjNT8boL-TX4RFFG-zaxODCqr9RxOOdR-1RhYxgbn-1W2Ijjlgb2aOpnQ/3l1/zhzA51a3R6euncj7x_pxeQ/h2/fcUVwUguqh45Q5ZBdYUReZk0exTZ_MBmlotGt-iM2Ro) Amanda sat down with FOX26 and shared her passion for community service and her commitment to meeting the needs of Houstonians by showing up, being present, and getting the job done. **[This will be a race to watch! But there is no other candidate with the passion and love for Houston like Amanda. Chip in $10 towards Amanda K. Edwards for Mayor of Houston >>>](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wB7DWu1u8h5QTGLUn-vuE3aPkjcIZJK1hvTirauHPanlYQCDitN5S2DtVUGoSzM5WuHAG06LMPkLWfgP7jseH7cDinTQWdfgXdjIm7NwSw846pMOqYA-Zb3jq13MnVeGdby2HJnhmgA9zZPd-1gFDCBZK9ckpejDVo88aV7aAs3rBsX2pHLAamO-7CjKR0N8GlxQ6pwbBL3Rv8mUDi8b1QBUw302d_ECYnASUfOydAoUJ_3seeYFD9mOMoPekW1ufXjYno-NBn_XEpp6lwwFhdaOjdkVlfQy6qmXS6VMDW3SosNSHl_9Y3P7mw-WZ_1nempObPFWo8WxFds2cFvveT/3l1/zhzA51a3R6euncj7x_pxeQ/h3/rLVjJ_Z8lrTpHnJpsp8eJftkxYOeRrSlMpRdELeqx3A)** Thanks, Team Amanda

name: =?utf-8?Q?Greg=20Lopez?=
subject: Do I have the right experience to be Governor?
body:
There's no time for on-the-job training. We need a Governor candidate who can govern on day one.

http://www.lopez2022.com?utm_source=Greg+Lopez+For+Governor&utm_campaign=636fbae2c8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_04_01_07_06_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_9fbc254cd8-636fbae2c8-584862049

Greg and Lisa Lopez have been married for 34 years with two adult children and live in Elizabeth, Colorado

Good Morning,

As we go into State Assembly this weekend, some folks are asking me if I really have the right experience to be the next Governor of Colorado. I think all experiences; success and failure both professional and personal prepare us in ways we can hardly imagine.

As a 27-year-old disabled veteran of the US Air Force, concerned about some of the local issues, I could never have predicted that I would become the Mayor of Parker to solve some of those issues with the town leadership and residents.

I then became a father and learned how to manage a family, even as a stay-at-home dad! I learned about patience and leadership and how to truly love and protect during that time.

I grew a strong yearning to reenter the life of public service, but also had an independent streak that pulled me toward opening my own business with my wife, Lisa. So, we did both. We opened our business, and I began to serve on boards and quickly found myself elevated to leadership roles.

I served as the president of the Denver Hispanic Chamber of Commerce, I sat on the boards of numerous organizations including E470, Federal Executive Boards, Denver Regional Council of Governments, Arapahoe House, Metro Mayors Caucus, and served as the Director of Ace Scholarships. I have even started a second small business specializing in leadership and management training for small and large businesses.

I also served as the Director of the Small Business Administration for the Denver region. This position revealed so much to me about the specific needs of small businesses in Colorado.

All these experiences have made me into the person I am today, and yes, I believe that every one of these moments has uniquely prepared me to become your next Governor. A Governor who is both competent and cares deeply about the people of this state.

I hope you will consider that when deciding who you will choose to bring us back to the Colorado life you deserve.

Best Regards,
Greg Lopez

PS - Greg Lopez participated in the Non-Partisan Church Voter Guides that provide fair and non-bias questionnaires to each candidate for statewide office from both major parties.
Each of the candidates was provided with the same questions and they were also given the final version to approve before the voter guides were published.

For all statewide assembly, races go to: www.ChurchVoterGuides.org or for the GOP Governor race: https://churchvoterguides.org/colorado-gop-gubernatorial-candidates/?utm_source=Greg+Lopez+For+Governor&utm_campaign=636fbae2c8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_04_01_07_06_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_9fbc254cd8-636fbae2c8-584862049

============================================================
** One of us for all of us (http://www.lopez2022.com?utm_source=Greg+Lopez+For+Governor&utm_campaign=636fbae2c8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_04_01_07_06_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_9fbc254cd8-636fbae2c8-584862049)
We are Coloradans who want to freely and responsibly live our best lives. We refuse to be told by so-called experts and politicians how we must live. Together, we can flip the power back to the people by electing a new governor that’s one of us, for all of us. Vote for Greg Lopez, a proven servant leader who puts people over politics to make Colorado the State of Systemic Opportunity for all.
** Make A Donation (http://www.lopez2022.com/donate?utm_source=Greg+Lopez+For+Governor&utm_campaign=636fbae2c8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_04_01_07_06_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_9fbc254cd8-636fbae2c8-584862049)
** Facebook (https://www.facebook.com/GregLopezForGovernor?utm_source=Greg+Lopez+For+Governor&utm_campaign=636fbae2c8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_04_01_07_06_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_9fbc254cd8-636fbae2c8-584862049)
** Twitter (https://twitter.com/LopezforCO?utm_source=Greg+Lopez+For+Governor&utm_campaign=636fbae2c8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_04_01_07_06_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_9fbc254cd8-636fbae2c8-584862049)
** Link (https://www.instagram.com/lopezforco/?utm_source=Greg+Lopez+For+Governor&utm_campaign=636fbae2c8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_04_01_07_06_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_9fbc254cd8-636fbae2c8-584862049)
** Website (http://www.lopez2022.com?utm_source=Greg+Lopez+For+Governor&utm_campaign=636fbae2c8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_04_01_07_06_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_9fbc254cd8-636fbae2c8-584862049)
** Email (mailto:info@lopez2022.com)

Our mailing address is:

-Team Kovacs

---
Fellow Conservative,

This primary race is heating up – we have just 70 days to go until Election Day – and we’re working hard to come out on top and move on to DEFEAT Pelosi puppet Susie Lee this November.

I’ve been hearing from voters across the district, and they are extremely concerned about the direction our nation is headed. They know the Biden presidency has been a disaster for the country.

**According to a recent survey from NBC News, 71% of voters nationally believe the U.S. is on the wrong track.**

Today, I want to get your opinion.
[**Let me know which issues are most important to you. >>>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/197dcb250501724edc9f99905c540ea9/37373/f70e81436b66f652/43b1117ffb18603cc3d6b838967d376c/37373)
With so many problems emerging (the border crisis, record-high inflation, and the war in Ukraine, to name just a few), the American people fear for the future. That’s why I’m running for Congress to restore President Trump’s America First agenda and get our nation back on track.

Thank you in advance for taking a moment today to weigh in.

-John Kovacs
Republican Candidate for Congress (NV-03)

name: Liz Mathis
subject: Did you see this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Liz Mathis for Congress
body:
Peter, did you see this message from my team?

My opponent recently took a vote that disregarded the lives of Iowans. I believe every person deserves affordable access to lifesaving medication, but she does not agree.

In Congress, I'll support legislation to cap the cost of insulin and allow Medicare to negotiate drug prices so no one has to choose between their insulin and their mortgage.

**_Flipping this seat is critical for bringing down sky-high health care costs for Iowans._ [Will you rush a donation of $5 or more to my campaign to help make that happen?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43918744/339281663/-988318911?refcode=em_fr_2022.04.08_b1_lm_all&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTU1ZTNhYi01MWI3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dRPtdyp8tdhyXRC5PYgzERFYxeP-4T4H4IX74EkRhcQ=)** | [RUSH A DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43918745/339281664/-988318911?refcode=em_fr_2022.04.08_b1_lm_all&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTU1ZTNhYi01MWI3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dRPtdyp8tdhyXRC5PYgzERFYxeP-4T4H4IX74EkRhcQ=)
---
Thank you,

Liz

P.S. If you haven’t seen it yet, you can check out this message from my team below.

\----------**Forwarded message** \---------
From: Team Mathis HQ
Date: Wed, April 6, 2022
Subject: despicable
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43918746/339281665/-988318911?refcode=em_fr_2022.04.08_b1_lm_all&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTU1ZTNhYi01MWI3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dRPtdyp8tdhyXRC5PYgzERFYxeP-4T4H4IX74EkRhcQ=)
Hi team,

Last week, Liz’s opponent took a vote that disregarded the lives of so many Iowans – she voted against capping the price of insulin at $35. [**If you’re ready to send Liz to Congress so she can deliver real change and lower prescription drug prices for Iowans, can you chip in now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43918747/339281666/-988318911?refcode=em_fr_2022.04.08_b1_lm_all&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTU1ZTNhYi01MWI3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dRPtdyp8tdhyXRC5PYgzERFYxeP-4T4H4IX74EkRhcQ=)

Over the years, insulin prices have skyrocketed, forcing many people to ration their medication. We need to take action on this type of price gouging that’s costing Iowans their lives. That’s why the House passed historic and bipartisan legislation that would cap consumers’ out-of-pocket cost for insulin at $35 per month – a move that voters overwhelmingly support.

**But in a despicable move, Liz’s Republican opponent, Ashley Hinson, voted against this life-saving legislation which will lower costs for Iowa families.** Unlike her opponent, Liz will take action to make life-saving medications affordable. [**We need Liz in Congress, friend, so please, will you help fight back against her opponent by chipping in right now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43918748/339281667/-988318911?refcode=em_fr_2022.04.08_b1_lm_all&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTU1ZTNhYi01MWI3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dRPtdyp8tdhyXRC5PYgzERFYxeP-4T4H4IX74EkRhcQ=)
[CHIP IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43918749/339281668/-988318911?refcode=em_fr_2022.04.08_b1_lm_all&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTU1ZTNhYi01MWI3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dRPtdyp8tdhyXRC5PYgzERFYxeP-4T4H4IX74EkRhcQ=)

clean_body: Peter, did you see this message from my team? My opponent recently took a vote that disregarded the lives of Iowans. I believe every person deserves affordable access to lifesaving medication, but she does not agree. In Congress, I'll support legislation to cap the cost of insulin and allow Medicare to negotiate drug prices so no one has to choose between their insulin and their mortgage. Flipping this seat is critical for bringing down sky-high health care costs for Iowans. = | = Thank you, Liz P.S. If you haven’t seen it yet, you can check out this message from my team below. \----------Forwarded message \--------- From: Team Mathis HQ Date: Wed, April 6, 2022 Subject: despicable = Hi team, Last week, Liz’s opponent took a vote that disregarded the lives of so many Iowans – she voted against capping the price of insulin at $35. = Over the years, insulin prices have skyrocketed, forcing many people to ration their medication. We need to take action on this type of price gouging that’s costing Iowans their lives. That’s why the House passed historic and bipartisan legislation that would cap consumers’ out-of-pocket cost for insulin at $35 per month – a move that voters overwhelmingly support. But in a despicable move, Liz’s Republican opponent, Ashley Hinson, voted against this life-saving legislation which will lower costs for Iowa families. Unlike her opponent, Liz will take action to make life-saving medications affordable. = = Liz is running in one of the most competitive districts in the country. Her opponent has shown time and time again that she doesn’t care about Iowans and will block legislation to lower health care costs. But to keep Liz’s campaign competitive, she needs your help. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = Thank you, Team Mathis HQ Liz Mathis is a lifelong Iowan, State Senator, and former local news reporter running to represent Iowa's 2nd Congressional District in Congress. = | = | Liz Mathis is running to represent Iowa's 2nd Congressional District. name: Rep. Val Demings
subject: I cannot win in Florida without you, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
supporters like you propelled my campaign launch to historic heights
| | |
---
Friend,

I want you to hear this directly from me: I cannot win in Florida without you. **And right now, as I'm coming up short of my daily fundraising goal, I have nowhere else to turn. **
A poll of my race shows the numbers are close (I'm just a few points behind Marco Rubio!). I need to surge _ahead_ , friend – _ _ and the only way to do it is by hitting each of my daily fundraising goals. Missing this goal isn't an option.
Running a campaign in Florida is expensive – and Florida's last Senate race was decided by just 0.12 points (_10,033 votes_), so every dollar will make a difference. With National Senate Republicans raising nearly $12 million in February alone, **missing****my goal**** could cost Floridians and our country a meaningful win.**
Grassroots supporters like you propelled my campaign launch to historic heights. _Your_ support fueled The Cook Political Report to increase my odds of winning. And this grassroots team is the reason political pundits across the board are saying I have what it takes to defeat Sen. Marco Rubio.
So, friend, here I am, writing to you again. I know you hear a lot from me, but it's only because I _trust_ you and _believe_ that I can't do this without you. Please, if you can spare any donation before midnight to close our fundraising gap, it would mean the world to me.
Here's the best link: [**https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43928183/339325332/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2856-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTdjZDdmYy03MmI3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p9ofzqVGqwdSPn2WOIurWlQfPV_011F8esIuzqf9EnM=)
Thank you so much for your support,

Val Demings

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jeremy=20Shaffer=20for=20Congress?=
subject: State Rep Rob Mercuri Endorses Jeremy Shaffer for Congress
body:
Jeremy Shaffer, Republican candidate for Pennsylvania's 17th Congressional District, today announced the endorsement of State Rep Rob Mercuri | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jeremyshaffer/mercuri-endorsement?e=32107e7cf1)
---
| |
---
| | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
Friday, April 8, 2022
---
**CONTACT: Trevor Naglieri**
[Trevor@JeremyShaffer.com](mailto:Trevor@JeremyShaffer.com?subject=Jeremy%20Shaffer%20for%20Congress%20\(PA-17\))
---
| **State Representative Rob Mercuri Endorses Jeremy Shaffer for Congress**
---
| **Gibsonia, PA** – Jeremy Shaffer, Republican candidate for Pennsylvania's 17th Congressional District, today announced the endorsement of State Representative Rob Mercuri (R, PA-28). Rob currently represents the Allegheny County communities of Bradford Woods, Franklin Park, Marshall, McCandless, and Pine, all of which are located in the 17th Congressional District.

"As a father, successful businessman, and a trusted community leader Jeremy Shaffer is the right candidate for this moment," said **Rep. Rob Mercuri**. "Washington needs people like Jeremy who will solve problems for our working people and families — instead of widening the partisan divide. I know he will deliver positive results for our region and steward our values with dignity and respect. That is why I am enthusiastically supporting Jeremy Shaffer’s campaign for Congress."

"I am absolutely honored to earn the endorsement of Rep. Rob Mercuri," said **Jeremy Shaffer**. "Rob is a proven leader and dedicated public servant who works tirelessly for the people of his district, and I look forward to working with him to deliver real results that put the people of Western Pennsylvania first."

To see Jeremy's full list of publicly released endorsements, visit [www.JeremyShaffer.com/Endorsements](https://JeremyShaffer.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=168b3aab49521aba8263d07fe&id=569430bc83&e=32107e7cf1). ###

name: Team Culp
subject: The Democrat 2022 Playbook - Part 1
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CULP FOR CONGRESS
body:
Here's what the Dems are planning
---
| | | | | |
---
| STAND UP FOR AMERICA.
---
| Unapologetically American. Undeniably Original. The Candidate for We the People.
---
| | | [Visit our Website](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qftG3mQy_Zg5f2iKLeBFiT1B_xXuNa6eZ5tT374G2FRhRFCbVYuV5EBIZOrggrRcXKnQq82kEpf-qHLzlMylwd6FXPZmGi6gKNmMoF6oQs5_ie3HGyKSF2gw2j4U8CxjHqF8w7z_QOS-va8qrmm7rA==&c=VMmLi10Z41HlzIWxiQ26km8YIJmIAWn2izL-z4eHllVcnk1HGCcD0w==&ch=_WwXd2lIUVXPb7KPToONNTyyW7rOlT8SCYrJ0L3V4nQlZ008Cgxkuw==)
---
| | |
---
| |
---
|
---
| The Democrat Playbook for 2022 - Part 1
---
| | |
---|---
|

Dear Friends,

The 2022 election cycle is getting ramped up this month and what is coming over the next six months is going to be bloody and fierce political warfare. The Democrats are in a terrible hole with the disgraceful performance of President Biden and the even more incompetent Vice President Harris. In my 61 years of life, I can't remember a time (to include the hapless Carter Administration) when a sitting President had zero wins and so many losses. This is why his poll numbers are in the toilet and why even the lap-dog left media are beginning to turn on the administration.

A good strategist attacks an opponent on multiple fronts. This has been something the Democrats have traditionally been good at executing and something the Republicans have failed to learn to defend (generally speaking). On a macro-level, the Democrats have three guiding principles: Outnumber, Overwhelm, Overcome. This explains their decades-long push to register voters using creative means such as motor-voter, targeting new immigrants, encouraging illegal immigration, voting by mail, et al. Thankfully, Republicans have begun to wake up to the necessity of building an army of voters who are active and fight back. I believe the Trump phenomenon of 2016 awoke the silent majority and gave rise to the political movement we experienced in the Culp for Governor campaign that saw rallies attended by thousands of people each week and turned out more votes for a Republican Gubernatorial candidate in Washington State history. It also gave rise to parents pushing back on school boards across the nation, voters in blue states like Virginia electing a Republican Governor and a conservative black female as Lt. Governor, and regular citizens refusing to comply with the Covid-19 tyranny that had more to do with political science than it did with actual science (regardless of what the dopes at the Seattle Times and corrupt Dr. Faucci have to say about it).

THERE'S A STORM COMING

When political parties and candidates don't have wins to run on they almost always appeal to fear--both parties do this. That is exactly what is going to happen during this campaign cycle. Trump will return to the media this summer as the villain and a distraction from the Hunter Biden scandal about to erupt. The mechanism to make that happen was put into play over a year ago when Nancy Pelosi formed the January 6th Commission as an insurance policy and leverage against a future Trump return. The never-Trump goon squad on the right--including my opponent Dan Newhouse and his buddies at the Lincoln Project and the MainStreet Republicans--went along with it, gave Pelosi exactly what she wanted, and played right into her hands (as usual). The Democrats and Republicans like Newhouse plan to use the commission to discredit and create fear around Trump and Trump-endorsed candidates like me. This play is targeted at the swing voters and soft Republicans in an effort to get them to stay home because they know the board is pretty much set. The voters are deciding earlier than ever whom they support and whom they don't support. The only defense to this is to get their opponent's base to stay home while turning out their own voters. That is a fear play in its purest form.

The Democrats redeployed Dr. Fauci two weeks ago to soften the ground for "possible Covid lockdowns" in the fall due to a new outbreak. In order to make that play work, they needed a reason as Covid numbers have continued to decline here in the United States and those numbers don't support their narrative. Like magic, the Chinese have gone back to strict lockdowns. Why? A new outbreak in China appeared just in time for election season in the United States and a new justification was created for Dr. Fauci to get back on television to prep their next play (lockdowns) from the Biden Administration via the CDC and NIAID. It was these Chinese lockdowns that laid the next play. And what is that next play? Universal or near-universal mail-in voting across the country. That won't affect us here in Washington but it could aid damaged Democrats in blue states at risk of losing their seats. An added benefit to this is the ability to reframe the economy as the "Covid economy." They've already run this same play regarding gas prices--remember, Putin's gas hikes? I am deeply grateful for the financial support and the support you show me when you attend our events. If we are going to continue to win we need your continued support. name: Sarah Palin
subject: I announced my candidacy for the U.S House
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Alaska
body:
America is at a tipping point. | Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zh0def7hes4aveigd6ooitkvndv5530bae65j93g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkir39tdkmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbpnasb3c1h39o3nmdgj9pdhmgrj6sb4cpq70slgsgqe7cple1qr9d74m8r7ccln6v970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti65j7applmko7cob66aob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5ie2ob7chi69oh5u)
America is at a tipping point. | Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.
Friend,

**Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.**

I first entered politics 30 years ago, when I was elected to city council in Wasilla. I still live in Wasilla; my family is here; my son goes to school here. My heart will ALWAYS be in Alaska, even when I’m representing you in Washington, D.C.

America is at a tipping point. As I’ve watched the far left destroy our country, I knew I had to step up and join the fight. And now I’m asking you to do the exact same thing.

I can’t do this without your support.

That’s why for a short time, when you make your next contribution of ANY AMOUNT, you’ll automatically cement your name as an **Official Founding Supporter**.

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW TO BECOME AN OFFICIAL FOUNDING SUPPORTER.>>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0garsqu4c3a3hdeasfuhie5pv29qhi6l5revj4o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s5gmep34cjh2bs)**

This is your chance to go down in history. YOU are the reason I’m running, and YOU will be the reason we win.

_**[Please contribute $35 by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to join the fight and mark your status as an Official Founding Supporter.>>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgp5kg1l66gs5q99rmgso7itotg680snl0jm0brg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s5gmep34cjh2bs)**_

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgmd81tm0dn87pse655kcqjb6m2npdfqd27qqugg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s5gmep34cjh2bs)

At this critical time in our nation’s history, we need leaders who will combat the left’s socialist, big-government, America-last agenda.

This country was built by heroes, and the radical left dishonors their legacies by opening our borders to illegal immigrants, mortgaging our children’s future, and selling out our nation’s interest to the highest bidder.

I’m in this race to win it and join the fight for freedom alongside other patriots willing to sacrifice all to save our country.

I just have one simple question for you:

**WILL YOU JOIN ME?**

**[Please contribute $35 by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to join the fight and mark your status as an Official Founding Supporter.>>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7rubg0ak0pohslqri4s1mmpkhfc392jb1u5th0g_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s5gmep34cjh2bs)**

Thank you & God Bless America.

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zi91r0vfmk16fd5i9qtrmvtn76j26297q3cukpn0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s5gmep34cjh2bs)
Sarah Palin

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW>>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zv9vkfdebfv7fqam3ec6h3k1rl2n9ijfltn1sp20_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s5gmep34cjh2bs)**

---
| Paid for by Sarah for Alaska. |

P.O. BOX 871235 WASILLA, AK 99687

name: MarkKelly.com
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
If Democrats lose even one seat we could wake up on November 9th with Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell.
#

$3.
That is the donation we are asking you to make today to help re-elect Mark Kelly this November.
Last year more than 200,000 people contributed to Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign. It’s a number we are VERY proud of.
But it’s a different race today. If Democrats lose even one Senate seat, we could wake up on November 9th with Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell.
So, flipping Arizona — a seat we won by only _2.4 points_ in 2020 — is clearly one of McConnell’s top priorities right now.
Mark has already faced millions of dollars in attack ads, and we know that this is only the beginning. It’s going to take a BIG team to hold this seat. So, we’re asking:
[**Can you please make your first $3 donation to help Mark hold this seat? We have to be ready for whatever comes next.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-apr22?refcode=em220408-1-7&t=1&refcode2=2547_6688874_5D8J1H&akid=2547%2E6688874%2E5D8J1H)

name: Alexandra Rojas
subject: We're counting on you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

I’m writing to you today because things are getting tough at a critical
time. Here’s the situation:

Our fundraising has decreased each month this year. That’s not a
sustainable trend as we try to elect 5 more working-class progressives to
Congress.

We operate on a pretty tight budget, especially compared to other
political organizations. It’s because we run solely on donations from
grassroots supporters like you. We don’t take a cent from corporate PACs.

Our average donation this year is just $17.51. We’re incredibly proud of
that. It means we rely on a lot of small-dollar donations to fuel our
primaries.

You may know by now, but we started Justice Democrats after many of us
worked on the Bernie 2016 campaign. We were all inspired and determined to
find a way to continue the message of Bernie’s campaign through electing a
new Congress that truly represented the needs of the people.

That’s why we launched Justice Democrats and supported a lot of candidates
in our first election year (2018). We lost a bunch of races, but then we
won one big one: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez’s groundbreaking victory against
the 4th most powerful Democrat in the House.

We recruited and elected Cori Bush and Jamaal Bowman in 2020, defeating
two more powerful corporate Democrats. This year we’ve already won our
first race — Greg Casar in Texas. Now, we have 5 more Justice Democrats to
elect so we can build the necessary support in Congress for Medicare for
All, a Green New Deal, and so much more.

That’s why I’m asking,
Peter: can you make
your first donation
to Justice Democrats today?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/102613?refcode=em20220408-22773&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=22773%2E1203867%2EFAiLH6 ]→ Yes, I can donate today to help build the Justice Democrats bloc in
Congress.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/102613?refcode=em20220408-22773&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=22773%2E1203867%2EFAiLH6 ]Contribute

I appreciate so, so much whatever you can give today, whether it’s $3,
$27, $100 or anything at all. We will never take corporate PAC money and
we will always rely on our grassroots movement.

In solidarity,

Alexandra Rojas, Executive Director
Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220408-22773-footer&t=1004&refcode2=22773_1203867_FAiLH6&akid=22773%2E1203867%2EFAiLH6

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1005&akid=22773%2E1203867%2EFAiLH6

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

Democrats in Congress, along with the Biden Administration, are acting like they’re dealing out Monopoly money while paying people to stay at home instead of working. It's time to end this madness. Thanks to our tremendous law enforcement officers who got this off the streets. China is sending deadly fentanyl to Mexico, which then comes over our porous southern border and into communities across Alabama. I will fight to end the border crisis by securing full funding to finish the wall, entirely reinstating both the Remain in Mexico program and public charge rule, re-establishing the 'safe third country' agreements for aliens claiming asylum, and immediately ending DHS's dangerous catch and release policies. [**LIKE AND SHARE POST**](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=9f01363f373e49d6a2c2b81312b944d2&_e=kNU_XqMe1BqDAmya4BlGtam4Cqt8H3YQIMxN_NtyP1D8Eik9YzZr3yweyi_PQW1J7A8MlOhvOitfm24CYKCap31FMX65WpuVhCVRQI3WPcGREWn1qmJ3v5zoeOwJcr3aJliVg-Y6dD0Ujv1SJdxBbMuMtZKPHHQB9xwZV2LUVIC17wapemn6fPpvstgyam5XdtDY60AE7YAg3Dm2gawkamd1_g3Ph7TdwA-wnsZHY8XWxNTCOWdimYvlRe3SL39YrsG5s02Ugmynl4IEzJFl4K5W82krkpT0zU4bSpShYGIk5ZA-m5XWvVnxhq-GH-ME) ****Katie at the Opp Rattlesnake Rodeo**** [](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=9f01363f373e49d6a2c2b81312b944d2&_e=kNU_XqMe1BqDAmya4BlGtam4Cqt8H3YQIMxN_NtyP1D8Eik9YzZr3yweyi_PQW1JdOl_Vm_wdKT7h2BfP8iMzB6ff2564IjDb6gFuRcBUoQEiKrdxxXY6-uR2osTTS09xQ2LCZNmUlq5HskRHmjG468yd-Dlt5oRaNpSXdiQsIh6QRQbC3vO_NMmSgyeqGPCz6dpbK8FuRCEAyU9-IkgWs6pA3QVe9B7e0jQLDoYs1GHpfpttTauVgHewm-Ze_N2DTNUKTEKuDiA8qt8VOkfPY5mem_c8dY25H25noVDhaon4MD_yb4UdY7IkB2yh2EX) Enjoyed being at the Rattlesnake Rodeo in Opp last week! In the Senate, I will fight tirelessly to lower taxes, defend our liberties, end Washington’s reckless spending, and cut government red tape so that hardworking Alabamians, small businesses, and families can thrive in every corner of our great state. “During the height of the pandemic, she worked closely with ARHA’s efforts to encourage financial relief for small businesses and spearheaded the ‘Keep Alabama Open’ grassroots campaign,” ARHA said in announcing the endorsement. Our Christian, conservative values continue to be attacked, and the country we know and love is in jeopardy because of it. This all started when they took prayer out of schools and stopped having students say the pledge. It’s time for the next generation to stand up against the madness. Our children need to be surrounded by more prayer, not less of it. clean_body: OFFICIAL BRITT FOR ALABAMA NEWSLETTER Katie Releases a Memo on Reducing Big Government Our country has never before seen this level of rampant spending — and on this magnitude of existing debt. Democrats in Congress, along with the Biden Administration, are acting like they’re dealing out Monopoly money while paying people to stay at home instead of working. It's time to end this madness. **Katie Responds to Huge Drug Bust in Baldwin County This is nearly two million lethal doses of fentanyl in one Baldwin County traffic stop alone. Thanks to our tremendous law enforcement officers who got this off the streets. China is sending deadly fentanyl to Mexico, which then comes over our porous southern border and into communities across Alabama. I will fight to end the border crisis by securing full funding to finish the wall, entirely reinstating both the Remain in Mexico program and public charge rule, re-establishing the 'safe third country' agreements for aliens claiming asylum, and immediately ending DHS's dangerous catch and release policies. Katie at the Opp Rattlesnake Rodeo Enjoyed being at the Rattlesnake Rodeo in Opp last week! This annual tradition always draws people from far and wide to Covington County. We were happy to visit with everyone! ARHA Endorses Katie Britt I am proud to have the endorsement of ! In the Senate, I will fight tirelessly to lower taxes, defend our liberties, end Washington’s reckless spending, and cut government red tape so that hardworking Alabamians, small businesses, and families can thrive in every corner of our great state. “During the height of the pandemic, she worked closely with ARHA’s efforts to encourage financial relief for small businesses and spearheaded the ‘Keep Alabama Open’ grassroots campaign,” ARHA said in announcing the endorsement. Read more here: Katie Addresses the Government’s Spending Problem Alabama families and retirees are currently suffering the cost of the federal government's reckless spending in the form of the crushing inflation Alabamians see every time they go to the grocery store. In the Senate, I will fight to significantly reduce the wasteful spending and to balance the budget. If Congress can't do that, they shouldn't get paid a dime of taxpayer money. Katie’s Specific Plan to Reform Our Immigration System Any candidate can pretend to be America First to win a campaign. I'm committed to a specific plan to reform our immigration system to put American workers and families first. Read about it here: Katie Defends Religious Freedoms Freedom of religion doesn’t mean freedom from religion. Our Christian, conservative values continue to be attacked, and the country we know and love is in jeopardy because of it. This all started when they took prayer out of schools and stopped having students say the pledge. It’s time for the next generation to stand up against the madness. Our children need to be surrounded by more prayer, not less of it. I can take Montana’s model of clean energy independence and implement it in Washington. | | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsxXG0f8ek4uZkUFvu9y_DsSuzSaiwdJwfeQrLHMWNTZil2jaUWxS8HOCX5UhaiamX2sttSZ0vBa3WWx-9U6E0VATr70_OKzxL6NGLnmpbYmbjjS_wmhk0V2wVIUtbm_hT3LIAhQ-ouAwOOgLe3NnP-97C4GE2lE-ZSBYKrSjodN2HPD1xnr-8qEWTSzWhVQuzglZGkiMeeKhSlsNDD2Pk9HbvG3_Y6khnKrwRGpJQQ7HRk3APMzqFlQ1tQbWo2fP3LXiezUvoUPvtII_PujTMAlh6bhEOU8JfFYumMO6VOk0nK8hmdCJriIw-EKZ7-ARmioAXxxGR5EJRcr4wTI2ABnfPlwDvhzVolNMFfN8_WA/3l1/mTCMnmpgQTiSwPmu4SHq4Q/h0/IyOch_CKl96k2VvmmdTYHECOEZMqwS-6GDtqpdRu-kM) Friend,

Russia’s invasion of Ukraine has exposed a huge problem here at home: the Big Oil companies that funded attacks on democracy by investing in Russia and their GOP lackeys who want Americans to cover Big Oil’s losses at the pump.

But this problem reminded me that Montana is very unique because we are largely energy independent — and we even export a lot of our energy to neighboring states. I wrote an Op-Ed in The Missoulian last weekend that takes a deep dive into the problem, and why Montana should be a model for how the nation can kick its oil habit.

_[**Please take a moment to read my Op-Ed below, and then make a grassroots donation to my campaign for Congress so I can take Montana’s model of energy independence and implement it in Washington.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wZAfvGNm5mnBHp4WTjTZ7D-R6Z5luXOtUhpNW91jgGmhff6P8ufaJSy20SV5K--W9k6f1TfsOblTpRLGrtqddnFIcmZYIzRLWcjDUElqIHFhdTBkfklLMu0A2zU_AarNTp_eKWX1ogEqygCvV2_47ErH95Uo2ELNPyAhDFa3C2KWJaVGjPRa4sTMm4RU4Ox-PfGc7xM3lBJSNfDDPLiQpX-poutdCuszuhhpyvNLuvP48OWp5i7HGQ2gLgR9-JoHW199nBNJ5IaMVuzmw4H9s8IBZM3Bbuwr8sXvCaQRJjiOraDC85AuOAnhN8w5Xra3evzoGN9qt7K0WlloAUCTFN/3l1/mTCMnmpgQTiSwPmu4SHq4Q/h1/3SU0c6CU6_0SOZe2zPKs9VxKTedaLU8OdpxUG4xrLPM)_ Thank you,

* * *

**The Missoulian: Tom Winter: Another handout to the oil oligarchs**

BP's stake in Russia's Rosneft was $14 billion. Shell held $3 billion in Russian assets. Exxon held over $4 billion. Before they succumbed to international pressure to divest, they eagerly consorted with oligarchs and the war criminal Vladimir Putin, used him to increase profits, and undermined Ukrainian democracy in the process. Now their corrupt GOP lackeys want us — the American taxpayer — to cover Big Oil’s losses while they hold us hostage at the gas pump.

The rockets lobbed at Ukrainian civilians cost money. That money came from the multinational oil and gas companies. They funded Putin until the world made them divest from Russia. That same corruption that infects Russia and that defenders of democracy in Ukraine sought to root out from their government now has its sights back on us. They turn once again to the Republican Party — who like always — will do whatever bidding oligarchs require. They want our money to cover their losses from their corrupt Russian investments in the name of “energy independence.”

My GOP opponent for Congress, scandal-ridden Ryan Zinke, said the quiet part out loud when meeting with big oil lobbyists back in 2018: “Our government should work for you." But our government should work for Americans — not multinational corporations. The interests of Shell, of Exxon, of Saudi Aramco are in direct opposition to the interests of the American people.

If we really want to talk about energy independence, Montana has already shown the country the model: investments in renewable energy. Over half of our Montana energy production is renewable. We export over half of our total energy produced to the entire region. Montana renewables power the West.

Even with corruption and subsidies for fossil fuels, the free market would rather invest in more efficient and affordable energy production like wind, solar, and hydro. Out of half a dozen new energy projects in Montana all but one of them are wind and solar. Energy independence means not relying on big oil, their investments in Russia, or their manipulation of our politics. It means relying on Montana.

For decades our state has relied on fossil fuel extraction. Montana coal production hasn’t been declining due to radical leftists, but the free market. It’s being replaced by safer, cleaner renewable energy. The latest governmental energy report says it all, “Montana has substantial renewable energy resources...(and) some of the best utility-scale wind power potential in the nation.”

When policy makers bemoan untapped oil wells in Texas, or un-fracked gas deposits in Colorado, they should really be talking about Montana’s untapped wind and solar. They are resources of strategic importance for the nation's security and prosperity. Democrats must steal the language of the extractive industry in support of renewable energy and we must call out Republicans who support Putin and his big-oil patrons against our national security and independence.

The truth is that America _can_ harness Montana's wind and solar potential without ruining our environment, we _can_ be an international model for 21st century resource extraction: Clean, renewable, and with lasting enrichment of the communities on the ground. Montanans hold a resource that could lead the nation out of dependence on oil that funds war and ruins our atmosphere, and of fracked gas that poisons water and defiles the landscape.

With the right policies, with the next generation of politicians that aren't bought by big oil, we can bring prosperity to Montana by utilizing the resources of our beautiful home for the greater good of the country. The only thing stopping us is the wholesale purchase of our government by private industry.

America could lead the world in renewable energy if we had the political will to root out rampant corruption in our government, the same corruption we see in oligarchies across the world. President Biden’s stalled Build Back Better (BBB) legislation invests $555 billion in clean energy — it is our last best chance to save our country and my generation’s future.

Our current path is unsustainable, it is immoral, it harms the land and people — and it enriches violent oligarchs across the world. Soon, my generation will tire of corrupt politicians, of a government sold to private industry. Let's hope there's still something left to save.

[DONATE NOW →](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wZAfvGNm5mnBHp4WTjTZ7D-R6Z5luXOtUhpNW91jgGmhff6P8ufaJSy20SV5K--W-dBiYPCrN4-ZibdqLnLlxvNdgcxB1hObObZABkXfsLyr6-egDBTOx_qJc9OUuoqJcseJPOBW9XeZRFnkTEwpyVGN8F1jQY4QdS0FtnicPE75nx6DH7t2TvN9K2LFsd2LnX0T1wXUWFUdLUCyZA29kRMqjVPBf9yyn77aBTPuNOthOuku4Zjkwg34YnGUPHkviaWPbVFT6Q4Y_4kLPtFpynaCgUmqohFgCe7zECNYY3TRZU5l6ml_dDICPaw-lElJWPw5UWofZNVLpxDaY7Mq4J/3l1/mTCMnmpgQTiSwPmu4SHq4Q/h3/pN9QvptRJ0gXawfyYE9YbI6MiCjZSdpjYzMXzDYZf8I)

Even with corruption and subsidies for fossil fuels, the free market would rather invest in more efficient and affordable energy production like wind, solar, and hydro. Out of half a dozen new energy projects in Montana all but one of them are wind and solar. Energy independence means not relying on big oil, their investments in Russia, or their manipulation of our politics. It means relying on Montana. For decades our state has relied on fossil fuel extraction. Montana coal production hasn’t been declining due to radical leftists, but the free market. It’s being replaced by safer, cleaner renewable energy. The latest governmental energy report says it all, “Montana has substantial renewable energy resources...(and) some of the best utility-scale wind power potential in the nation.” When policy makers bemoan untapped oil wells in Texas, or un-fracked gas deposits in Colorado, they should really be talking about Montana’s untapped wind and solar. They are resources of strategic importance for the nation's security and prosperity. Democrats must steal the language of the extractive industry in support of renewable energy and we must call out Republicans who support Putin and his big-oil patrons against our national security and independence. The truth is that America can harness Montana's wind and solar potential without ruining our environment, we can be an international model for 21st century resource extraction: Clean, renewable, and with lasting enrichment of the communities on the ground. Montanans hold a resource that could lead the nation out of dependence on oil that funds war and ruins our atmosphere, and of fracked gas that poisons water and defiles the landscape. With the right policies, with the next generation of politicians that aren't bought by big oil, we can bring prosperity to Montana by utilizing the resources of our beautiful home for the greater good of the country. The only thing stopping us is the wholesale purchase of our government by private industry. America could lead the world in renewable energy if we had the political will to root out rampant corruption in our government, the same corruption we see in oligarchies across the world. President Biden’s stalled Build Back Better (BBB) legislation invests $555 billion in clean energy — it is our last best chance to save our country and my generation’s future. Our current path is unsustainable, it is immoral, it harms the land and people — and it enriches violent oligarchs across the world. Soon, my generation will tire of corrupt politicians, of a government sold to private industry. Let's hope there's still something left to save. PAID FOR BY WINTER FOR MONTANA Winter for Montana PO Box 1592 Polson, MT 59860 | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Winter for Montana, please .

Peter,

I enlisted in the military eleven years ago – served nine years on active duty, and four overseas tours in the elite Marine Special Operations Forces unit known as the Marine Raiders.

Needless to say, I know when it’s time to take action.

What we’re seeing Democrats do in Washington is devastating – opening our borders, suppressing American energy, indoctrinating children, and weakening America’s view on the world stage.

_It’s disgusting –**and it’s time to take action.**_

Which leads me to why I’m reaching out to you today, Peter - ACTION IS NEEDED. I refuse to sit on the sidelines and watch the Democrats destroy the country that I’ve dedicated my life to protecting. **I refuse to sit back and let Democrats destroy my children’s futures.** [**I need YOU to take action today and help send a Marine to Congress. Please, join my fight to take back our country from the socialist mob and their Woke Mob mentality.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=08de0b7f109246058792e7dac7d91418&_e=MNPqIRr0exTbpUIqAgMYcLBQJDa7IlI5SjpKUd90DTo438JMMtonv-0St-CxZY3_yGsQ9Nm8WPMDf3-qpA2ScGed46_rbkRf2Oo0JQK-SqxJ2wXwZn0dmN1nwfpVwa9Duw4H4HQyfR9lGiLaButBhc8q6YMYntPCb-ATmm3qiQ6HkpVssS0Lxx5Vp2Iu6msX-fObfrvo3RD4sFTuHRsUzFP6vLBkN_BLvivTbK93fxVaHPIkAquGy7osqt1hDSYqE0eMIPD6MzcJFg7UYqtByX2tSaxGGKZm35TJLJ6s4TgCfygrAzfoGbpBwZNrKPpfQJbK7srsNqKKmp8DKv8Oxm6dCqXJP8Tm-rlekpnr-y_pMttpKcgJsFhFepznmy_X)

Peter, NO ONE is coming to save us – it’s ordinary people like you and me who must come together and build the WINNING TEAM in order to Save America.

If we don’t take action today, life with freedom and liberty will be a way of the past. _Just look now, freedom is already being threatened._

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43920451/339290685/-2113420158?refcode=JP_EM_AW_3MO_20220407_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjM1MzAxMi01NmI3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qX82FPOwGFzjfy5e2EL0MZqx-3PuoTQ1oX3nrqtM_Ok=&emci=3c41d7d7-55b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=1f353012-56b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=6108787) | Peter —

Back in December, I shared with you the exciting news that I would be running for re-election in the newly formed 19th Congressional District of California. Due to the recent redistricting, the district now extends from San Jose to Santa Cruz County and down the Monterey coastline to northern San Luis Obispo County. However, with the new boundaries, we now have new voters. In fact, the new 19th has more than 50% new voters. I’ve been busy getting to know them and discussing the issues that matter most to them and their families. To keep up this outreach, I will need the resources to get out and about and meet those voters in the new parts of my district. That’s why your support is so crucial to my campaign!

On the campaign trail, I’ve made it a priority to meet with CAL FIRE, the U.S. Forest Service, as well as local fire chiefs and firefighters to discuss how we can respond to the constant threat of wildfires in California. Protecting our communities will always be a top priority for me, which is why I have championed legislation to invest in wildfire prevention, reforestation, resiliency and more forest service personnel. Meeting with local experts, visiting our local parks and talking about ecosystem preservation and restoration reaffirms the importance of remaining committed to protecting our environment for future generations. We must prioritize reversing the effects of climate change to support the health of our community, country, and planet.

I have authored and passed bills to ensure clean air, block oil drilling, cut critical carbon emissions, and invest in clean energy. I am also committed to ensuring everyone in our district has access to safe drinking water, and have helped to pass legislation to ensure that toxic runoff is not entering our groundwater, rivers, lakes, streams, bays, and beaches.

**Additionally, I’m proud to have authored legislation that was signed into law that will create nearly 49,000 jobs over the next ten years by improving forest management, investing in community firefighting resources and upgrading infrastructure to reduce the threat of wildfires.**

I’ve also recently visited community service centers, including Casa de Noche Buena in Seaside, the first homeless shelter specifically for women and families with children on the Monterey Peninsula. It provides a vital service to our community, and I was inspired by their work to advocate federal policies designed to tackle the housing crisis.

In the past three years, **I’ve secured over $100 million** in federal grants for local housing programs for veterans, low-income families, and the homeless. I have authored a law requiring the government to provide legal assistance to veterans who are homeless or at risk of becoming homeless, because we must never turn our backs on those who serve our country. I’ve also authored and supported legislation increasing federal tax credits for more low-income and middle-income housing. I will keep working hard so all Californians can afford a safe place to call home.

I’ve also met business leaders and workers to discuss how we can work together to promote job creation, better wages and training. I will continue pushing for robust federal investment in our local economy and infrastructure. Providing greater affordability and access to child care, Pre-K, and higher education are important goals. I will always fight for every member of our community to have the resources necessary to empower them toward success and prosperity. Lastly, I am committed to lowering the cost of prescription drugs and ensuring that drug companies are not ripping off Americans when it comes to being able to access critical prescriptions. About **two-thirds** of Americans use prescription drugs to manage various chronic health conditions, and I am committed to working in Congress to make sure that everyone in our country is able to access their medications to live a healthy life.

I am energized and inspired by your passion for our communities. Thank you for allowing me the opportunity to fight for our values in Congress and ensure that our government is working for everyone.

— Jimmy

April is Sexual Assault Awareness and Prevention Month, and recognizing the mental and physical devastation towards sexual assault survivors and honoring their dedication to eliminate sexual violence.
According to the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention [https://www.cdc.gov/injury/features/sexual-violence/index.html] , nearly 1 in 5 women in America experiences a rape or attempted rape, and nearly 33% of women and about 25% of men experience sexual violence with physical contact in their lifetime. These numbers are even more drastic against women of color and LGBTQIA+ people.
These assaults are insufferable to the core of our human rights. I am committed to uplifting survivors, hold assault perpetrators accountable, and dismantling political and social barriers that allow this sexual violence to continue in the United States.

Victoria Virasingh is the daughter of immigrants. She grew up housing insecure and watched her working parents struggle to pull their family out of poverty. But today, even those opportunities to work hard and live the American dream are becoming less and less attainable.
That's why Victoria is running for Congress in Virginia's 8th District -- to create equitable opportunities for those who have been left behind, to expand access for the store owner to the refugee, to support our struggling elders and students, and to lift up working families.
Victoria is a fearless progressive champion who will fight for bold policies to improve the daily lives of Virginians, and she's bringing the fresh new leadership that we need to move our state forward.

name: BREAKING via Team Ruiz
subject: Biden’s INCREDIBLE move to expand the Affordable Care Act…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
body:
| | |
---
Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, [please click here.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDC1zXjOgMKTq1qg9b7LMk8NY4biyiGBVJXIDelS7m60cKaXwQDfsi6wVlrlpGB5RcgfuIIHe6hd8iOGFvsd6XbH6bPGloasmPsNPOUCpYuDqjrfWXPulk7ACO8jglUSTg0WaxlCzay-NuMCKQTd37eoLsyUu93pm79jqnWh18e5aPLCC3Gntx_CnQwWb4yKD70vqMaHUb9AYAK-jwGcGMsdMw3y9VHHLgc8dmwEmVa_pkY7pds97Igffs8avnjaUvFXYXqP9v2_WORxgcl04ok_taxPls1tfdUaMY8vuaUp3qQKnuWonmZ3wvk4cI0CxWg/3l1/gK8iqeEIR0SAIzLdp7uF-w/h0/IkkVUKRnfuAkvDo-BYqYebprhGPewHxweLAAOSZOGMU) And if you have a moment, please read our message below.
| | **_USA Today:_ **With Obama’s Help, Biden announces proposed fix to the Affordable Care Act (ACA)****
---
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl_YSjhgyuK3ZZAsKvFTT31Y12ahl9kTL7JMhORKWyEZbFb9B61LhdOsjaUeE0Io-wMIlQy_0X8jlv9zI1-hi1mSOC2RhBSbB6afnpXwJO7Ew61V8v7TBwKivJ2ry-kIIJqb9Gb0qNbhFFuerWXugZacyfqwhw3UD046lLsFG_wsBwxLVI54WfVWIKVjGZDM9c4KtQ9HnKFCcUm6BX5GPkSB6Et5izg6py8ng4qS9zBbAyJXZ-6dWa9ANL-xaT1jgUo-od0mNb-mNDQoxiu5c6n0oZC7BK1R2lotASAIwRHE-7JLSo0y5jFbGi7nzKqPIIK0yD1WV2dnWv3TTGJOZGbMeaZX-eLkbBPjvRMUaNtXl-0iJXK339iCQiPLG6-G-U/3l1/gK8iqeEIR0SAIzLdp7uF-w/h1/hKN94H2d5m-vkZTwqa8i6SVIn0_Gv82Zn1aXB_xpAsU)
---
This fix will expand the ACA by closing the “family glitch” loophole that has prohibited more than 5 million people from accessing subsidized health plans.

Because of President Biden’s swift action, more Americans will become eligible for life-saving healthcare coverage. _That’s why we’re sending this card to thank President Biden for taking action to expand the ACA._

name: Team Benson
subject: Tomorrow
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
Friend,

In case you haven't heard, Jocelyn will officially be endorsed for a second term by the Michigan Democratic Party at its spring endorsement convention tomorrow . Jocelyn’s still working on her speech and we expect her to take the stage around 3pm.

Tomorrow’s endorsement marks the next phase of our campaign, team . In a few weeks, we’ll know who the other side is endorsing to be Jocelyn’s opponent (you can guess who it is since Donald Trump endorsed her earlier this year and doubled-down on his endorsement last Saturday!) That means by the end of April we are going to be in what amounts to a six-month sprint to Election Day.

Can you help us kick off this new phase of the campaign by pitching in before Jocelyn accepts her endorsement tomorrow? https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=040822

Let's do this.
-Team Benson

clean_body: Friend, In case you haven't heard, Jocelyn will officially be endorsed for a second term by the Michigan Democratic Party at its spring endorsement convention tomorrow . Jocelyn’s still working on her speech and we expect her to take the stage around 3pm. Tomorrow’s endorsement marks the next phase of our campaign, team . In a few weeks, we’ll know who the other side is endorsing to be Jocelyn’s opponent (you can guess who it is since Donald Trump endorsed her earlier this year and doubled-down on his endorsement last Saturday!) That means by the end of April we are going to be in what amounts to a six-month sprint to Election Day. Can you help us kick off this new phase of the campaign by pitching in before Jocelyn accepts her endorsement tomorrow? Let's do this. -Team Benson

body:
Sign Senator Johnson’s birthday card!

| [ ](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rhj_bday_card_nopen_3&n=1)

Friend -- **We wanted to make sure you saw that today is****Senator Ron Johnson’s birthday!** To celebrate, we are putting together a birthday card to help thank the Senator for fighting for our freedom in the U.S. Senate. [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDV8jkZfQM4jEnNO_zuEm5FpQXiMK51t9hgmZlVHfoq_CU&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rhj_bday_card_nopen_3&n=2)
[**Will you add your name to Senator Johnson’s birthday card?**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDV8jkZfQM4jEnNO_zuEm5FpQXiMK51t9hgmZlVHfoq_CU&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rhj_bday_card_nopen_3&n=3) We know that Senator Johnson’s constituents in Wisconsin are grateful for his independent leadership. **As one of his top supporters, Friend, we wanted to make sure you had the opportunity to send Senator Johnson a personal message to show your appreciation and help him celebrate.** We know that seeing your name would mean a lot, Friend. **We are finalizing the list at midnight tonight, so don’t miss your chance to add your name****here****!** Thanks, Anna Kelly Communications Director Republican Party of Wisconsin
[](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6myz1ydj26pS20sqllUBZd4&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rhj_bday_card_nopen_3&n=4) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8Tr24D9XbJYDft_QizpripYs&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rhj_bday_card_nopen_3&n=5) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y0VJVp2OCKNw8zDVmWeSo7yP6jlGmDIaYIm5b1oT1T4S&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rhj_bday_card_nopen_3&n=6) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rhj_bday_card_nopen_3&n=7)

name: Max Steiner
subject: The Republicans' war on women's reproductive rights
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43921212/339294542/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTFiM2IyNi01OWI3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MVfqeoPPozzZxC4ScNX-RIZNAKuqZ6J6wSJ2OmFqT-A=)
Friend, As we celebrate the nomination of Ketanji Jackson to the Supreme Court, we do so against the backdrop of a Republican-led crusade against women’s reproductive freedoms at the state level. Republicans in Texas started the assault by passing a near 90% ban on abortions and encouraged Texans to spy on one another to enforce it. This week in Oklahoma, Republicans criminalized all abortions and threatened women who receive one with ten years in prison. In Missouri, they want to prosecute women who travel out of state for an abortion -- functionally treating their wombs as property of the state. Gutting choice has been a long-term GOP objective, but it has picked up steam after the far-right packed the Supreme Court with its Federalist Society lackeys. Needless to say, Jackson’s nomination is a welcome sight -- despite the fact that progressive-leaning justices are still in the minority.

**As a Roman Catholic, I think abortion is wrong. But I recognize that even as my religion shapes my moral beliefs, I do not want to live in a country with religious laws. Our secular state is built on respecting the rights and beliefs of others -- not on imposing religious views on the rest of the country.**

[**Today we celebrate Judge Jackson's nomination, but we cannot stop fighting for control of Congress so we can protect the rights of all Americans. For us, that means stepping up against right-wing extremists like Doug LaMalfa in CA-01. clean_body: | = Friend, As we celebrate the nomination of Ketanji Jackson to the Supreme Court, we do so against the backdrop of a Republican-led crusade against women’s reproductive freedoms at the state level. Republicans in Texas started the assault by passing a near 90% ban on abortions and encouraged Texans to spy on one another to enforce it. This week in Oklahoma, Republicans criminalized all abortions and threatened women who receive one with ten years in prison. In Missouri, they want to prosecute women who travel out of state for an abortion -- functionally treating their wombs as property of the state. Gutting choice has been a long-term GOP objective, but it has picked up steam after the far-right packed the Supreme Court with its Federalist Society lackeys. Needless to say, Jackson’s nomination is a welcome sight -- despite the fact that progressive-leaning justices are still in the minority. As a Roman Catholic, I think abortion is wrong. But I recognize that even as my religion shapes my moral beliefs, I do not want to live in a country with religious laws. Our secular state is built on respecting the rights and beliefs of others -- not on imposing religious views on the rest of the country. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for your support, Max Steiner Combat Veteran and Democrat for Congress | = Max Steiner is a combat veteran, foreign service officer, and Democrat running to flip California's 1st District from red to blue. Donald J. Trump April 7th, 2022
This is just a continuation of the greatest Witch Hunt of all time, by a failed Attorney General, who continues to use her office for political gain following a disastrous and embarrassing attempt to run for Governor, in which she only received a 3% approval rating, and was forced to drop out of the race by her own party, in disgrace. This Democrat prosecutorial misconduct began the second I came down the escalator in Trump Tower, and has continued in an attempt to silence a President who is leading in every single poll. Never before has this happened to another President, and it is an absolute violation of my civil rights. As President I had two jobs—to run our Country well, and to survive. I've been investigated by the Democrats more than Billy the Kid, Jesse James, and Al Capone, combined. This has been going on for years, and in all cases, I have been innocent. After having survived so many investigations, numerous people have said to me, “You must be the cleanest person alive. Nobody else could have survived this.” But how do I get my reputation back as this unfair persecution endlessly continues?

Letitia James is no longer working as Attorney General, she is an operative for the Democrat Party in a political prosecution. New York has been through hell, and she is an embarrassment to our legal system. James uses her office for political gain, while New York crime is up over 50 percent, a bigger increase than any other place in the Nation. Much of it is violent crime—murder, rape, and drug trafficking (which is at the highest level ever).

When will the Witch Hunt against a popular former President, who had our Country Energy Independent, with no Inflation, a strong Southern Border, and no Wars (such as that which is now raging uncontrollably in Ukraine), who rebuilt our Military (including Space Force), cut Taxes, Regulations, and so much more, ever end. When will horrible and unfair political harassment and persecution in our Country finally be over. Instead, MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!

Trump April 7th, 2022 This is just a continuation of the greatest Witch Hunt of all time, by a failed Attorney General, who continues to use her office for political gain following a disastrous and embarrassing attempt to run for Governor, in which she only received a 3% approval rating, and was forced to drop out of the race by her own party, in disgrace. This Democrat prosecutorial misconduct began the second I came down the escalator in Trump Tower, and has continued in an attempt to silence a President who is leading in every single poll. Never before has this happened to another President, and it is an absolute violation of my civil rights. As President I had two jobs—to run our Country well, and to survive. I've been investigated by the Democrats more than Billy the Kid, Jesse James, and Al Capone, combined. This has been going on for years, and in all cases, I have been innocent. After having survived so many investigations, numerous people have said to me, “You must be the cleanest person alive. Nobody else could have survived this.” But how do I get my reputation back as this unfair persecution endlessly continues? Letitia James is no longer working as Attorney General, she is an operative for the Democrat Party in a political prosecution. New York has been through hell, and she is an embarrassment to our legal system. James uses her office for political gain, while New York crime is up over 50 percent, a bigger increase than any other place in the Nation. Much of it is violent crime—murder, rape, and drug trafficking (which is at the highest level ever). When will the Witch Hunt against a popular former President, who had our Country Energy Independent, with no Inflation, a strong Southern Border, and no Wars (such as that which is now raging uncontrollably in Ukraine), who rebuilt our Military (including Space Force), cut Taxes, Regulations, and so much more, ever end. When will horrible and unfair political harassment and persecution in our Country finally be over. Instead, MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! | ---|--- Donald J. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Nida Allam, Robert Garcia, Donna Edwards, Summer Lee, and Delia Ramirez
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Today, I’m excited to announce my first slate of congressional endorsements for the 2022 midterm election cycle.
#
Peter,
Today, I’m excited to announce my first slate of congressional endorsements for the 2022 midterm election cycle.
As we head into one of the most consequential midterm elections ever, and Democrats prepare to make their case to the American people on why we deserve to retain our majorities in Congress, it’s important that we have strong progressives who are unafraid to stand up to corporate greed and fight hard on behalf of the people. **I’m so proud to endorse:**
* Nida Allam, running for NC-04;
* Robert Garcia, running for CA-42;
* Donna Edwards, running for MD-04;
* Summer Lee, running for PA-12;
* Delia Ramirez, running for IL-03.

Peter, what we’re able to accomplish in the next two years depends on growing our progressive coalition in Congress. [**Will you rush a contribution of $3 or any amount today to help us elect these people-first leaders so we can hold our Democratic majority in the House and expand our movement for progress?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/11907?refcode=em20220408-1169&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=1169%2E420207%2EAa8NDm)
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/11907?refcode=em20220408-1169&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=1169%2E420207%2EAa8NDm)
**[Contribute $3 »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/11907?refcode=em20220408-1169&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=1169%2E420207%2EAa8NDm)**
Nida, Robert, Donna, Summer, and Delia represent the best of what we have to offer. They are activists, organizers, and bold champions for the progressive agenda — and they will fight hard for climate action, Medicare for All, and a fair minimum wage.
These candidates are currently running in open and/or newly drawn congressional seats. [**Their races are winnable — but only if we do our part.****Can you contribute $3 or any amount to help us send Nida, Robert, Donna, Summer, and Delia to Congress?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/11907?refcode=em20220408-1169&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=1169%2E420207%2EAa8NDm)
Thank you in advance for supporting our efforts to elect these bold progressives. Together, we will grow this movement — _and we will win._
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220408-1169-footer&t=23&refcode2=1169_420207_Aa8NDm&akid=1169%2E420207%2EAa8NDm)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
