name: Sarah Palin
subject: Major Announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Alaska
body:
America is at a tipping point. | Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zafc774gqmfkvbb0cpfcvgr4cbo6qv5tojr1rvao_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqm1opksep32t9gc3ir6dtmmeo6epbhc9ibaclkmoqjcpbj6tgrao36m2rb4dj0sv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66libacj7m8omctj76moefc5lclp238h1e8he4933c5ie2ob4s3gm8oh5u)
America is at a tipping point. | Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.
Friend,

**Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.**

I first entered politics 30 years ago, when I was elected to city council in Wasilla. I still live in Wasilla; my family is here; my son goes to school here. My heart will ALWAYS be in Alaska, even when I’m representing you in Washington, D.C.

America is at a tipping point. As I’ve watched the far left destroy our country, I knew I had to step up and join the fight. And now I’m asking you to do the exact same thing.

I can’t do this without your support.

That’s why for a short time, when you make your next contribution of ANY AMOUNT, you’ll automatically cement your name as an **Official Founding Supporter**.

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW TO BECOME AN OFFICIAL FOUNDING SUPPORTER.>>](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9hd9m80q02iesbjq3u2bd797rk1duubl01knom8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s5gm9o71chh2bs)**

This is your chance to go down in history. YOU are the reason I’m running, and YOU will be the reason we win.

_**[Please contribute $35 by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to join the fight and mark your status as an Official Founding Supporter.>>](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgcads3vqm0oakriorb977gs6j83rb35un9jgom0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s5gm9o71chh2bs)**_

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqgidebdbld7n150sk29chnpbkvdts42c1ivm488_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s5gm9o71chh2bs)

At this critical time in our nation’s history, we need leaders who will combat the left’s socialist, big-government, America-last agenda.

This country was built by heroes, and the radical left dishonors their legacies by opening our borders to illegal immigrants, mortgaging our children’s future, and selling out our nation’s interest to the highest bidder.

I’m in this race to win it and join the fight for freedom alongside other patriots willing to sacrifice all to save our country.

I just have one simple question for you:

**WILL YOU JOIN ME?**

**[Please contribute $35 by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to join the fight and mark your status as an Official Founding Supporter.>>](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0adi2refqpt6nnauttf0re8o73huret54tjjong_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s5gm9o71chh2bs)**

Thank you & God Bless America.

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zs3cstkaal12m2e4kr7b7bm4a91ch9rd0mroptc8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s5gm9o71chh2bs)
Sarah Palin

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW>>](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ze2p19mjklm6719d82rpc4d02nn6m06p9l2k96t8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s5gm9o71chh2bs)**

---
| Paid for by Sarah for Alaska. |

P.O. BOX 871235 WASILLA, AK 99687

It’s more than 10 TIMES the number of signatures our likely Republican opponent, Tom Kean, Jr., collected.

This is a big deal — and whether it was signing Tom’s petition, helping collect signatures from friends and neighbors, stepping up to volunteer or donating to support our efforts, you’re helping build a campaign with winning grassroots momentum. name: =?UTF-8?Q?=F0=9F=94=B8Left_Action_Petition_Alert?=
subject: Investigate Louis DeJoy (sign immediately)
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Sign the petition: The DOJ and USPS Inspector General must immediately investigate Louis DeJoy for his conflict of interest >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0dadeced-147a-4403-8fae-91a08c72a28e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc4cf395c-c0f8-43fe-a0fb-a563f71759e4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Trump’s hand-picked Postmaster General is still doing damage to one of our most beloved institutions – he’s got to go. But even though Louis DeJoy’s previous conflict-of-interest scandals weren’t enough to oust him, **this time he likely broke federal law!** DeJoy decided to personally profit from the U.S. Postal Service’s distribution of free COVID tests to households across the country. While he was closely involved in the planning of logistics to distribute the tests, which were supplied by a few companies, DeJoy owned stock in one of the companies and did not divest the stock. He traded this stock while the program was being planned and implemented. **DeJoy may have violated a federal conflict-of-interest law by failing to relinquish his Abbott stock._[He must be investigated by the DOJ and the USPS Inspector General.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4a21bf90-7b4a-416a-bcff-e8e5201afbb6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _** Let’s not forget – Louis DeJoy was responsible for severe cuts that delayed mail delivery ahead of the November 2020 election, undermining confidence in vote-by-mail and attempting to help Trump steal the election. If that wasn’t enough to oust him on the spot, breaking federal law might be the last straw. [Sign the petition: The DOJ and USPS Inspector General must immediately investigate Louis DeJoy for his conflict of interest >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb6a65f92-af9e-476c-a57d-7f1dd458b85d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rachel=20Tripp?=
subject: Lawrence County Commissioner Morgan Boyd endorses Bill McSwain for Governor
body:
Bill McSwain announced on Friday that he has received the endorsement of Lawrence County Commissioner Morgan Boyd | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/billmcswain/sean-parnell-endorses-bill-mcswain-for-governor-8868284?e=b1ec95759b)
---
| |
---
| **PRESS RELEASE
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
---
**April 8, 2022
CONTACT: Rachel Tripp
202.738.9089**
---
| |
# Lawrence County Commissioner Morgan Boyd endorses Bill McSwain for Governor
**West Chester, Pa.** **\-- **Bill McSwain, Republican candidate for Governor, today announced that he has received the endorsement of Lawrence County Commissioner Morgan Boyd.

McSwain had this to say about the endorsement:
---
|
> **_"I am grateful to receive the endorsement of Lawrence County Commissioner Morgan Boyd, who has been a driver of economic development, a defender of taxpayers, and an advocate for conservative ideals as Commissioner. Together, we will work towards a thriving economy, safe neighborhoods, and school choice for Lawrence and all 67 counties." _**
---
| Boyd praised McSwain as the candidate who will restore economic prosperity and defend individual liberty as Governor:
---
|
> **_"It is time to elect a conservative leader as Governor who will stand up for the families of Pennsylvania and put an end to the frivolous spending of career politicians in Harrisburg. Bill McSwain will be that Governor. As U.S. Attorney, Bill stood up in defense of economic freedom and the individual liberties of Pennsylvanians. As Governor, I know that he will protect against unlawful incursions on liberty and restore prosperity to the Commonwealth. I am proud to endorse Bill McSwain for Governor." _**
---
|
---
| **BACKGROUND: **
Appointed by President Trump, McSwain's record as U.S. Attorney demonstrates his fierce defense of constitutional rights, dedication to upholding law and order, and history of putting criminals and corrupt politicians in jail. Prior to becoming an attorney, Bill served as a scout/sniper platoon commander in the U.S. Marine Corps. He was born in Philadelphia and raised in Chester County, where he lives today with his wife, Stephanie, and their four children. More information on McSwain's background and platform is available [here.](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=d84e931ebc&e=b1ec95759b)
###

---

We have a number of events coming up, including a debate tomorrow, and I’m grateful to each of you for standing with us on this journey. [**If you haven’t already contributed, every dollar is being put to work to reach Georgia voters, and I’d be honored to have your support.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/60d33a92af94c9ac/c0208bb68bc47cb8c3d6b838967d376c/37793)

# **_Appalachian Gun Range_**
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/60d33a92af94c9ac/6fac20b151afcc69c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Had a great day in Jasper earlier this week at the Appalachian Gun Range! I’m proud Georgia has passed a Constitutional Carry bill, and when I’m in the U.S. Senate, there will be no stronger champion for our Constitutional rights than me. Thanks for having me, and thank you to our Pickens County Team ’22 for all that you’re doing!
---
---
# **_The Road to November_**
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/60d33a92af94c9ac/aa64ddd48c6d97d1c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
This week, I joined Russ Spencer on Fox 5’s Road to November series to talk about our campaign, the issues facing our state and country, and why I have the trusted experience it’s going to take to change direction in the U.S. Senate. **[You can watch the full conversation here.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/60d33a92af94c9ac/d656f29cbcd245aac3d6b838967d376c/37793)**
---
---
# **_24 Points_**
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/60d33a92af94c9ac/1f7f66575ef83b64c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
The more Georgia Republican voters learn about and hear from Herschel Walker, the fewer supporters he has. It’s as simple as that. He’s down 24 points in the polls since January — and our support has doubled.
---
---
# **_Join us on our Statewide Tour!_**
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/60d33a92af94c9ac/4c2601da6e876f69c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Georgia is a B.I.G. state, and we’re going to hit every corner of it in the days and weeks ahead. I hope you’ll join us at one or more of these tour stops, bring 22 of your friends, and ensure we continue building our momentum towards taking this seat back in November!
---
---
# **_One More Thing_**
---
Please follow our campaign's [**Facebook**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/60d33a92af94c9ac/af07a35b0e56687ec3d6b838967d376c/37793) , **[Twitter](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/60d33a92af94c9ac/4ea5eb600c4de367c3d6b838967d376c/37793)** , and [**Instagram**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/60d33a92af94c9ac/897c6d83395aa4dac3d6b838967d376c/37793) pages if you aren't already, and make sure 10 of your friends are too! Absentee ballots are in the mail and early voting begins in less than a month. **[Our need for resources to reach voters has never been greater — if you haven't already contributed, I'd be honored if you did so right now.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/60d33a92af94c9ac/ad231e5ae9cce2fdc3d6b838967d376c/37793)** Thank you again for your friendship, prayers, and support!
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/60d33a92af94c9ac/09f289c7bb94a1e2c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Gary Black
---
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/60d33a92af94c9ac/e310c7bdfcec30c1c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
| | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/60d33a92af94c9ac/ce3ce0704ff6006dc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why.
Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $23 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts.
With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate here or below.
---
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/60d33a92af94c9ac/273663801eaa62afc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference. However, if you'd like to receive fewer emails or unsubscribe, [click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go.cfm?a=1&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=60d33a92af94c9ac&d=14f019ad773c7188c3d6b838967d376c&u=http://ci.criticalimpact.com/procenter/procenter.cfm?action=profile&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=60d33a92af94c9ac).

subject: Out-organize, out-work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter,

Earlier this week, we shared with you that Rand Paul has raised a record
amount of money in an attempt to stop our movement. And no surprise, 75%
of his campaign money comes from corporate money, rich people, and big
business.

It’s clear that Rand Paul sees us as a threat, and that his wealthy donors
will spare no expense in order to try to keep Charles and our movement out
of the U.S. Senate.

But while Rand Paul may have corporate donors, we have something
better, Peter —
you.

We are running a people powered campaign to take back Kentucky. And
together, we are going to prove that dark money is no match for our
movement.

We just need to keep our fundraising strong and continue to hit our goals
so we can keep organizing. That’s where you come in,
Peter.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220408?refcode=em20220408-1739&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&refcode2=1739_346206_lVr7tM&akid=1739%2E346206%2ElVr7tM ]Can we count on you to chip in $5 today? We’re racing
to hit $10,000 today to power our campaign. Unlike Rand Paul, this
movement isn’t powered by special interests, fossil fuel CEOS, or Big
Pharma.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220408?refcode=em20220408-1739&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&refcode2=1739_346206_lVr7tM&akid=1739%2E346206%2ElVr7tM ]Contribute $5

Our campaign is gaining a significant amount of momentum every single day
because voters are tired of Rand's antics.

We’re sick and tired of having Rand Paul represent us and do absolutely
nothing to help our State.

We know that change in Kentucky is possible. But that starts by building
relationships with Kentuckians who’ve been left behind and making sure
that we have the resources to do it early and right — to come together and
fight for the future we deserve.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220408?refcode=em20220408-1739&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&refcode2=1739_346206_lVr7tM&akid=1739%2E346206%2ElVr7tM ]Peter, we
can beat Rand Paul and decide the Senate this year — and we don’t need
millions from dark money interests to do it. All we need is support from
people like you so we can out-organize and out-work Rand Paul all across
Kentucky. Will you support us by donating any amount today?

There is absolutely nothing they can do to stop us when we work together.

More soon,

Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220408-1739-footer&t=1023&refcode2=1739_346206_lVr7tM&akid=1739%2E346206%2ElVr7tM

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1739%2E346206%2ElVr7tM

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

body:
We’re just five and a half weeks out from Election Day, and we are pulling out all the stops to ensure Valerie wins on May 17th.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43930712/339338221/1955816004?refcode=BLU-VFC-20220408-EM-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmI1OTAwOC03ZWI3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_wLhsY_9kAYJaSsswVtTYgSmgwl9Dzd8tuzgWhLqinw=)
---
| Peter,

We’re just five and a half weeks out from Election Day, and we are pulling out all the stops to ensure Valerie wins on May 17th.

On that front: We have some extremely exciting news. We officially have Valerie Foushee for Congress yard signs, so you can show your support!

But, we still need to raise $8,000 to cover the rest of the invoice. Already a delegate or don’t qualify to be an add-on? You can still help out — forward this information to someone you know who would be interested and let them know they still have a chance to apply.
We can show the grassroots power behind this campaign by turning out in full force at the Convention in June. That’s why it’s critical that as many members of Team Sonia apply to be add-ons as possible.

body:
With your support, 16 of our 17 educators won their elections to school boards in Wisconsin | [ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43921866/339297888/-1924590982?refcode=em_20220408wisbwins_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1NzI0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJkYWI5MDM3LTVkYjctZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WTZp8frCTyhi63uPG_6ZjsIdqUu68WiL6AT_PZVBFIY=)
---
Educators and Allies With your support, 16 of our 17 educators won their elections to school boards in Wisconsin this week! **Thanks to the entire Elect Educators Everywhere network of teachers, education professionals, parents, students, and supporters of public schools, 94% of our candidates won! ** When wealthy right-wingers tried to buy the elections for anti-public school candidates, you stepped up to help our public school champions. When book banners and anti-equality extremists promised to undermine curriculum and set students back decades, you took action to help educators who are committed to honest and accurate history. When hateful bigots promised to remove anti-harassment policies and bully transgender kids, you make sure voters knew who would make school a safe place for all students. And when a small group of conspiracy theorists tried to divide us, and pit parents against teachers, you made sure voters remembered that we do our best for the kids when parents and educators work together. ******The elections in Wisconsin prove that when we work together and help educators running for office, we can win! ** In the end, 15 of these 17 educators won or lost by less than 5%, and 4 candidates won by less than 1%. Every bit of support, from the smallest donation to the most active volunteer, helped make a difference.
* In Beloit, Megan Miller and Gregg Schneider won by just 123 votes and 64 votes, both margins were less than 1%.
* In Chippewa Falls and Sparta, Sherry Jasper and John Hendricks came in 1st place in extremely tight elections, where she was just 326 votes from being defeated and he was just 358 from losing.
* Even in our one defeat, educator Meredith Sauer was just 0.9% away from winning re-election.

These results are a great start to the 2022 elections, but we can't stop now. There are tens of thousands more school board elections on the ballot this year, and it's up to us to help elect education champions coast to coast. With gratitude, exhaustion, and excitement for what we can do together,
The whole team at Elect Educators Everywhere P.S. Here's one quick, free, and easy thing you can do to help today: forward this message to 3 friends who care about our schools and America's kids. Give them some good news, and **[offer them to chance to sign-up, learn about impressive candidates, and know how they can help when they are so inspired. ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43921868/339297890/879378091?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1NzI0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJkYWI5MDM3LTVkYjctZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WTZp8frCTyhi63uPG_6ZjsIdqUu68WiL6AT_PZVBFIY=&emci=5bebea1a-51b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=bdab9037-5db7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=10310093)**
---

college faculty, and all types of public educators to office from coast to coast. With your help, we can ensure that educators have a seat at the table when it comes to making policy decisions in this country.

Hi Team,

Our state is at a really critical moment. We can choose to keep moving forward on reproductive rights, gun violence prevention and protecting our environment, or we can risk losing it all and go backward.

We are only 39 days away from the May primary election. That means it's time to hit the ground running to get out the vote for Tina.

Here's the truth: the November election is going to be **_tough_** , and that means we need to send Tina into the general election strong so that she can **keep fighting for us.**

We're holding a **day of action this Saturday, April 9th** to get out the vote for Tina - can you join us?

We'll have the opportunity to knock on doors in Portland, Bend, Eugene and Salem, or you can help us call voters from your couch!

This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. We know that if we come together to mobilize for action, we will be unstoppable.

Last week was a doozy for GOP extremism here in CO-08, Peter. Two candidates for the Republican nomination, Lori Saine and Tyler Allcorn, both said the Department of Education should be abolished. Not downsized — _abolished_. Then, the same two candidates proclaimed their support for English-only ballots, despite the fact that this district (the one they supposedly want to represent) has _the largest Latino population of any district in the state._ Finally, when asked about DACA (the program that protects children of immigrants from threat of deportation), Saine pivoted to, of course, “Build the Wall.” **This kind of extreme rhetoric has no place here in the 8th District, and it _definitely_ has no place in Congress. [Can you chip in today to help us ensure we have the resources to fight back?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43922274/339299620/-679993507?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220408gophits_tc_allop_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTAyNDk3NS01ZGI3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tNHi2Dnj5ELTRv-hfjx80U3vMZRknN6eB6puu9IE8Jo=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Making matters even worse, Saine is gaining traction: She secured her spot on the primary ballot with more than 70% of the vote at this week’s Congressional District 8 Republican Assembly.
Now, let’s be clear about one thing: Primary voters, and Republican primary voters in particular, are always much more extreme than the general voting public.
**But the fact that Saine is quickly locking up support on an anti-public education, anti-democratic, anti-immigrant platform should be a giant flashing red warning sign for us all.** And we haven’t even had time to get into her anti-vaccine or anti-choice stances in this email!
It’s on us to prove that Colorado’s 8th District is much, much better than this. clean_body: | = Last week was a doozy for GOP extremism here in CO-08, Peter. Two candidates for the Republican nomination, Lori Saine and Tyler Allcorn, both said the Department of Education should be abolished. Not downsized — abolished. Then, the same two candidates proclaimed their support for English-only ballots, despite the fact that this district (the one they supposedly want to represent) has the largest Latino population of any district in the state. Finally, when asked about DACA (the program that protects children of immigrants from threat of deportation), Saine pivoted to, of course, “Build the Wall.” This kind of extreme rhetoric has no place here in the 8th District, and it definitely has no place in Congress. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Making matters even worse, Saine is gaining traction: She secured her spot on the primary ballot with more than 70% of the vote at this week’s Congressional District 8 Republican Assembly. Now, let’s be clear about one thing: Primary voters, and Republican primary voters in particular, are always much more extreme than the general voting public. But the fact that Saine is quickly locking up support on an anti-public education, anti-democratic, anti-immigrant platform should be a giant flashing red warning sign for us all. And we haven’t even had time to get into her anti-vaccine or anti-choice stances in this email! It’s on us to prove that Colorado’s 8th District is much, much better than this. = = Thanks, Team Caraveo | Yadira Caraveo is a pediatrician, state representative, and daughter of immigrants. Her parents raised her and her siblings on her father’s construction worker’s salary in Adams County. In the legislature, Dr. Caraveo has delivered for working Coloradans by standing up to the biggest corporate bullies and entrenched special interests. Now, Dr. Caraveo is running for Congress to stand up for hard-working families she sees falling through the cracks. Dr. Caraveo would be the first Latina to represent Colorado in Congress and the only physician in Colorado’s congressional delegation. = | = | PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS Caraveo for Congress PO Box 953 Eastlake, CO 80614 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

clean_body: I will always stand for law and order. | Friend, Tony Evers is arrogant enough to believe that you’ve forgotten how he sided with rioters over our law enforcement officers while the city of Kenosha BURNED. And now, he’s once again prioritizing criminals... [Source: Madison.com] With each passing day, Tony Evers has made our streets less safe. While he continues to favor lawlessness, I will always choose YOU by standing up for law and order and having the backs of our police. It’s truly disturbing that Tony Evers isn’t concerned in the slightest about violating a parent’s right to have a say in their child’s education, but is deeply concerned about establishing mandatory minimum sentences for criminals breaking the law. His decision to veto this bill is a direct affront to every law-abiding Wisconsinite who watched as he did NOTHING while rioters set an entire city ablaze. But we all have a choice to make... We can sit idly by like Evers and watch as he continues to destroy our state, or we can fight tooth and nail to win this toss-up governor’s race. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor Paid for by People for Rebecca. PO Box 628284, Middleton, WI 53562

clean_body: I am proud to share our first Chicago Alderman endorsement | | | Dear Team, I am excited to share that today Chicago Alderman Byron Sigcho-Lopez endorsed my campaign for congress. This endorsement signals a key turning point in our race as Ald. Sigcho-Lopez is the first Chicago Alderperson to announce their support for our campaign against a Chicago Machine incumbent this cycle. Our campaign is picking up endorsements and field momentum every day. Our biggest obstacle now is the thousands of dollars in corporate money stacking up against us. Alderman Sigcho-Lopez is a true advocate for working class Chicagoans. He deeply understands the needs of the 25th Ward and he knows that if we’re going to fix them, we must strike at the root causes and invest in our communities. The 25th Ward holds key neighborhoods and areas within IL-7, including parts of Greektown, East Pilsen, West Loop, South Loop, ABLA Homes, and Chinatown. I look forward to joining him in his tireless work for the people of the 25th Ward and the people across IL-7. With the start of early voting less than 50 days away, our momentum continues to grow, and we need your help to keep it going. In solidarity, Kina Collins | To give by check: Kina Collins for Congress 901 Lake Street, Unit 4093 Oak Park, IL 60301

You are receiving this email because we believe you may be interested in Bonnie’s important work. [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/b8d01e4a-6e8f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a/db1d677f-5eb7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjFkNjc3Zi01ZWI3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CIksRLAQIyRymC-wh0F7O2yJEUSVNH8Wg88a5F-5Uqw=&id=133755742)

Friend,

My name is Bonnie Watson Coleman, and I’m a champion for progressive values in the House of Representatives.

Our democracy is fragile right now. Republican obstructionists are trying to curtail the right to vote, reproductive rights are under attack, and the climate crisis can only be stopped through bold, direct action.

**This moment can only be met through strong Democratic leadership, which is why I’m committed to holding the House for Democrats in this year’s midterm elections.**

[Can I count on you to join my team and help me in my fight to hold the House?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43922831/339302025/1610642592?refcode=BWC_EM_WL_NTL_20220216_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjFkNjc3Zi01ZWI3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CIksRLAQIyRymC-wh0F7O2yJEUSVNH8Wg88a5F-5Uqw=&emci=b8d01e4a-6e8f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=db1d677f-5eb7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=30096098) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43922835/339302037/1610642592?refcode=BWC_EM_WL_NTL_20220216_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjFkNjc3Zi01ZWI3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CIksRLAQIyRymC-wh0F7O2yJEUSVNH8Wg88a5F-5Uqw=&emci=b8d01e4a-6e8f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=db1d677f-5eb7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=30096098) No matter what, I will stand up to obstructionists who seek to block progressive causes and spread both gridlock and animosity. I’ve never backed down from a fight, and I don’t plan to start now.

I hope you’ll join me on this journey and stand alongside me as we work towards a better future for all.

Your friend in this fight,

Bonnie
---
* * *

---
Bonnie Watson Coleman represents New Jersey's 12th district in Congress. She is a strong fighter for progressive values and has dedicated herself to the service of her community.

Peter,

I enlisted in the military eleven years ago – served nine years on active duty, and four overseas tours in the elite Marine Special Operations Forces unit known as the Marine Raiders.

Needless to say, I know when it’s time to take action.

What we’re seeing Democrats do in Washington is devastating – opening our borders, suppressing American energy, indoctrinating children, and weakening America’s view on the world stage.

_It’s disgusting –**and it’s time to take action.**_

Which leads me to why I’m reaching out to you today, Peter - ACTION IS NEEDED. I refuse to sit on the sidelines and watch the Democrats destroy the country that I’ve dedicated my life to protecting. **I refuse to sit back and let Democrats destroy my children’s futures.** [**I need YOU to take action today and help send a Marine to Congress. Please, join my fight to take back our country from the socialist mob and their Woke Mob mentality.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=5b6112aa79444aecbb33df133689ef38&_e=qo9MzcK8o44v-_gJdcZfdlDDkeZtKw0yE4evzuumUpFpn7y7_ZHaI0nlcpeONmRAZPWVTUTazLSRDjl93yfxN_BinaIIet5TR2q52IkwF6wlepwFNhA71POnd6ifCkByHZx9FzNIuH5B0G255QG1bAuvMYKOaJwc-B1ksNQlWkLy5dyZlNoMW97J88g-wPusZZeY98VXAraqfGABVJqIqwJGieA4lSW_nJDEUoKN8MufIZI_5mBvI4-l_5ljVJtUwm9OPTxdUNhiIKNuYcALhJ85WBCmPZrIsT4LUUxruMHMry0NpFMND2akm7tEB6DvpK4eQcSQptPh2RE_v7-XgmM4L8X_-cUUehpkL6y7BsOK8itxzbq1C_EClHsA9vCAKxXtX312Tj9JXeYPXy6tGw%3D%3D)

Peter, NO ONE is coming to save us – it’s ordinary people like you and me who must come together and build the WINNING TEAM in order to Save America.

If we don’t take action today, life with freedom and liberty will be a way of the past. _Just look now, freedom is already being threatened._

I promise you that watching Democrats dismantle freedom is not what we fought for as marines.

[**Will you take the first action towards protecting our country, and our future with a donation to my campaign today?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=5b6112aa79444aecbb33df133689ef38&_e=qo9MzcK8o44v-_gJdcZfdlDDkeZtKw0yE4evzuumUpFpn7y7_ZHaI0nlcpeONmRAZPWVTUTazLSRDjl93yfxN_BinaIIet5TR2q52IkwF6wlepwFNhA71POnd6ifCkByHZx9FzNIuH5B0G255QG1bAuvMYKOaJwc-B1ksNQlWkLy5dyZlNoMW97J88g-wPus1VYiSMVG4A9VXVT8c2cT5nC6eQIr-CLt-2XoEXmZaY3XXjftsvONF7Y1jXsokSSGW1ziEsk_Ng2_I6XM5ZywtN5oIV3zjZLfrp_rvkK6Tbas53kd6vfsksNPfjn1XIWgSuwu0p4aFgSmstj-3AFbeTeh8_z4_dXj5nTcZX8a3_WCJRZOv9a8M70t6nvtxf7QsrThy3mg1JzrEUBuwpMc-g%3D%3D)

subject: Protect abortion access >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
body:
All across the country, Republican-led states are imposing regressive bans on abortions that actively endanger the safety and wellbeing of women.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43931574/339341553/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220408-b1_pet_full-MS_S2_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220408-b1_pet_full-MS_S2_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220408&&&&utm_content=b1_pet_full&&&&utm_term=MS_S2_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=4d8a9a3f-80b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDhhOWEzZi04MGI3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DSN42IGm_O0Zlh6_in7MO0UG--G9sjCv1pb5DmCXrrE=)
---
| Peter, all across the country, **Republican-led states are imposing regressive bans on abortions that actively endanger the safety and wellbeing of women.** In Florida, they passed a 15-week ban on abortions. In Texas, anyone who assists a woman in getting an abortion after six weeks can be sued. This week in Oklahoma, they passed a bill making it illegal to perform abortions. **These legislative proposals are more than abhorrent, they are clear attempts to restrict women’s rights.** Women deserve bodily autonomy and the right to choose what’s best for them and their families — but if Republicans get their way, women would lose the right to govern their own bodies. **We can’t allow this to happen, and we have to fight back._[Will you join me in standing up to protect abortion access here in Maryland?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43931575/339341554/-768071395?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDhhOWEzZi04MGI3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DSN42IGm_O0Zlh6_in7MO0UG--G9sjCv1pb5DmCXrrE=&emci=ab9e89c5-7db7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=4d8a9a3f-80b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=24635484)_**
---
| [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43931576/339341555/-768071395?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDhhOWEzZi04MGI3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DSN42IGm_O0Zlh6_in7MO0UG--G9sjCv1pb5DmCXrrE=&emci=ab9e89c5-7db7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=4d8a9a3f-80b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=24635484)
---
I’ve dedicated my life to working towards achieving equal rights for women here in Maryland and across the country — through my law career, at Planned Parenthood, and at the Women’s Law Center — and I know that women’s economic security and equality depend on the right to bodily autonomy. Right now, we have to stand up for those rights and defend access to reproductive care. **So will you join me in fighting to protect abortion rights today?** | | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43931577/339341556/-768071395?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDhhOWEzZi04MGI3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DSN42IGm_O0Zlh6_in7MO0UG--G9sjCv1pb5DmCXrrE=&emci=ab9e89c5-7db7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=4d8a9a3f-80b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=24635484)
---
Here in Maryland, the General Assembly just passed a bill that expands access to abortion and eliminates out-of-pocket costs to patients under most insurance — but it needs the governor’s signature in order to become a reality.Let Maryland be an example to the rest of the country on how to support a woman's right to reproductive freedom: _**[Peter, can you join us in asking Governor Hogan to sign the Abortion Care Access Act into law?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43931578/339341557/-768071395?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDhhOWEzZi04MGI3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DSN42IGm_O0Zlh6_in7MO0UG--G9sjCv1pb5DmCXrrE=&emci=ab9e89c5-7db7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=4d8a9a3f-80b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=24635484)**_
Thank you,
Michelle Siri

clean_body: All across the country, Republican-led states are imposing regressive bans on abortions that actively endanger the safety and wellbeing of women. | = | Peter, all across the country, Republican-led states are imposing regressive bans on abortions that actively endanger the safety and wellbeing of women. In Florida, they passed a 15-week ban on abortions. In Texas, anyone who assists a woman in getting an abortion after six weeks can be sued. This week in Oklahoma, they passed a bill making it illegal to perform abortions. These legislative proposals are more than abhorrent, they are clear attempts to restrict women’s rights. Women deserve bodily autonomy and the right to choose what’s best for them and their families — but if Republicans get their way, women would lose the right to govern their own bodies. We can’t allow this to happen, and we have to fight back. | I’ve dedicated my life to working towards achieving equal rights for women here in Maryland and across the country — through my law career, at Planned Parenthood, and at the Women’s Law Center — and I know that women’s economic security and equality depend on the right to bodily autonomy. Right now, we have to stand up for those rights and defend access to reproductive care. So will you join me in fighting to protect abortion rights today? | | Here in Maryland, the General Assembly just passed a bill that expands access to abortion and eliminates out-of-pocket costs to patients under most insurance — but it needs the governor’s signature in order to become a reality.Let Maryland be an example to the rest of the country on how to support a woman's right to reproductive freedom: Thank you, Michelle Siri * | | = Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20907 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, text PROGRESS to 48178 or visit our . Hey Peter \-- I wanted to check back in with some good news. We crushed our Sustaining Member goal and now have a modest grassroots army helping us plan ahead. I'm thrilled to have you with me in this race to defend the House majority, defeat an out-of-touch and inaccessible incumbent, and stop a Trump-endorsed GOP challenger from gaining power. We're in for a tough fight, but with a growing team like this one, I believe that we will win. Together we're going to prove that the people of WA-03 want a leader who will put people over politics. If you're one of our Sustaining Members (or even if you're not) and you'd like to be a walking billboard for our campaign, you can check out our campaign store here: **[https://store.brenthennrich.com/](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTDc6Khfn-HWQdPlwL0wqXHbuXsXTqa8TnumDm0708NqS0uSdUpXepJ6R7qpNTeeRI1t0rUbgGa_qKwugGknfuFA0vGhD4zupWbSSu98plMfD-8FbUQ1iGBkKq_7M1VhMw7mX4FbsOPfRncR6K6G4isVI0Fiezpm6YtRtDR9OjfuSMAqgMinGEESyRXL8IaEN9tZNRHXCSrQpmaNuKKLdSrs/3l1/NlE5Dq5HRd690KtDAKNcDw/h1/yBIru6Gkn7mh3xWjWVToUbX33rewI7qCG84g30lKKSE)** Again, thank you for being part of this team. clean_body: | | Hey Peter \-- I wanted to check back in with some good news. We crushed our Sustaining Member goal and now have a modest grassroots army helping us plan ahead. I'm thrilled to have you with me in this race to defend the House majority, defeat an out-of-touch and inaccessible incumbent, and stop a Trump-endorsed GOP challenger from gaining power. We're in for a tough fight, but with a growing team like this one, I believe that we will win. Together we're going to prove that the people of WA-03 want a leader who will put people over politics. If you're one of our Sustaining Members (or even if you're not) and you'd like to be a walking billboard for our campaign, you can check out our campaign store here: Again, thank you for being part of this team. It'll take all of us. -BH \-- Brent Hennrich Candidate for U.S. Congress, WA-03 | | | If you can, please chip in to support this people-powered campaign. name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: I know this isn’t what you want to hear right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
| | | Patriot, It's Dan Crenshaw. I just got this text and my heart sank:

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60077572:JkM2RYo1N:m:1:3299561967:E31C8EB0C102CFEE9E28DDCA0EAA8ECC:r)
---

This is bad. _Really bad._

I know this isn't what you want to hear right now: _**but Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left have BUCKETS of money at the ready. Falling short of our goal simply isn't an option - falling short means we lose the House Majority for good.**_

---
| | | [300% MATCH NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60077572:JkM2RYo1N:m:1:3299561967:E31C8EB0C102CFEE9E28DDCA0EAA8ECC:r "Generic Button")
---

I REFUSE to sit back and allow the Radical Left to take over our country. I know you won't either, which is why today I'm coming to you with a humble request:

**[Can I count on you to rush a 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 minutes? $5, $10, $25, or even just $1 will go a long way to ensuring we close the fundraising gap.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60077572:JkM2RYo1N:m:1:3299561967:E31C8EB0C102CFEE9E28DDCA0EAA8ECC:r "Can I count on you
to rush a 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 minutes? $5, $10, $25, or even just $1 will go a long way to ensuring we close the
fundraising gap.")**

I can't extend this offer to everyone and I can only offer it to you for a limited time - but it's critical you rush support before the deadline. _If we fail to make our mark, the Liberal Media, pollsters, and pundits will say it 's indicative of the electoral outcome and everything will snowball. _

**[BUT, if every patriot who gets this email chips in, we'll crush our fundraising goal and leave the Radical Left in the dust. Remember, all donations made in the next 45 minutes will be 300% matched >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60077572:JkM2RYo1N:m:1:3299561967:E31C8EB0C102CFEE9E28DDCA0EAA8ECC:r "BUT, if every
patriot who gets this email chips in, we’ll crush our fundraising goal and leave the Radical Left in the dust. Remember, all donations made in
the next 45 minutes will be 300% matched >>>")**

---
| | | [300% MATCH NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60077572:JkM2RYo1N:m:1:3299561967:E31C8EB0C102CFEE9E28DDCA0EAA8ECC:r "Generic Button")
---

We're in a great position to take back the House from Nancy Pelosi - we're just FIVE SEATS AWAY from restoring an America First Agenda in Washington. But Pelosi knows it, just as well as we do, _and she 's panicking._

_She 's dialing up dark money donors.

She's depositing max-out checks.

And last month she outspent and outraised us by MILLIONS._

**Pelosi 's working day and night to ensure we fail. If we fall short of our goal, the Left will BURY us. We can't let Pelosi win, simply because she outspent us. **

There's no way we make our mark without you, Patriot.

**[I can't extend this deadline again - even for Top Patriots like you. So please, rush your 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 min.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60077572:JkM2RYo1N:m:1:3299561967:E31C8EB0C102CFEE9E28DDCA0EAA8ECC:r "I can’t extend this deadline again – even for Top Patriots like you. So please, rush your 300% matched donation before the
link closes in 45 min.")**

Thank you,

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60077572:JkM2RYo1N:m:1:3299561967:E31C8EB0C102CFEE9E28DDCA0EAA8ECC:r)
---
Dan Crenshaw

---

Link")

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60077573:JkM2RYo1N:m:1:3299561967:E31C8EB0C102CFEE9E28DDCA0EAA8ECC:r "Can we count on you to step up?")**

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: 7 hours and 37 minutes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
Seven hours and 37 minutes: That's how much of Donald Trump's phone call time is unaccounted for on the day of Jan. 6, 2021, according to a new report from Bob Woodward at The Washington Post. **This could be an enormous turning point in the investigation into Trump 's wrongdoing - and potentially damning evidence of a cover-up.** Because this wasn't just any seven hours and 37 minutes: The missing logs coincide with the very hours during which our Capitol was being attacked by a mob of pro-Trump extremists - extremists that Trump himself had whipped into a frenzy and inspired to commit violent insurrection to try to prevent Joe Biden from taking office. The committee investigating the insurrection is now rightfully scrutinizing whether there was a cover-up of the official White House records that day - and even if the President used burner phones to keep his communications off-the-record. **But at this critical moment in the investigation, I urgently need you to speak out to ensure the former President is held accountable - and that GOP attempts to shield Trump from accountability do not succeed. [Please, make your voice heard before it's too late: Should criminal charges be considered for Donald Trump for un-American attempts to overthrow our democratic election?**](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-march-trump-accountability?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1159-su-nd) Thanks for speaking out, Dick
---
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Richard Blumenthal**
Date: Sat, April 2, 2022
Subject: MAJOR update on Donald Trump criminal charges

[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=jeCmv1vL0Om4A62ctsFFVc4D86XWZAc%2B&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
**A federal judge has ruled it was "more likely than not" that former president Donald Trump violated the law and "corruptly attempted to obstruct" Congress when he incited an insurrection on our Capitol and tried to overturn the results of the 2020 election.**
The judge's ruling also cleared the release of documents from Trump's co-conspirator in his post-election Big Lie, attorney John Eastman. These documents will be reviewed by the bipartisan committee investigating the Jan. 6 insurrection and will likely embolden the case for the disgraced former President facing criminal charges.
In his ruling, the federal judge likened former President Trump and Eastman's plan to "a coup in search of a legal theory," noting that it spurred "violent attacks."
This is a significant development. And what is becoming clear is that the conspiracy-laden house of cards that Donald Trump and his sycophants built to overturn a democratic election is collapsing quickly. But you know as well as I do that - even after such an unequivocal ruling from a federal judge about Trump's potentially criminal acts - Republicans in Congress and on Fox News will do everything they can to sweep this ruling under the rug.
**That means it 's up to us to maintain the drumbeat for full accountability - and it's beyond critical that you, as a highly engaged Democrat, speak out to demand accountability under the law for Donald Trump.**
**Tonight, I need 5,000 members of this team to speak out before midnight. Even if you 've taken action before, I'm counting on your response again in light of this new ruling: [Should criminal charges be considered for Donald Trump for un-American attempts to overthrow our democratic election?](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-march-trump-accountability?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1159-su-nd)**
Thank you,
Dick
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=Oq%2Br4xF%2F%2FDzxRL8WnAPeRM4D86XWZAc%2B&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

name: Mike Thompson
subject: Please join me in celebrating a great moment in our history
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress unsubscribe: https://email
body:
# [#]
Peter,
Ketanji Brown Jackson has been confirmed to the Supreme Court in an historic and bipartisan 53-47 Senate Vote

Justice Brown Jackson will be the first Black woman to ever serve on the Supreme Court. This is a major milestone for our nation.

Not only am I glad to see President Biden keep his promise to nominate the first Black woman to the Supreme Court, but also to see both Democrat and Republican Senators come together to make history.

Peter, it is moments like these that prove that putting partisan politics aside and that working hand in hand for the greater good of the nation is possible. I hope you’ll join me in celebrating a great moment in our history.

In solidarity,

Mike Thompson
Authorized & Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/8a96e6b5-5db7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a/46365c33-61b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjM2NWMzMy02MWI3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jEq0bvAdAl8T2lDAW-C-twY4JCc8_mmjFeRnmi-uLX8=&id=103862631 Mike Thompson for Congress

body:
We must send him a message that making insulin affordable has massive grassroots support here in Virginia.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43932132/339344111/-925054313?refcode=BLU-ANDY-20220408-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTU1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTM2ZjllMy04M2I3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v_hrF0Srq7aZ-XV-5QgFS5gCobdIFlU_T_k4arwlGI0=)

| | | **SIGN NOW: Show Your Support for the Affordable Insulin Now Act**
---
| [ADD YOUR NAME ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43932133/339344112/1720347462?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTU1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTM2ZjllMy04M2I3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v_hrF0Srq7aZ-XV-5QgFS5gCobdIFlU_T_k4arwlGI0=&emci=d537ee9c-71b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=ba36f9e3-83b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=3919287)
---
Peter —

I’ve been living with Type 1 diabetes for over 30 years, so I know firsthand the impact that sky-high insulin costs can have on a family. Last week, the House of Representatives passed the Affordable Insulin Now Act, which would cap the monthly out-of-pocket cost of insulin at $35. This will be life-changing and life-saving for millions of Americans, myself included.

**But Congressman Bob Good voted against this legislation.** I think it’s simple: diabetic Americans should never have to worry that their life-saving medication will have to be rationed because it is unaffordable. Apparently Bob Good disagrees.

**Until we can get Bob Good out of office, we must send him a message that making insulin affordable has massive grassroots support here in Virginia and across the country.[_Will you add your name to our petition right away to show your support for the Affordable Insulin Now Act?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43932134/339344113/1720347462?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTU1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTM2ZjllMy04M2I3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v_hrF0Srq7aZ-XV-5QgFS5gCobdIFlU_T_k4arwlGI0=&emci=d537ee9c-71b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=ba36f9e3-83b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=3919287)**
| [SIGN NOW ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43932135/339344114/1720347462?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTU1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTM2ZjllMy04M2I3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v_hrF0Srq7aZ-XV-5QgFS5gCobdIFlU_T_k4arwlGI0=&emci=d537ee9c-71b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=ba36f9e3-83b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=3919287)

I look forward to being a Congressman who always votes for common-sense policies like this one.

Thanks for your support,
Andy Parker

clean_body: We must send him a message that making insulin affordable has massive grassroots support here in Virginia. | = | | | SIGN NOW: Show Your Support for the Affordable Insulin Now Act | Peter — I’ve been living with Type 1 diabetes for over 30 years, so I know firsthand the impact that sky-high insulin costs can have on a family. Last week, the House of Representatives passed the Affordable Insulin Now Act, which would cap the monthly out-of-pocket cost of insulin at $35. This will be life-changing and life-saving for millions of Americans, myself included. But Congressman Bob Good voted against this legislation. I think it’s simple: diabetic Americans should never have to worry that their life-saving medication will have to be rationed because it is unaffordable. Apparently Bob Good disagrees. Until we can get Bob Good out of office, we must send him a message that making insulin affordable has massive grassroots support here in Virginia and across the country. | I look forward to being a Congressman who always votes for common-sense policies like this one. Thanks for your support, Andy Parker * | | = Paid for by Andy Parker for Congress Andy Parker for Congress P.O. name: =?utf-8?Q?Heidi=20St.=20John?=
subject: Resolute and Unbroken
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Heidi St
body:
Check out our newsletter! | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/heidistjohnforcongress/elections-have-consequences-15928019?e=b0bcc6b4f9)
---
| | |
---
| | | April 7, 2022 Hi Friends, December 7, 1941. The Japanese Navy had done its worst. America’s Pacific Fleet was largely in ruins at Pearl Harbor. It was, as President Roosevelt said, “a day which would live in infamy.” But Japanese Admiral Yamamoto quietly observed what soon became reality: “I fear all we have done is to awaken a sleeping giant and fill him with a terrible resolve.” The 2020 election attempted to crush American conservatism once and for all. Certainly, the appointments, policies, and executive orders of Joe Biden have weakened America’s independence, America’s freedom, and America’s future. But what happened on Tuesday, November 3, 2020, was not unlike what happened at Pearl Harbor nearly 80 years earlier. America took everything the Japanese Navy had but remained unbroken. Slowly, America began to stand and fight for the things that mattered most. All across America, I’m seeing beleaguered conservatives and discouraged patriots getting off the bench and onto the battlefield with me—joining in the fight for America’s soul. From local school boards to the United States Congress we are resolute and unbroken. We are wide awake (not woke), sober in our resolve, and committed to our cause. I believe the radical left has at last awakened a sleeping giant and filled Americans with a terrible resolve. From Miami to Seattle, the battle is being fought at ballot boxes and the tide has already turned. America’s “darkest hour” is past and it’s a new day. The bells of freedom are ringing. Do you hear them? As I travel this district and meet with men and women at town halls and coffee shops, my heart is full of hope for SW Washington. As a mother and grandmother, I am committed to fighting for our children. As a business owner, my voice will join a chorus of other Conservatives to say ENOUGH to high taxes and crippling regulations—and as a patriot, my voice will be strong to secure our borders and our freedoms. It’s time. Please help me get to Congress and be a voice for liberty by **[_donating today_](https://heidistjohnforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=46e715d1574a19c15defda548&id=4f19eaad4f&e=b0bcc6b4f9)**

For Freedom and for Southwest Washington,
---
|
---
| _**Heidi St. John**_
_Candidate for Congress, SW Washington_
Standing Up For What We Believe

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rachel=20Tripp?=
subject: ICYMI: Bill McSwain Proposes 50% permanent gas tax cut
body:
McSwain announced his plan to cut the PA state gas tax by 50%. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/billmcswain/commonwealth-partners-endorses-bill-mcswain-for-governor-of-pa-8869808?e=b1ec95759b)
---
| |
---
| **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
---
**April 8, 2022
CONTACT: Rachel Tripp
202.738.9089**
---
| |
# ICYMI: In the News - Bill McSwain Announces Plan to Cut PA State Gas Tax by 50%

**West Chester, Pa. -- **Bill McSwain, Republican candidate for Governor, on Wednesday held a press conference to address Pennsylvania's highest in the nation gas tax and the burden of ever-rising gas prices brought about by Joe Biden, Tom Wolf and Josh Shapiro.

In his remarks, McSwain promised to permanently cut the PA gas tax by 50% as Governor, and stressed that temporary solutions are not enough. McSwain also shared his plan to restore fiscal responsibility to Pennsylvania by reducing the overall tax burden on hard working families and cutting wasteful government spending, so that hard working families can thrive.

The bold initiative is making headlines across Pennsylvania and nationally, select excerpts below:
---
| **_Washington Examiner: _****_Pennsylvania GOP gubernatorial candidate backs 50% permanent gas tax cut_** A [Republican](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=f957ec49f9&e=b1ec95759b) candidate running in [Pennsylvania](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=84cd7cfd57&e=b1ec95759b)'s gubernatorial election is seeking a hefty cut to the state gas tax. Bill McSwain, a former Philadelphia attorney, pitched a permanent 50% [gas](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=3d0531d13c&e=b1ec95759b) tax cut, according to the _[Pittsburgh Post-Gazette](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=d95f734afb&e=b1ec95759b)_. As of late Thursday, the state's gas tax, which rests at 57.6 cents per gallon, is the highest fuel tax in the nation.

"You will hear a lot of talk in this primary race about the gas tax from other career politicians I am running against," McSwain said, adding that his opponents have offered "gimmicky temporary solutions" and that "talk is cheap." McSwain said he would pay for the gas cut by looking at spending across "every department" in the state government. "I am a fiscal conservative. I want to reduce the size of government," he said. _This piece was originally published 04/07/22, full article [available here](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=2a6b4668c1&e=b1ec95759b). _
---
|
---
| **_Pittsburgh Post-Gazette: Gubernatorial candidate Bill McSwain calls for permanent 50% cut in Pennsylvania gas tax, calls GOP rivals’ plans ‘gimmicks’_** Taking aim at his rivals for offering “gimmicks” instead of real relief to help Pennsylvanians hindered by sky-high gas prices, gubernatorial contender Bill McSwain pitched a 50% permanent cut to the state’s gas tax in a visit to the Strip District on Wednesday. Mr. McSwain, running in the crowded GOP primary as a self-proclaimed “outsider,” hammered the oft-repeated line that’s become a mantra of the Republican Party here in Pennsylvania: that the gas tax, at 57.6 cents per gallon, is the highest liquid fuels tax in the country. But the former U.S. attorney insisted that he’s splitting from his party — the “career politicians,” at least — in the lengths he’ll go to trim the tax permanently. His opponents are lobbing up nothing but “gimmicky, temporary solutions,” Mr. McSwain said, using the Pitt Ohio corporate office as a backdrop to show the impacts of gas prices — averaging $4.27 in Pittsburgh, according to AAA.
“You will hear a lot of talk in this primary race about the gas tax from other career politicians I am running against,” Mr. McSwain said. “They talk about it. But talk is cheap, especially from career politicians.” Talk may be cheap, but funding infrastructure and the state police isn’t. The tax pays for maintenance and improvements to 120,000 miles of Pennsylvania highways and 32,000 of its state and local bridges, allocated directly from the Department of Transportation and to individual municipalities. The Motor License Fund, where the gas tax revenues go, also is used to fund the state police. Mr. McSwain said the state can fund infrastructure not “off a gimmick like the gas tax” but with its general fund. He said he’d pay for the cut by “re-examining spending across the board,” cutting wasteful spending and prioritizing funding on “core government funding” like infrastructure and public safety. “We are literally going to look at every department and every agency,” Mr. McSwain said. “I am a fiscal conservative. I want to reduce the size of government.” Mr. McSwain pledged that there would be no gap in funding to infrastructure or state police while he fosters this change in fiscal ethos, and said the tax cut will be his priority the first day he’s in office.
Whether the savings from cutting the gas tax actually reaches consumers is another conversation. Republicans generally insist that the savings will be passed down to consumers at the pump, but critics have noted that it’s technically up to oil and gas companies. The gas tax in Pennsylvania is paid by distributors of liquid fuels at the wholesale level, according to the state. “The real problem with this approach at both the federal and the state level is that there’s no way to ensure that the people will see this savings when they go to the gas pump to fill up their cars, their SUVs and trucks,” Jim Tymon, executive director of the American Association of State Highway and Transportation Officials, told the Associated Press recently. Mr. McSwain took the opportunity to hit his primary opponents on Wednesday, saying that their plans on the gas tax don’t go far enough. He specifically cited one to reduce the tax until the end of the year. That’s an idea floated by State Senate President Pro Tempore Jake Corman, who introduced a bill last month to cut the tax by one-third through the end of 2022, replacing revenue with a mix of federal funds and a bond issue. Mr. McSwain criticized Pennsylvania Attorney General Josh Shapiro, the lone Democrat seeking his party’s nomination, for perusing the state on a pledge to cut taxes. He deemed it “comedy” from another career politician. Mr. Shapiro, in a visit to Forest Hills last month, pledged to eliminate a state tax on cell phone bills, expand a popular property tax rent rebate program for seniors and give drivers a $250 gas tax refund for each car they own. The Democrat pitched it as an alternative to cutting the gas tax, which he said would compromise public safety. In other states that have cut the gas tax, oil and gas executives haven’t passed the financial benefits on to consumers, Mr. Shapiro said. “While they’re working to put money in the pockets of oil and gas executives, I’m working to put money in the pockets of Pennsylvanians who right now are dealing with these high costs,” Mr. Shapiro said of Republicans. Mr. McSwain’s pitch to voters is that he’s a political outsider with a fresh perspective who knows how to lead. He’s a former U.S. Attorney for the Eastern District of Pennsylvania, a Marine veteran and Chester County resident. In addition to proposing a gas tax cut on Wednesday, Mr. McSwain went after his opponents on the airwaves. His campaign released a TV ad criticizing contenders in the GOP field over specific acts. “Stop gambling with career politicians,” the ad said, showing the faces of State Sen. Doug Mastriano, businessman Dave White and former U.S. Rep. Lou Barletta on a slot machine. A recent Emerson College poll had Mr. Mastriano leading the pack at 16.2%, followed by Mr. Barletta at 12.4%. Mr. McSwain registered at 6.4%, Mr. White at 3.3% and the rest of the pack — including Mr. Corman — under 4%. Nearly 50% of Republican primary voters said they were undecided in the race. Joining Mr. McSwain on Wednesday was former GOP candidate Jason Richey, a partner at Pittsburgh’s K&L Gates law firm and Aliquippa native who dropped from the race last month. Mr. Richey called on the party to unite behind one candidate, insisting that it should be Mr. McSwain. _This piece was originally published 04/06/22, full article[available here](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=92ccaefcbb&e=b1ec95759b)._
---
|
---
| McSwain's latest ad promising to cut the gas tax is now live on cable and broadcast. Check it out below:
---
| [ ](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=0d2ab5509f&e=b1ec95759b)
---
|
---
| **BACKGROUND: **
Appointed by President Trump, McSwain's record as U.S. Attorney demonstrates his fierce defense of constitutional rights, dedication to upholding law and order, and history of putting criminals and corrupt politicians in jail. Prior to becoming an attorney, Bill served as a scout/sniper platoon commander in the U.S. Marine Corps. He was born in Philadelphia and raised in Chester County, where he lives today with his wife, Stephanie, and their four children. More information on McSwain's background and platform is available [here.](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=e78efd8129&e=b1ec95759b)
###

He said he’d pay for the cut by “re-examining spending across the board,” cutting wasteful spending and prioritizing funding on “core government funding” like infrastructure and public safety. “We are literally going to look at every department and every agency,” Mr. McSwain said. “I am a fiscal conservative. I want to reduce the size of government.” Mr. McSwain pledged that there would be no gap in funding to infrastructure or state police while he fosters this change in fiscal ethos, and said the tax cut will be his priority the first day he’s in office. Whether the savings from cutting the gas tax actually reaches consumers is another conversation. Republicans generally insist that the savings will be passed down to consumers at the pump, but critics have noted that it’s technically up to oil and gas companies. The gas tax in Pennsylvania is paid by distributors of liquid fuels at the wholesale level, according to the state. “The real problem with this approach at both the federal and the state level is that there’s no way to ensure that the people will see this savings when they go to the gas pump to fill up their cars, their SUVs and trucks,” Jim Tymon, executive director of the American Association of State Highway and Transportation Officials, told the Associated Press recently. Mr. McSwain took the opportunity to hit his primary opponents on Wednesday, saying that their plans on the gas tax don’t go far enough. He specifically cited one to reduce the tax until the end of the year. That’s an idea floated by State Senate President Pro Tempore Jake Corman, who introduced a bill last month to cut the tax by one-third through the end of 2022, replacing revenue with a mix of federal funds and a bond issue. Mr. McSwain criticized Pennsylvania Attorney General Josh Shapiro, the lone Democrat seeking his party’s nomination, for perusing the state on a pledge to cut taxes. He deemed it “comedy” from another career politician. Mr. Shapiro, in a visit to Forest Hills last month, pledged to eliminate a state tax on cell phone bills, expand a popular property tax rent rebate program for seniors and give drivers a $250 gas tax refund for each car they own. The Democrat pitched it as an alternative to cutting the gas tax, which he said would compromise public safety. In other states that have cut the gas tax, oil and gas executives haven’t passed the financial benefits on to consumers, Mr. Shapiro said. “While they’re working to put money in the pockets of oil and gas executives, I’m working to put money in the pockets of Pennsylvanians who right now are dealing with these high costs,” Mr. Shapiro said of Republicans. Mr. McSwain’s pitch to voters is that he’s a political outsider with a fresh perspective who knows how to lead. He’s a former U.S. Attorney for the Eastern District of Pennsylvania, a Marine veteran and Chester County resident. In addition to proposing a gas tax cut on Wednesday, Mr. McSwain went after his opponents on the airwaves. His campaign released a TV ad criticizing contenders in the GOP field over specific acts. “Stop gambling with career politicians,” the ad said, showing the faces of State Sen. Doug Mastriano, businessman Dave White and former U.S. Rep. Lou Barletta on a slot machine. A recent Emerson College poll had Mr. Mastriano leading the pack at 16.2%, followed by Mr. Barletta at 12.4%. Mr. McSwain registered at 6.4%, Mr. White at 3.3% and the rest of the pack — including Mr. Corman — under 4%. Nearly 50% of Republican primary voters said they were undecided in the race. Joining Mr. McSwain on Wednesday was former GOP candidate Jason Richey, a partner at Pittsburgh’s K&L Gates law firm and Aliquippa native who dropped from the race last month. Mr. Richey called on the party to unite behind one candidate, insisting that it should be Mr. McSwain. This piece was originally published 04/06/22, full article._ | | McSwain's latest ad promising to cut the gas tax is now live on cable and broadcast. Check it out below: | | | BACKGROUND: Appointed by President Trump, McSwain's record as U.S. Attorney demonstrates his fierce defense of constitutional rights, dedication to upholding law and order, and history of putting criminals and corrupt politicians in jail. Prior to becoming an attorney, Bill served as a scout/sniper platoon commander in the U.S. Marine Corps. He was born in Philadelphia and raised in Chester County, where he lives today with his wife, Stephanie, and their four children. More information on McSwain's background and platform is available | | | | | | | | | | billmcswain.com | | Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/r5LElSMjbV6__moJK05betPZORgQkpDJ766nhfj77Rg=/dqUj_izkc_jzdeARvlI9wBT8ovLwj5M2kjM7vVWd7mE=?refcode=X_040822_KBJConfirmation)

History has been made: for the first time, a Black woman will sit on the highest court in the land.
Justice Jackson is the accomplished, compassionate voice we _desperately_ need on the Supreme Court. For decades to come, we can count on her thoughtful, responsible SCOTUS decisions to influence our nation for the better.
And, let's not forget, her appointment would likely have been impossible without our Senate majority -- which is the result of years of hard work from women like Stacey Abrams and other dedicated women of color.
[**Help support the women who are making lasting, systemic change across the country by chipping in now >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/r5LElSMjbV6__moJK05betPZORgQkpDJ766nhfj77Rg=/dqUj_izkc_jzdeARvlI9wBT8ovLwj5M2kjM7vVWd7mE=?refcode=X_040822_KBJConfirmation)

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: 2 years ago today re: masks, gloves, gowns
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresssecure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220408&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220408&amount=28]
Team,
Two years ago, one acronym defined my every waking moment: PPE, or personal protective equipment.
The phones in my office were ringing off the hook with nurses, doctors, nursing home staff, and other healthcare professionals desperate for masks, gloves, and gowns. The stories of healthcare workers sharing masks or creating makeshift personal protective equipment out of whatever they could find were both heartbreaking and infuriating. These were the folks working on the front lines, and they didn’t have the armor they needed to keep themselves safe.
During those weeks my team and I were working through the night – literally. On more than one occasion, I found myself haggling with Chinese middlemen in rural China to get my hands on 78-cent masks. We sent out donation links and people across the country responded. We chased down every weird lead we could find, and it was documented in this article [http://elissaforcongress.com/a-michigan-congresswoman-a-guy-in-line-in-china-and-a-global-scramble-to-find-n95-masksa-michigan-congresswoman-a-guy-in-line-in-china-and-a-global-scramble-to-find-n95-masks/] . [http://elissaforcongress.com/a-michigan-congresswoman-a-guy-in-line-in-china-and-a-global-scramble-to-find-n95-masksa-michigan-congresswoman-a-guy-in-line-in-china-and-a-global-scramble-to-find-n95-masks/]
https://elissaforcongress.com/a-michigan-congresswoman-a-guy-in-line-in-china-and-a-global-scramble-to-find-n95-masksa-michigan-congresswoman-a-guy-in-line-in-china-and-a-global-scramble-to-find-n95-masks/ [https://elissaforcongress.com/a-michigan-congresswoman-a-guy-in-line-in-china-and-a-global-scramble-to-find-n95-masksa-michigan-congresswoman-a-guy-in-line-in-china-and-a-global-scramble-to-find-n95-masks/]
Here’s where the story took a truly interesting turn: Not only was it a good article highlighting the work during an insane time – it let PPE vendors across the country know that we were looking. After the article’s release, companies began reaching out from across the country. An Arizona company mailed a thousand masks that they could spare to my house, and my husband and I split them up into Ziploc bags and mailed them to our district's nursing homes, sometimes just ten or twenty masks at a time.
Eventually, we were contacted by Panda Express, the chain of Chinese food take-out. They told us that if we could prove that our hospitals were within 10 miles of a Panda Express, they would get us masks. That’s how my team found themselves frantically scouring Google Maps. We found that three of our five hospitals were within that ten mile radius, so the masks started flowing in.
So where are we two years later?
First off, I’ve become obsessed with the issue of security in our supply chains. I crafted legislation in May of 2020 to deal with the PPE shortages. I stood up a task force with Rep. Mike Gallagher (R-WI) to investigate the military’s supply chains. Over the last two years, securing America’s supply chain has defined much of my work in Congress.
Most recently, I co-sponsored the CHIPS Act – which offers incentives to American companies to build expensive microchip plants on U.S. soil – to address the massive shortage of the microchips that power our cars. It’s all part of the broad goal to bring our supply chains and manufacturing back to the United States to ensure we are producing these critical goods at home, and are not reliant on any country -- like China -- for our economic or national security.
It’s been a tough two years to say the least, but it’s also fueled so much of what I work on today. These are the events and the stories that have defined my time in Congress. Thank you for being along for the journey with me.
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220408&amount=28]
Elissa

Elissa Slotkin proudly represents Michigan’s 8th district in Congress. Keep up with Elissa and the latest from the campaign trail on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/elissaslotkin] and Twitter. [https://twitter.com/ElissaSlotkin]
