name: Peter Franchot
subject: My Plan to Save the Bay
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]
Dear Peter,
As Marylanders, our way of life has been shaped by the Chesapeake Bay for generations. The Bay is Maryland’s most important natural resource, a key economic generator for our state, and an immeasurable treasure of biodiversity.
While some progress has been made to save the Bay since the Chesapeake Clean Water Blueprint was established in 2010, there have also been key failings in our efforts to reverse the effects of decades of pollution and overfishing. The next Governor of Maryland needs to take urgent action to finally guarantee a healthy future for the Bay. If I’m blessed to lead, then that’s precisely what I will do.
https://secure.ngpvan.com/njBGonrUnkGR3O0-xnKooQ2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/njBGonrUnkGR3O0-xnKooQ2]
As Governor, I’ll work with the EPA and the signatory states to the Chesapeake Clean Water Blueprint to ramp up our collective efforts to achieve clean air, clean water, and lasting health for the Bay by the end of my first term.
As part of my plan, I’ll add one billion adult oysters to our state’s portion of the watershed, and work with our neighbors in Virginia to secure a similar commitment. I’ll also reduce oxygen dead zones by 75%, and work with the EPA, Pennsylvania, and New York to ensure accountability in meeting upstream pollution reduction targets.
If you agree that we must preserve the Bay’s legacy for future generations, will you sign on to my plan as a Citizen Co-Sponsor to save the Bay? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/njBGonrUnkGR3O0-xnKooQ2]
When it comes to restoring the Bay to good health, we simply cannot pass the buck to the next generation, which is why I am urging you to join me in this effort. Together, let’s finally guarantee a healthy future for the Bay in the years to come.
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
By Authority: Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate; Thomas C. Brennan, Treasurer.
Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate
4831 Tesla Dr, Suite J
Bowie, MD 20715
United States

name: Team Read
subject: Real housing, real results
body:
As our next Governor, Tobias Read will tackle the homelessness crisis with immediate action on emergency housing, mental health, and the opioid crisis.
---
| | Dear Peter, Tobias just released his next policy plan for Oregon. As our next Governor, **Tobias Read will tackle the homelessness crisis with immediate action on emergency housing, mental health, and the opioid crisis.** He’ll take long term action to build more affordable housing, cut red tape for housing construction, and work to get people into good jobs and safe long term housing. **[Read more about Tobias Read’s housing plan here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43924966/339311077/-2097239374?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDgxOTMxNy02NmI3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6csadq45BQ1h3RmuA2uFJYwLgGzHoKWCuusBUhec00A=&emci=b7306d27-60b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=a4819317-66b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=30662126)** **Tobias’ housing plan is the only one that will lead to immediate outcomes, including getting people out of dangerous camps and into transitional housing, cleaning up our public spaces, and making our neighborhoods safer for everyone. ** He’ll work to keep people in their homes by creating new rental assistance programs and hiring social workers to help people in need access services. He’ll create specialized programs and housing to service the most in need groups like LGBTQIA2S+ youth or former foster youth. Tobias will work with the private sector to quickly establish accessible financing for homeowners to build accessory housing like in-law apartments in towns and cities statewide. But Tobias will also invest in the future by **making it simpler and easier to build new housing and prevent the homelessness crisis from escalating.** He’ll work to simplify rules and permitting processes for new housing construction. Tobias will add new resources to mental health and addiction services and hold opioid profiteers accountable for peddling this poison to our most vulnerable neighbors. Thanks,
Team Read
---

name: Team Tom
subject: Team Tom Weekly Update | Friday, April 8th for Peter:
body:
Thank you for your generous support of Tom's campaign! Keep reading for a recap of his time on the campaign trail, an update on upcoming events, and ways to get involved.
#

**Team Tom Weekly Update | Friday, April 8th, 2022**
Peter,
Whether it's finally passing paid leave, or ensuring expecting mothers — regardless of immigration status — have access to lifesaving health care, Unions and the General Assembly have delivered for Marylanders.
This week, Tom proudly stood with union members from SEIU, AFSCME, CASA in action, and other community organizations to call on Governor Hogan to sign these important pieces of legislation. We don’t have the time to waste for these bills to be signed into law. Marylanders deserve a Governor that will fight for working families across the state.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43932840/339347606/-1705848539?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTY5ZDM3Ni04N2I3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZzcudoekCr7i1eLfcxl2HeUU8ChZeG7g6tWnKZfQHzY=&emci=e5aa7b3e-36b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=d169d376-87b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)
Thank you so much for your continued support of our campaign. We look forward to keeping in touch.
All the best,
Team Tom
* * *
**On the Campaign Trail**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43932841/339347607/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTY5ZDM3Ni04N2I3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZzcudoekCr7i1eLfcxl2HeUU8ChZeG7g6tWnKZfQHzY=&emci=e5aa7b3e-36b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=d169d376-87b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)
Tom kicked off this weekend with a powerful service led by Pastor Whitlock at Reid Temple AME Church alongside his friends Senator Joanne Benson, and the District 24 team including Delegates Andrea Harrison, and Faye Martin Howell.
After service, Tom stopped by the Giant in Lanham to visit and thank UFCW400 members for their hard work. We are proud to have the support of every Maryland UFCW local in our campaign to fight for justice and opportunity for workers across our state.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43932842/339347610/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTY5ZDM3Ni04N2I3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZzcudoekCr7i1eLfcxl2HeUU8ChZeG7g6tWnKZfQHzY=&emci=e5aa7b3e-36b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=d169d376-87b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)
Thank you Pastor Harold Carter, Jr. and the entire New Shiloh Baptist family for allowing Shannon to join you for your Sunday service this week.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43932844/339347613/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTY5ZDM3Ni04N2I3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZzcudoekCr7i1eLfcxl2HeUU8ChZeG7g6tWnKZfQHzY=&emci=e5aa7b3e-36b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=d169d376-87b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)
Thank you, Prince George’s County! Shannon had another great day this weekend connecting with voters in College Park to find out exactly what they want to see in their next Governor and Lieutenant Governor of Maryland.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43932845/339347616/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTY5ZDM3Ni04N2I3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZzcudoekCr7i1eLfcxl2HeUU8ChZeG7g6tWnKZfQHzY=&emci=e5aa7b3e-36b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=d169d376-87b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)
Tom joined leaders from the Prince Georges Leadership Action Network this week to share his vision to bring affordable housing to Prince George’s county and throughout Maryland as Governor.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43932847/339347618/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTY5ZDM3Ni04N2I3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZzcudoekCr7i1eLfcxl2HeUU8ChZeG7g6tWnKZfQHzY=&emci=e5aa7b3e-36b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=d169d376-87b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)
As a graduate of the University of Maryland Eastern Shore, Shannon understands the importance for all Marylanders to have a voice. She was honored to join Wicomico County Democrats to share the Perez/Sneed vision of bringing opportunity to all Marylanders, regardless of zip code.
* * *
**In the News**
**[Tom Perez candidate profile: broadband and healthcare improvements key part of agenda](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43932852/339347621/716934240?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTY5ZDM3Ni04N2I3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZzcudoekCr7i1eLfcxl2HeUU8ChZeG7g6tWnKZfQHzY=&emci=e5aa7b3e-36b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=d169d376-87b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)**
_“He tells us, that as a former secretary of labor under the Obama Administration, he worked during the 2008 recession and got aid and economic resources to Americans in need. He tells he wants to continue the work of expanding government help and healthcare in Maryland by utilizing the state’s record surplus.”_
**[Labor leaders push for workers' bills](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43932853/339347625/-1438390231?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTY5ZDM3Ni04N2I3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZzcudoekCr7i1eLfcxl2HeUU8ChZeG7g6tWnKZfQHzY=&emci=e5aa7b3e-36b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=d169d376-87b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)**
_“And while pressing Hogan to sign the bills, they also sharply criticized his record on labor issues. Tom Perez, who has state employee union backing in the Democratic primary for governor, said Hogan has “an overactive veto pen” when it comes to labor issues.”_
**[Md. Gubernatorial Candidates Square Off in Greenbelt](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43932855/339347626/-570577760?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTY5ZDM3Ni04N2I3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZzcudoekCr7i1eLfcxl2HeUU8ChZeG7g6tWnKZfQHzY=&emci=e5aa7b3e-36b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=d169d376-87b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)**
_“After Perez said his magic wand would be used to “make sure everyone gets a fair shake,” he received applause from some in the audience in joining the opposition against the maglev high-speed train project. The Baltimore Washington Rapid Rail proposes to build an estimated 40-mile stretch between Washington and Baltimore mostly below ground, but nearly nine miles above ground in Prince George’s County with no stops.”_
**[Fmr Labor Sec. Tom Perez on His MD Gubernatorial Campaign](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43932858/339347629/-240098136?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTY5ZDM3Ni04N2I3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZzcudoekCr7i1eLfcxl2HeUU8ChZeG7g6tWnKZfQHzY=&emci=e5aa7b3e-36b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=d169d376-87b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)**
_"I want jobs and justice here in Maryland," says former Labor Sec and DNC chair[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43932860/339347633/1111927623?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTY5ZDM3Ni04N2I3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZzcudoekCr7i1eLfcxl2HeUU8ChZeG7g6tWnKZfQHzY=&emci=e5aa7b3e-36b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=d169d376-87b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)Tom Perez.”_

* * *
**ICYMI**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43932861/339347634/-1998379645?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTY5ZDM3Ni04N2I3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZzcudoekCr7i1eLfcxl2HeUU8ChZeG7g6tWnKZfQHzY=&emci=e5aa7b3e-36b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=d169d376-87b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)

clean_body: Thank you for your generous support of Tom's campaign! Keep reading for a recap of his time on the campaign trail, an update on upcoming events, and ways to get involved. Team Tom Weekly Update | Friday, April 8th, 2022 Peter, Whether it's finally passing paid leave, or ensuring expecting mothers — regardless of immigration status — have access to lifesaving health care, Unions and the General Assembly have delivered for Marylanders. This week, Tom proudly stood with union members from SEIU, AFSCME, CASA in action, and other community organizations to call on Governor Hogan to sign these important pieces of legislation. We don’t have the time to waste for these bills to be signed into law. Marylanders deserve a Governor that will fight for working families across the state. Thank you so much for your continued support of our campaign. We look forward to keeping in touch. All the best, Team Tom On the Campaign Trail Tom kicked off this weekend with a powerful service led by Pastor Whitlock at Reid Temple AME Church alongside his friends Senator Joanne Benson, and the District 24 team including Delegates Andrea Harrison, and Faye Martin Howell. After service, Tom stopped by the Giant in Lanham to visit and thank UFCW400 members for their hard work. We are proud to have the support of every Maryland UFCW local in our campaign to fight for justice and opportunity for workers across our state. Thank you Pastor Harold Carter, Jr. and the entire New Shiloh Baptist family for allowing Shannon to join you for your Sunday service this week. Thank you, Prince George’s County! Shannon had another great day this weekend connecting with voters in College Park to find out exactly what they want to see in their next Governor and Lieutenant Governor of Maryland. Tom joined leaders from the Prince Georges Leadership Action Network this week to share his vision to bring affordable housing to Prince George’s county and throughout Maryland as Governor. As a graduate of the University of Maryland Eastern Shore, Shannon understands the importance for all Marylanders to have a voice. She was honored to join Wicomico County Democrats to share the Perez/Sneed vision of bringing opportunity to all Marylanders, regardless of zip code. In the News “He tells us, that as a former secretary of labor under the Obama Administration, he worked during the 2008 recession and got aid and economic resources to Americans in need. He tells he wants to continue the work of expanding government help and healthcare in Maryland by utilizing the state’s record surplus.” “And while pressing Hogan to sign the bills, they also sharply criticized his record on labor issues. Tom Perez, who has state employee union backing in the Democratic primary for governor, said Hogan has “an overactive veto pen” when it comes to labor issues.” “After Perez said his magic wand would be used to “make sure everyone gets a fair shake,” he received applause from some in the audience in joining the opposition against the maglev high-speed train project. The Baltimore Washington Rapid Rail proposes to build an estimated 40-mile stretch between Washington and Baltimore mostly below ground, but nearly nine miles above ground in Prince George’s County with no stops.” "I want jobs and justice here in Maryland," says former Labor Sec and DNC chair Perez.” ICYMI Schedule of Events****** Saturday, April 9 | 3:00 PM Warner Circle Park, Kensington, MD Saturday, April 9 | 7:00 PM The Rockville Hotel Hosted by Kabirul Islam, Hashan Chowdhury, Mohammed Kazal, Kazi Sakhawat, Hossain Azam, Eng. body:
Gov. Lujan Grisham's law to legalize cannabis sales just went into effect, and it's already paying off.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43925260/339312195/-2081290588?code=jtk1213-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTlmOTQ2Ni02NmI3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=daZBvnpu9LGre17XTtqaw37PhLNqwBka1fI3_a4DG0A=&emci=fbdd1648-e2b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=819f9466-66b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=24265352)
---
Peter: Gov. Lujan Grisham's law to legalize cannabis sales just went into effect, and it's already paying off.
Last weekend, New Mexico retailers were allowed to legally sell cannabis for the first time, and **sales topped $5.2 million.** It's clear that cannabis legalization is bringing an economic boom to our state – stimulating our local economies and creating valuable tax revenue.
Cannabis legalization is a win-win for our economies and our communities. Now that cannabis is legal, New Mexico can take a meaningful step toward righting the wrongs created by the war on drugs and its discriminatory effects, which have disproportionately harmed people of color.
**Despite the clear benefits of legalization, over half of U.S. states still have cannabis penalties in place. Advocates are calling on the federal government to legalize recreational cannabis use in all 50 states, so we want to know what YOU think. **
| | _**Please, respond to our poll before it closes at midnight:**_
---
**Should cannabis be legal in all 50 states?**
---
| | | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43925263/339312198/296123870?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1213-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTlmOTQ2Ni02NmI3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=daZBvnpu9LGre17XTtqaw37PhLNqwBka1fI3_a4DG0A=&emci=fbdd1648-e2b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=819f9466-66b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=24265352)
---

We have 214 days to not just talk to voters across Delaware, but to make sure that Democrats across the country have the resources to keep control of Congress and beat the far-right Republicans who are trying to turn back all the progress we’ve made thus far.

[**The biggest impact you can have today would be to make a contribution of $15 or more for LBR.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43933047/339348450/-1281563454?refcode=em_fr_220408smo_n_tlbr_nd_6_ng_n_l1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWM4OWRlZC04N2I3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sue8ibRVGoIebnepvlhNxYwajvJNBEBAAqSJf363O4M=)

Our team is working non-stop to make sure the people of Delaware know about all LBR is doing to keep getting results and pushing for change in Washington – and we're working to assist fellow Democrats in some of the biggest races that will decide control of Congress.

**Our efforts will require campaign staffers, expanding our digital outreach, and talking to voters all across Delaware. And we're counting on grassroots support to help fund these critical components.**

[**So can you count on you? Even just $15 now will make a huge difference down the line.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43933049/339348452/-1281563454?refcode=em_fr_220408smo_n_tlbr_nd_6_ng_n_l2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWM4OWRlZC04N2I3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sue8ibRVGoIebnepvlhNxYwajvJNBEBAAqSJf363O4M=) | | **[Donate $15!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43933051/339348454/-1281563454?refcode=em_fr_220408smo_n_tlbr_nd_6_ng_n_b1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWM4OWRlZC04N2I3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sue8ibRVGoIebnepvlhNxYwajvJNBEBAAqSJf363O4M=)**

Team LBR

subject: Jane is coming to Duncanville for a town hall [RSVP]

body:
https://www.janehopehamilton.com/ [https://www.janehopehamilton.com/]Duncanville Town Hall
Peter,
Jane is coming to Duncanville for a Town Hall! Join us on February 8th at the Duncanville Recreation Center for a discussion on what's most important to you and Congressional District 30: jobs, affordable healthcare, justice reform and more!
Tuesday, February 8, 2022
6:30pm - 7:30pm
Duncanville Recreation Center
201 Janes Collins Blvd
Duncanville, TX 75116.
RSVP Today [https://secure.ngpvan.com/T9xpbZmBj0S5r-_1N85qrw2] https://secure.ngpvan.com/T9xpbZmBj0S5r-_1N85qrw2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/T9xpbZmBj0S5r-_1N85qrw2]
Block Walk with Jane
Team Jane is block walking every Saturday until Election Day. Sign up for a shift today [https://secure.ngpvan.com/3gIgazchVkOj0eaMNhiA5Q2] !
https://secure.ngpvan.com/3gIgazchVkOj0eaMNhiA5Q2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/3gIgazchVkOj0eaMNhiA5Q2]
For over 20 years Jane has been working for our communities
Legislative Aide for The Honorable Helen Giddings
Senior staffer on the US House Rules Committee for the Honorable Martin Frost
Campaign Manager for the Dallas Democratic Sweep in 2006 which flipped Dallas County from Republican to its current status as a Democratic stronghold.
Helped elect Craig Watkins, the first African-American District Attorney in the State of Texas.
Former Campaign Manager for Dallas County Judge Clay Jenkins
Former Campaign Manager and Chief of Staff for Congressman Marc Veasey
Democratic Primary State Director for the Joe Biden Presidential Campaign
General Election Strategic Advisor for the Joe Biden Presidential and Kamala Harris Vice Presidential Campaign

name: Charlie Crist
subject: Ron DeSantis doesn’t care about people.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
The truth is, Ron DeSantis has been chasing far-right policies |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43933113/339348771/1278717326?refcode=20220408_f_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWUwMGY5Zi04OGI3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HbZGsnmB-GfB_uVX0SZ4tK2H7Ygy7UtWBER3Q8EdWP8=)
---
Friend,

Back in 2009, I was proud to welcome President Obama to Florida to tout the benefits the stimulus package was going to bring to our state. I’m proud of that moment, and of all the work we did with the Obama administration while I was governor to improve peoples’ lives and get Florida back on track during the Great Recession.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43933114/339348772/1278717326?refcode=20220408_f_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWUwMGY5Zi04OGI3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HbZGsnmB-GfB_uVX0SZ4tK2H7Ygy7UtWBER3Q8EdWP8=)
---
But right now, I’m worried about Florida under Ron DeSantis. As scary as it sounds, he just doesn’t care about people. He cares about 2024 and chasing whatever extreme, hot-button issue he thinks will help him win the Republican nomination for president. One autocracy expert recently told _POLITICO_ , _**“Ron DeSantis is turning Florida into his own mini-autocracy.”**_

That’s why he’s spent so much of his time chasing divisive far-right policies rather than trying to address how unaffordable Florida has become. And it’s why so much of his campaign’s money is coming from billionaires who live out of state and have virtually no connection to Florida.

The truth is Ron DeSantis has failed Florida. Now I’m running for governor to be the people’s voice in Tallahassee and finally start building a Florida that works for ALL Floridians. But I’m going to need your help to do it.

**[If you’re with me, please pitch in anything you can now. Together, I know we can defeat Governor DeSantis and restore common sense, opportunity, and decency to our state.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43933115/339348773/1278717326?refcode=20220408_f_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWUwMGY5Zi04OGI3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HbZGsnmB-GfB_uVX0SZ4tK2H7Ygy7UtWBER3Q8EdWP8=)**

And because one of Kirsten's top priorities is building an economy that works for everyone, the support of Southwest Carpenters is greatly appreciated and will play a key role in our victory.

Together, we can expand our economy, safeguard our natural resources, fight climate change, and make sure people can find good-paying jobs.

name: 2A Updates (via Britt for AL)
subject: Mike Durant doesn’t support the Second Amendment?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc
body:
He said U.S. cities would be safer if access to firearms was REDUCED. Peter, Mike Durant now claims to be a staunch supporter of the Second Amendment. But, he previously said a strategy “to disarm the population” would be “a pretty good step toward law and order”. _How does he get away with this?_ The answer is: **he won’t.** [**Click HERE to Support a 2A WARRIOR**](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=aeecba8d4329417fae06b5d35c1dce6b&_e=P1s6bDCX77JRr02yVk-NoqhFs25qi8ShkwZZ9Uvm55wQUgzuLbVul_kXWp0cOWE1RRS07fgRyLbs__scS0vde7I-wbJo7-GiyUM5xjMK6AImAqGXTrt41erNCfiVxfOeSlYA_j7oDD51iw-0JTI9I9z_TWfp0FetK7BcFR3XOHRFdQodlGOo8U5jgC_lnhx0cYTFMevMku8Y-Q5us6vmQajU6heSp1J5GVmDpxTidHJ0i7ke2IItODPPeDtwR2spH05eknwfbmTgEyZsq8IugjVxDIbXL8yykDrN0BKXtL6TdqNC-NLZooadZECyXAtwhS8qIn0XJWVwG0Gk-f26VzxIIT-JUejM8OxbsTyvHskkyL8qeqMhGQyz106WVp70EYN9bHZVX-y5_fuzNaG6xxkj5dG8zbUYU7gNQk61HMjAWcT9qaOnbVhZ9tDj0wLITXfs31sOWIzPeZYq6jFTyQ%3D%3D) Katie’s opponent is trying to backtrack by claiming his anti-2A quote was “mischaracterized”, “misunderstood”, and “meaningless” — but without any further explanation. It’s not clear if Durant even understands why the Second Amendment exists, but you know as an Alabama born-and-bred, America First candidate, Katie Britt does. Katie will always fight to protect our right to defend ourselves and our families, whether it be against violent crime or the timeless tyranny of government. **Peter, ALABAMA DESERVES A COMMITTED

clean_body: He said U.S. cities would be safer if access to firearms was REDUCED. Peter, Mike Durant now claims to be a staunch supporter of the Second Amendment. But, he previously said a strategy “to disarm the population” would be “a pretty good step toward law and order”. How does he get away with this? The answer is: he won’t. Katie’s opponent is trying to backtrack by claiming his anti-2A quote was “mischaracterized”, “misunderstood”, and “meaningless” — but without any further explanation. It’s not clear if Durant even understands why the Second Amendment exists, but you know as an Alabama born-and-bred, America First candidate, Katie Britt does. Katie will always fight to protect our right to defend ourselves and our families, whether it be against violent crime or the timeless tyranny of government. Peter, ALABAMA DESERVES A COMMITTED SECOND AMENDMENT SUPPORTER. Thank you for standing with Alabama’s values, Team Britt for Alabama Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc.

name: Mark Jefferson - Executive Director
subject: The momentum is on our side
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Party of Wisconsin
body:
| [ ](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=localraces_5&n=1)
---
Friend -- On Tuesday, conservatives all across the state defeated the Democrats in a dominating fashion! **We were victorious in roughly two-thirds of all races that our party was active** – key races that included swing and lean Democrat areas. This puts us on a great path for November. [**Can you chip in $5, $25, $50, or even $100 to help us continue the momentum?**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDV0-ridujlNJmRGsRDe0xHXaDYGH5adTYVkPO7R8JSBZU&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=localraces_5&n=2) Kenosha County elected a GOP County Executive for the first time. Deep blue Portage County, where Democrats have won for decades, also elected a conservative as County Executive. Green Bay flipped their city council to conservative. La Crosse County conservatives made big gains on their overwhelmingly liberal county board, and nearly flipped that blue county as well. **Conservatives flipped county boards from liberal to conservative in Calumet, Door, Kenosha, Marathon, Rock, Adams and St. Croix.** Democrats are left trying to brag about winning a mayoral race in Milwaukee–a city that leans 80% Democrat and is famous for electing multiple socialists to the mayor’s office. [**From one end of our state to the other, conservative grassroots showed that they’re ready to take the fight to November. We just need your help!**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDV0-ridujlNJmRGsRDe0xHXaDYGH5adTYVkPO7R8JSBZU&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=localraces_5&n=3) As Chairman Paul Farrow said on election night, “we are proud of the slate of conservative candidates who stepped up to the plate across Wisconsin...they’ve proven that when we stand up and fight back against the far-left takeover of our local governments, we win.” The Democrats rely on massive out of state donations pouring money into Wisconsin to influence elections from the outside, but the grassroots movement is stronger than ever and on Tuesday, we made sure to stood our ground! [**The movement is just beginning, Friend, but our work isn’t done. Will you join us as we work to build on this success?**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDV0-ridujlNJmRGsRDe0xHXaDYGH5adTYVkPO7R8JSBZU&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=localraces_5&n=4) We now face the battle to defeat Tony Evers, defend Senator Ron Johnson’s seat, and win multiple local and state races that will determine Wisconsin’s future. Thank you for the continued support of our party Friend and for contributing to our push forward to November. The best days lie ahead, and we can continue carrying the fight to the Democrats in November with your help! Forward, Mark Jefferson
Executive Director
Republican Party of Wisconsin | [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDV0-ridujlNJmRGsRDe0xHXaDYGH5adTYVkPO7R8JSBZU&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=localraces_5&n=5 "Help us build on this success!") [Help us build on this success!](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDV0-ridujlNJmRGsRDe0xHXaDYGH5adTYVkPO7R8JSBZU&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=localraces_5&n=5)
---
[](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6myz1ydj26pS20sqllUBZd4&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=localraces_5&n=6) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8Tr24D9XbJYDft_QizpripYs&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=localraces_5&n=7) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y0VJVp2OCKNw8zDVmWeSo7yP6jlGmDIaYIm5b1oT1T4S&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=localraces_5&n=8) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=localraces_5&n=9)

name: Dan Raley via Team Gansler
subject: I'm proud to endorse Doug Gansler for Governor
body:
Doug is the Democrat who I know can win the general election in November. I believe his blend of homegrown Maryland values, governing experience and pragmatic vision for our future is precisely what people are looking for. | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlYEBRuv3LZltPZnpT13Z_ZvnJe4nH_WOjWTJhkaafbzZlYQ_6gfZ6Wt6m5HtBxhyA-vjCkIA4v6IJaMsgRE3Bj9Aacp6wwhKj_KakS0gdgzHBltdSNCut6x3o2eR_vRtH86VTfORNgw9AP6LF3JH5KCihBxxwDqP-lBreh9mmMRVBNpL9-1PSww7JwrZawNRiXgojFE544v0gB1Y5xH5FrAZVJG4Kg3wOi61cm-JrZTVWxMnMTxgOUngSYlFpxbs8/3l1/xbCD9Rg8TR2rLd48Mjd57A/h0/TpeWjBkU1piva0zWrM5pfUkZzuiHiD_vBG3SNMBW1Yc)

I am endorsing Doug for Governor -- [and I am asking you to join me.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlYEBRuv3LZltPZnpT13Z_ZvnJe4nH_WOjWTJhkaafbzZlYQ_6gfZ6Wt6m5HtBxhyBSHeM6pEzp4ZXBeCYpneokfFug9Qzx9N0QGp5055oYvrNllJBndKhh03VHyag9O82Y5enrOpZ1TLjgeZFMlCgzyPDJigtRaBajDmYHorP51iHxn7fkKBKx2j529mXIkRpiOFPNgpJdssFeVI5DmNDs-MUOxQ4ONusFnV4y26YLJavCHarT8Aj-_Tyfzq7RBDc/3l1/xbCD9Rg8TR2rLd48Mjd57A/h1/dNIpvqs4_GjZ0dIUBQmcICByhD3NfE0dfbLKWAB-jSo)

I've had the honor to serve St. Mary's County for 12 years as County Commissioner. I'm a lifelong resident of St. Mary's County who wants our county to grow in a well-planned, fiscally conservative manner. I feel, with Doug as governor, the county will grow and prosper. First, Doug loves St. Mary's County. His family owned the old Dorsey home on Medley's Neck years ago, and his love of our special county has only grown with time. He visits often and truly takes the time to find out what is happening in our community - whether it is while buying stuffed ham or fried chicken at the Chaptico Market or enjoying a plate of his favorite wings at Leonardtown's Olde Town Pub. We need a governor who understands the opportunities and challenges facing St. Mary's County, and who can be counted on to pick up the phone when we need help.
---
| [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlYEBRuv3LZltPZnpT13Z_ZvnJe4nH_WOjWTJhkaafbzZlYQ_6gfZ6Wt6m5HtBxhyA4r8-3sGQ8UKrFJU59lTriF6DTWNVOBiOxwaie5aKEpIgI0lqx03LPGvxyS9B8Bni0-sMKJkmpHAS14Mj3SiOO4B7eyim8s6dUKQJ6AS6HHzl7THT4i2MFjPCDxjVCr1VKvxaZgS05N2Z41yMB_23y6SYACbbh0-iaJ6qOTbA7PMqCIAAaSaRIF5ZBFQ7sq0I/3l1/xbCD9Rg8TR2rLd48Mjd57A/h3/RSyk7u94-WyeSzXW9mVtiPuf7jH3V8vewAhW7KdgPi0)

| [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlYEBRuv3LZltPZnpT13Z_ZvnJe4nH_WOjWTJhkaafbzZlYQ_6gfZ6Wt6m5HtBxhyA-nFGD1XdTwDLAkwLBBI7LN99GiYS_9kBt6AE98O4SMQ2uJV4xpZTgtOL_Gn8irqnPFAawCGdug7zLYXxGXq69ELyZZllCPtaeP7EXuFUKJOsGj29-cLhz_KYdTngNGuNwvJ1NHC_FMCSTcM22BzRUbOSIweTx6Cn4o2HpamOKMwRBWnlYjb1fEkhtqrnLN_w/3l1/xbCD9Rg8TR2rLd48Mjd57A/h4/hEb45LC4vKwAQCHdd4VVuIwApSGxnKQNmn2IcYMY7m4)

Second, Doug's priorities are right for Maryland. **He knows we cannot build a stronger economy and attract good-paying jobs if our residents and small business owners don 't feel safe. **Doug appreciates the importance of a strong, results-oriented education system to the success of our increasingly high-tech economy. Doug knows how vital Pax River is to our economy and to the state's economy as well. Finally, Doug is the Democrat who I know can win the general election in November. I believe his blend of homegrown Maryland values, governing experience and pragmatic vision for our future is precisely what people are looking for in these times of deep uncertainty and it's why the state of Maryland and St. Mary's County will benefit from his governorship. Many of the county's leadership, past and present, support Doug for governor, including:
* **Chip Norris:** Former Mayor of Leonardtown
* **Tom Mattingly:** Former County Commissioner
* **Sal Raspa:** Former Board of Education member, Democratic Central Committee
* **Cindy Slattery:** Former Democratic Central Committee member

We have just a few months left before the primary, and there is so much work to be done. Let's join together to elect him governor of our great state.**[If you agree that Doug is the best candidate, join me in endorsing him today!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlYEBRuv3LZltPZnpT13Z_ZvnJe4nH_WOjWTJhkaafbzZlYQ_6gfZ6Wt6m5HtBxhyBJ6MmaNPogEJCylCyQZJjni9e_gnm-9Uo5F9eN7dzEU2m4IzUtqTQD4KzrD8NvveQnwbZSz5ZsnbHNtfBypWjrDiUuF7jGAIAAG2k7eHMXDFQDS1ujC5w1fwNOaW5mV4ASC-OZw292_9roBdkTYIP2XXaBtAMcVrNkdxxywAWQh7C6AWQZNbfrJoK83SaELJo/3l1/xbCD9Rg8TR2rLd48Mjd57A/h5/KhxwcipXiJaxDf_Ks7AEGEgoDyVMk8jSm5wUKSjJsnc)**

clean_body: Doug is the Democrat who I know can win the general election in November. I believe his blend of homegrown Maryland values, governing experience and pragmatic vision for our future is precisely what people are looking for. | | Friends, I have known Doug for 17 years. I am endorsing Doug for Governor -- I've had the honor to serve St. Mary's County for 12 years as County Commissioner. I'm a lifelong resident of St. Mary's County who wants our county to grow in a well-planned, fiscally conservative manner. I feel, with Doug as governor, the county will grow and prosper. First, Doug loves St. Mary's County. His family owned the old Dorsey home on Medley's Neck years ago, and his love of our special county has only grown with time. He visits often and truly takes the time to find out what is happening in our community - whether it is while buying stuffed ham or fried chicken at the Chaptico Market or enjoying a plate of his favorite wings at Leonardtown's Olde Town Pub. We need a governor who understands the opportunities and challenges facing St. Mary's County, and who can be counted on to pick up the phone when we need help. | | Second, Doug's priorities are right for Maryland. He knows we cannot build a stronger economy and attract good-paying jobs if our residents and small business owners don 't feel safe. Doug appreciates the importance of a strong, results-oriented education system to the success of our increasingly high-tech economy. Doug knows how vital Pax River is to our economy and to the state's economy as well. Finally, Doug is the Democrat who I know can win the general election in November. I believe his blend of homegrown Maryland values, governing experience and pragmatic vision for our future is precisely what people are looking for in these times of deep uncertainty and it's why the state of Maryland and St. Mary's County will benefit from his governorship. Many of the county's leadership, past and present, support Doug for governor, including: Chip Norris: Former Mayor of Leonardtown Tom Mattingly: Former County Commissioner Sal Raspa: Former Board of Education member, Democratic Central Committee Cindy Slattery: Former Democratic Central Committee member We have just a few months left before the primary, and there is so much work to be done. Let's join together to elect him governor of our great state. I look forward to working together to help elect Doug Gansler governor. Sincerely, Dan Raley Former County Commissioner St. Mary's County | By Authority: Friends of Doug Gansler, Terry Denney, Treasurer; Ana Sol Gutierrez, Chair. Friends of Doug Gansler P.O. Box 31102 Bethesda, MD 20824 United States | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Friends of Doug Gansler, please .

Our race is the best chance Democrats have of flipping a Senate seat red to blue. We're neck-and-neck in the polls because of your support, while Republicans are duking it out in a chaotic primary.

Mitch McConnell knows Ohio will determine the Senate majority. That's why he's laser-focused on our race. Right-wing dark money groups are dumping millions of dollars here and doing whatever they can to attack me and our campaign.

To make matters worse, we have our final public filing deadline before the general election on April 13th. The GOP will look to our report to determine whether they'll launch new attacks against us.

**I 'll be blunt--GOP groups are outspending us on the airwaves. If their attacks go unchallenged, we could lose this race and Democrats won't be able to expand the Senate.**

[**Please, will you split a donation between my campaign and Voter Protection Project ahead of our fundraising deadline? We need to fight back against the GOP 's attacks immediately:**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8465?t=9&akid=1773%2E878179%2Edo4w16)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Tim

Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

| | Hello, This is a historic moment for our country: The Senate just voted to confirm Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson’s nomination to the Supreme Court. Not only is Justice Brown Jackson exceptionally qualified – as a Harvard Law School Graduate, former clerk to Justice Stephen Breyer, and Judge on D.C.’s Court of Appeals – but she will also become the first-ever Black woman and former public defender to sit on the Supreme Court. The daughter of public school teachers, who attended segregated primary schools themselves, Justice Brown Jackson’s parents instilled in her early on the importance of education. When Justice Brown Jackson told her high school guidance counselor she wanted to attend Harvard, the guidance counselor warned that she should not set her “sights so high.” That did not stop Justice Brown Jackson. It’s long overdue that our highest court reflects the diversity and talent of our great nation, and we’re thrilled that more little girls will see themselves represented at every level of government. Despite some Republicans’ obstruction, Justice Brown Jackson proved throughout the confirmation process that she’s more than prepared to serve on the Supreme Court. But let’s not forget: This momentous occasion would not have happened without voters in Michigan and across the country making their voices heard. Elections matter and it’s clear that we must protect and defend our razor-thin Democratic House majority. **[Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can to protect our progress and allow Democrats to continue making history?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43925921/339315282/801473661?refcode=EM_BS_STE_220408_FR_KBJ_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjAwMWI1Ni02OWI3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S8eKFdr1VyLcibjLcaE3WLPBpbq3JK8M90KXUcwgVE8=)** | | | [Donate $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43925922/339315283/801473661?refcode=EM_BS_STE_220408_FR_KBJ_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjAwMWI1Ni02OWI3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S8eKFdr1VyLcibjLcaE3WLPBpbq3JK8M90KXUcwgVE8=)

name: Cheri Beasley
subject: before Trump takes the stage with our opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |

Friend: **Donald Trump is coming to North Carolina _tomorrow _to hold a rally for Ted Budd – his hand-picked candidate in this Senate race.**

name: Laura Nevitt,  Keystone Progress
subject: See Rep. Jamie Raskin at the Summit tomorrow. Register now.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress, www
body:
Dear Friend,

The Keystone Progress Summit – Pennsylvania’s Progressive Summit – is in full swing! But there's still time for you to join us for tomorrow's discussions and to hear from our Keynote speaker, U.S. Rep. Jamie Raskin.

The Maryland democrat was the Lead House Manager in the second Senate impeachment of former President Donald Trump. His commitment and thoughtfulness were an inspiration. He currently serves on the House's Select Committee to Investigate the January 6 attacks on the U.S. Capitol. The congressman is also an accomplished author, including of the New York Times #1 bestseller, Unthinkable: Trauma, Truth and the Trials of American Democracy.

Rep. Raskin's keynote address will start at 3 p.m. EST on Saturday, April 9. We cannot wait to hear his insights on how the struggle to preserve our democracy is unfolding and what we are learning about the January 6 insurgence.

The Progressive Summit is open to the general public, but registration is required. REGISTER HERE: https://hopin.com/events/keystone-progress-summit-2022?utm_source=email&utm_campaign=040822 [https://hopin.com/events/keystone-progress-summit-2022?utm_source=email&utm_campaign=040822]

Thank you for organizing and planning with us.

Laura Nevitt
Keystone Progress

REGISTER [https://hopin.com/events/keystone-progress-summit-2022?utm_source=email&utm_campaign=040822]

Our sponsoring partner

354 S Atlantic Ave
Pittsburgh, PA 15224

name: Alek Skarlatos
subject: 240 rounds of ammunition and a jar of gasoline
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alek For Oregon
body:
I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60078859:JOkbjbo2N:m:1:3253819041:3355A1D99B460B4054E762F660A84607:r)
---
Peter,

Like so many Americans, I watched the scenes of Afghanistan's fall with disbelief, extreme sadness and even anger. You see, I served the greatest country on Earth in Afghanistan back in 2015. But Afghanistan wasn't the only place I looked terrorism directly in the eyes...

**August 21 st 2021 marked six years since the fateful late-summer afternoon that changed my life and those of my two best friends - forever.**

**I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when my best friends and I decided to take a vacation in Europe**. We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when a terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over and kill us all.

As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat -As an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. **Which is why I, my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop this terrorist.**

This split-second decision prevented what witnesses contend could have become a mass slaughter. There is a reason I was able to make this split-second decision to intervene, Peter - **I have and always will be willing to give my life in the fight for freedom, in the image of true American values.**

[**At the end of this email, I am going to ask you to donate $3 to my campaign for Congress, in honor of the sixth anniversary of the Thalys train attack. But first, you need to understand why we need an American fighter like myself in Washington.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60078859:JOkbjbo2N:m:1:3253819041:3355A1D99B460B4054E762F660A84607:r)

[**DONATE $3 TODAY -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60078859:JOkbjbo2N:m:1:3253819041:3355A1D99B460B4054E762F660A84607:r)
Now, our homeland is in danger. Not from radical Islamic terrorists, but radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. Leftist legislation is assaulting our Nation, our communities, and the American Dream.

Right now, Democrats are...
* Opening and destroying our borders. They are g**ranting dangerous amnesty** that will flood every corner of America.
* **Raising our taxes** like we have never seen, and making common goods like gas and groceries unaffordable.
* **Defunding the police,** leading to a surge in violent crime
* **Erasing historical figures** from our schools like George Washington and Abraham Lincoln
* Teetering on the edge of a **dangerous foreign policy crisis**

These power-hungry Democrat elitists like Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden don't care about the people they represent. **They only care about their own radical agenda.**

The Biden Democrats' grip on power in Washington is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security. The only way to pull America out of this leftist tailspin is by taking back the House in 2022. **We need a fighter in Congress, Peter and I hope that hearing my story proves to you that I am the man for the job.**

My life's mission has always been to represent the America I know and love - the world's bastion of freedom and economic prosperity. [**I am taking that mission and putting it into action by running for Congress, by fighting for my neighbors and their wellbeing in Washington.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60078859:JOkbjbo2N:m:1:3253819041:3355A1D99B460B4054E762F660A84607:r)

This will not be an easy road, which is why I am reaching out to you. I will need the financial support of every American patriot; every single dollar will help. [**Can I count on you to join my team with a donation of $3 today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60078859:JOkbjbo2N:m:1:3253819041:3355A1D99B460B4054E762F660A84607:r)

[**DONATE $3 TODAY -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60078859:JOkbjbo2N:m:1:3253819041:3355A1D99B460B4054E762F660A84607:r)

Thank you very much,
Alek Skarlatos
Republican for Congress

| Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. [**To support Alek 's campaign chip in $5 or more today!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60078859:JOkbjbo2N:m:1:3253819041:3355A1D99B460B4054E762F660A84607:r)
---|---

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60078860:JOkbjbo2N:m:1:3253819041:3355A1D99B460B4054E762F660A84607:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60078861:JOkbjbo2N:m:1:3253819041:3355A1D99B460B4054E762F660A84607:r)
---|---

[www.alekfororegon.com](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60078862:JOkbjbo2N:m:1:3253819041:3355A1D99B460B4054E762F660A84607:r)

name: Jane Hope Hamilton
subject: Whoops! Our wires got crossed!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Hope Hamilton for Congress
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Friends,
Today, Texas State Senator Royce West announced his endorsement of Jane Hope Hamilton for Congress. This comes on the heels of a growing list of endorsements from several other elected officials and former TX-30 candidates. Senator West released the following statement:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90478/images/quotemark.png] I’m proud and excited to give my support and my vote to Jane Hope Hamilton to be our next representative in Congress.
Jane Hope has done the hard work here on the ground in Dallas and she delivers results. Jane Hope brings the skills and experience to get things done for us in Washington, D.C.
Thank you Senator West!
Click below to watch the announcement [https://fb.watch/bZUQKk-ubX/] .
https://fb.watch/bZUQKk-ubX/ [https://fb.watch/bZUQKk-ubX/]
Senator Royce West has spent his entire career defending our community and being a voice for us all in Austin. Whether it was protecting our voting rights or fighting for our fair share of school funding, I have always been proud to stand shoulder-to-shoulder with Senator West. Today, I am honored to receive his endorsement and commitment to support our growing campaign. Together, we will take our message of hope and commitment to public service directly to the voters, and we will win.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90478/images/Jane.png]
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90478/images/HOPE%20is%20on%20the%20ballot.gif]

name: Peter Welch
subject: Thanks to this team’s collective action
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
The Elmore Post Office just signed their contract:

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=206%2E61531%2EKTbtEf)
Hello,
Back in January, I was proud to stand in solidarity with the folks in Elmore fighting to save their local post office.
This week, as President Biden signed the Postal Service Reform Act into law, the Elmore Post Office also signed their contract. This is all thanks to this team’s collective action—thank you.
Because of our reforms, Vermont businesses will be able to count on reliable mail service, our seniors and most vulnerable will get their prescriptions and checks on schedule, and our rural newspapers will get delivered to doorsteps on time.
Working with passionate Vermonters to make a difference in their community has fueled my work in the House, and I’m running for Senate to make an even greater impact for my constituents.
[**You make our progress—and this campaign—possible. Can you chip in $15 or whatever makes sense today to help win this race?**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1774?t=3&akid=206%2E61531%2EKTbtEf)
Thank you,
Peter

---

subject: This is ground zero for Trump 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
Ted Budd is his hand-picked candidate, and Trump is putting more into electing him than almost anyone else he’s endorsed.
#

We’re reaching out to ask you to make a donation to our campaign before Donald Trump gets here tomorrow for his rally with Ted Budd.
North Carolina and this race are ground zero for the Republican Party he’s trying to build ahead of 2024.
Ted Budd is his hand-picked candidate, and Trump is putting more into electing him than almost anyone else he’s endorsed. He’s coming back for his second rally tomorrow — to prop up Ted Budd’s Senate campaign with a clown car of far-right ideologues. That’s how important this race and our state are.
So it is our job to stop them. That’s why we need to ask:
[**Can you please donate $3 or any amount you can afford to defeat Trump and the super PACs trying to buy this Senate seat?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-apr22?refcode=em220408-1-T2T3&refcode2=684.357359.hHxj_n&t=1&akid=684%2E357359%2EhHxj_n)**

Peter, we have one question we’re really hoping you’ll answer for us. Your response will help us understand what we’re doing right, and where we can still do better. The question is this: **_[Why haven’t you donated to the Primary Sinema Project yet?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmn_tl1I0G69vk99O3n5GdMSnEPYsJrX2cUFNcwvqtDkOyr1zgTpn4h0t0bKeCm6Ojokr7y5fqx2spNaGF0DRN1Efi64Me5RzOALZW52FnJQVisg2TfNanXMrNmRd2PXWl9DDcYTd_I7LauZWSl1wqkDuxOvR3Atfr_nmcvWL5StpPGcqioDHcsmj3hzxYrUGNxom1Xji0jCzeDmm-xDpHH-9mS5t3O4Gf2LjiC43lKh5cpM5ZjQg_kwsDarq6Dk8o6TLTfk1ddjFCs-pjkuIYfqp9zEzv2Y_1ORJR4HdAlPEmQVWcTYtqL-XReXRAwQyiOb0oeb1GQxKjtTDwrzpPjTNmKzobiUp8reAOJObCy2w/3l1/0BvyaldERt-yG_E12sHljg/h1/enOXwdQDlAC71p6TabwQNbrcI-ERgXgBVIyrFrTVqrw)_** **[Share Your Answer »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmn_tl1I0G69vk99O3n5GdMSnEPYsJrX2cUFNcwvqtDkOyr1zgTpn4h0t0bKeCm6OgROSFf6cAlJFNvUtHBG6LYwFKzJq1xDlm2JMEXnhm206TdcaE-ra30gzKPYKbGdxM93qk50f4x_bax_8bwXuqrYYye-i19lvEfb6lyXYl1SQ52BESFc2LFs9Cf7TrHONvBBp-UUCNH7XqKvGfNq9sbzN5MX7ypvvUUk1pjz-Tav_3jptHOuqnUUJ1BtnREa8DVaxDGCLSRqMA1O8oBdTukTkf4DHSOedTcyNxr394mh-lYSpznyCG9QOhjUjKWXf3thjuPVcQkcpi58gFSf-VOz3m5bQxoqXiiV11yitpm8Q/3l1/0BvyaldERt-yG_E12sHljg/h2/p1uW2vleot0qiZM1n9T2aF3eVju97ZSkm5FFoiYGfwk)** To be clear, there’s no wrong answer! subject: Our first events!
body:
| | | Hi Friend, I hope you’re doing well! I wrote to you a couple of weeks ago telling you about our exciting barnstorm series coming up. At these events, Matt and Cynthia will answer questions, share about the exciting movement we're building for a government that will truly work for the people, and talk about how you can be involved. **We’re thrilled to invite you to our first three barnstorms!** On April 16th, from 12-1:30 PM, Matt and Cynthia will be at the East Greenwich Public Library sharing more about our campaign, our values, and our strategy to win: **[SIGN UP](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkzpMmJkU3f3xNz2Yhsw8RsouSMq7i5n9t1A_TrQe9hlM03hNRiv54_RJN8R0q-kkco5iyCndp9At4sgEt36Q-s6BapHXRv08zF0wk8xviT0fioB4s4A6YyDBMp_6YV0IxfYJcdMgIzWHLyS9x3Dgrt71Yfp8Zumq-shtBPGc4pliFt8YsJaq7SvocOJj_1YEX4kXZ_sxJzdqogxI_RaNDZ9NbhDQgY92qNVaBQGoSJpF8sxfSG4mUdb1CppIAcUdpZZbieafM7IULZUQOcJH57oHbO4hK2VXTUqph_ZCCZyA/3l1/58SgmiPXSmOEgdtZ0HjRnw/h0/Av2EaoVWssbou6BSOVUK2jb9678afbnbQRILOUqMTq0).** body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=169%2E5257348%2EF_BL7Q ]Adam Schiff for Congress

Derek,

I’ll get straight to the point — Kevin McCarthy posted a record-breaking
haul of $31 million from last week’s FEC deadline.

It’s the largest sum raised by any House Republican in three months. Ever.

And every dollar of it will go directly towards McCarthy’s effort to take
back the House majority for Republicans in the quickly approaching midterm
elections.

McCarthy is already measuring the curtains — he even went so far as to
say: "As election day draws nearer, the energy and enthusiasm for
Republicans to take back the House has never been stronger... These
contributions will help ensure our candidates have the resources necessary
to compete and win this November."

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20220408_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&refcode2=169_5257348_F_BL7Q&akid=169%2E5257348%2EF_BL7Q ]Derek, we need to fight back — can you pitch in $10, $25, or
$50 right now to fuel our work helping new and incumbent Democrats get
elected this November?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20220408_PM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=10&t=1005&refcode2=169_5257348_F_BL7Q&akid=169%2E5257348%2EF_BL7Q ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20220408_PM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=250&t=1009&refcode2=169_5257348_F_BL7Q&akid=169%2E5257348%2EF_BL7Q ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20220408_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&refcode2=169_5257348_F_BL7Q&akid=169%2E5257348%2EF_BL7Q ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Here’s the difference between how McCarthy raises money, and how we do it:

Kevin spends an evening schmoozing at the DC Trump Hotel with
billionaires, lobbyists, and Super PACs to raise $10 million. Our campaign
raises the funds to defend our Democratic majority one $10, $25, or $50
donation at a time.

To deepen the contrast, he uses his campaign funds to promote messages
like this:

McCarthy said that our country is “suffering greatly under the
Biden-Pelosi regime and the American people deserve better.” He thinks
that things were so much better under Trump. Please.

Unemployment levels are at record lows. We’ve invested trillions of
dollars in relief for Americans, kept businesses open, and got people
vaccinated. We paused student loan payments and made a historic investment
in the nation’s infrastructure.

And we once again have an administration that believes in democracy.

But that’s Kevin for you. He’ll say anything he can to propel the false
narrative that our nation was better off under the corrupt rule of Donald
Trump. In reality, they’re trying to tear us apart at the seams, despite
the stable path to recovery that President Biden and our Democratic
majorities have charted.

Derek, we need to keep craven people like Kevin McCarthy far,
far away from positions of power in Congress. We need to defend our
Democratic majority in the House. And we need to fight back to keep our
country moving forward.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20220408_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&refcode2=169_5257348_F_BL7Q&akid=169%2E5257348%2EF_BL7Q ]I’m personally asking — can you chip in $10, $25, or $50 right now to
help defend our Democratic majority in the House this fall? With the GOP
filling up their war chest of cash, we need every resource possible to
fight back.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: [ ]Adam Schiff for Congress Derek, I’ll get straight to the point — Kevin McCarthy posted a record-breaking haul of $31 million from last week’s FEC deadline. It’s the largest sum raised by any House Republican in three months. Ever. And every dollar of it will go directly towards McCarthy’s effort to take back the House majority for Republicans in the quickly approaching midterm elections. McCarthy is already measuring the curtains — he even went so far as to say: "As election day draws nearer, the energy and enthusiasm for Republicans to take back the House has never been stronger... These contributions will help ensure our candidates have the resources necessary to compete and win this November." [ ]Derek, we need to fight back — can you pitch in $10, $25, or $50 right now to fuel our work helping new and incumbent Democrats get elected this November? Our campaign raises the funds to defend our Democratic majority one $10, $25, or $50 donation at a time. To deepen the contrast, he uses his campaign funds to promote messages like this: McCarthy said that our country is “suffering greatly under the Biden-Pelosi regime and the American people deserve better.” He thinks that things were so much better under Trump. Please. Unemployment levels are at record lows. We’ve invested trillions of dollars in relief for Americans, kept businesses open, and got people vaccinated. We paused student loan payments and made a historic investment in the nation’s infrastructure. And we once again have an administration that believes in democracy. But that’s Kevin for you. He’ll say anything he can to propel the false narrative that our nation was better off under the corrupt rule of Donald Trump. In reality, they’re trying to tear us apart at the seams, despite the stable path to recovery that President Biden and our Democratic majorities have charted. Derek, we need to keep craven people like Kevin McCarthy far, far away from positions of power in Congress. We need to defend our Democratic majority in the House. And we need to fight back to keep our country moving forward. [ ]I’m personally asking — can you chip in $10, $25, or $50 right now to help defend our Democratic majority in the House this fall? McConnell's dark money allies have already spent over $7.5 million dollars on attack ads against me, _**more than they've spent against any other Senate Democrat**_. Political experts have labeled my race as a toss-up, and The Hill is saying that "the Senate majority will go through New Hampshire."
I'm no stranger to tough fights. In 2016, I won by only 1,017 votes, beating the incumbent Republican in one of the closest races in history. And now, the full force of the GOP is coming back to New Hampshire, so I can't do this alone.

| Team, **Ketanji Brown Jackson just MADE HISTORY** as the first Black woman to be confirmed as a Supreme Court Justice!

As the **first Black woman to serve on the Supreme Court and a judge with EXTRAORDINARY qualifications and experiences** not shared by many Supreme Court Justices, **_we have no doubt that she will make an OUTSTANDING Justice._**

**[If you’re as excited as we are about this confirmation, we’ve got GREAT news. We wrote a digital congratulations card to send Justice Brown Jackson on her HISTORIC confirmation. The daughter of parents who grew up under segregation, Ketanji Brown Jackson’s confirmation is a marker of **how INCREDIBLY far we’ve come in a single generation.**

Of course, we know there is a lot more work to be done. Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson’s confirmation hearings proved that over and over again.

But this is an important step and one we should celebrate!

clean_body: | | | Sign our “Congratulations KBJ” card | | | Team, Ketanji Brown Jackson just MADE HISTORY as the first Black woman to be confirmed as a Supreme Court Justice! As the first Black woman to serve on the Supreme Court and a judge with EXTRAORDINARY qualifications and experiences not shared by many Supreme Court Justices, we have no doubt that she will make an OUTSTANDING Justice. The daughter of parents who grew up under segregation, Ketanji Brown Jackson’s confirmation is a marker of how INCREDIBLY far we’ve come in a single generation. Of course, we know there is a lot more work to be done. Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson’s confirmation hearings proved that over and over again. But this is an important step and one we should celebrate! **Deadline Midnight Thank you, Arizona Democrats For up-to-date COVID-19 information and guidance, visit ** Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. We are working hard to deliver lasting results on issues that matter most to folks in Arizona and across the country. Your feedback guides our team as we:
* Work to bring down costs for everyday essentials like gas and groceries
* Support our border communities and ensure migrants are treated fairly and humanely
* Expand access to affordable housing, especially for our seniors
* Help families afford their medication and bring down health care costs
* Provide life-saving services and support to survivors of domestic abuse
* Lower the costs of textbooks for Arizona students
* Ensure families and small businesses can depend on a reliable and efficient Postal Service
* Make investments in clean energy and electric vehicle infrastructure
* And so much more

Thanks to your support and input, we can take on the challenges facing everyday families in Arizona and across the country.
[**That’s why I’m asking you to share your thoughts in our April Issues Survey. It will only take a minute or two >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43929174/339330866/-592726348?refcode=AU_KLS_EG_REA_SUR_AC_20220408_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84OTMxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTcwOGQ3YS03NmI3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=odC3DrSuLRFU3Uh4CXjQp02CABzm-BTXF12P5g8PmCg=&emci=28cec4d5-6bb7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=85708d7a-76b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=2415496)
I look forward to reading your responses.
Take care,
Kyrsten
Sinema for Arizona
P.O. Box 7586
Phoenix, AZ 85011-7586
United States **[www.kyrstensinema.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43929175/339330895/1294254903?refcode=AU_KLS_EG_REA_SUR_AC_20220408_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84OTMxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTcwOGQ3YS03NmI3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=odC3DrSuLRFU3Uh4CXjQp02CABzm-BTXF12P5g8PmCg=&emci=28cec4d5-6bb7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=85708d7a-76b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=2415496) | [info@kyrstensinema.com](mailto:info@kyrstensinema.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43929176/339330896/2116375508?refcode=AU_KLS_EG_REA_SUR_AC_20220408_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84OTMxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTcwOGQ3YS03NmI3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=odC3DrSuLRFU3Uh4CXjQp02CABzm-BTXF12P5g8PmCg=&emci=28cec4d5-6bb7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=85708d7a-76b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=2415496)** | Paid for by Sinema for Arizona

name: INDEMS
subject: Fast Facts Friday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
**\- INDems Celebrates Ketanji Brown Jackson’s Confirmation to U.S. Supreme Court -** “History was made this week in the United States, and true to his word, President Joe Biden fulfilled yet another campaign promise with the confirmation of Ketanji Brown Jackson to the U.S. Supreme Court. Justice Jackson was chosen after the President underwent a thorough and rigorous process to name a qualified nominee with strong experience, character, integrity, and dedication to the Constitution and the rule of law. The President knew choosing a Supreme Court nominee was one of the most serious decisions any president makes, and Jackson showed incredible grace, the depth and knowledge of the country’s legal system, and demonstrated excellent poise and temperament during what was an ugly [partisan smear campaign](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43929117/339330772/658664073?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjcwOGQ3YS03NmI3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S-Tt1FUj0sRn5VIu1zvbihqOhWD7b25xR8PoLcpWeZg=&emci=8a4606ea-62b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=7f708d7a-76b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4925535) – characteristics all required to serve on the nation’s highest court. Unfortunately, Indiana’s U.S. Senators let their partisanship come before American history. Jackson met [prerequisite](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43929120/339330775/-5621864?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjcwOGQ3YS03NmI3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S-Tt1FUj0sRn5VIu1zvbihqOhWD7b25xR8PoLcpWeZg=&emci=8a4606ea-62b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=7f708d7a-76b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4925535) [standards](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43929124/339330779/1185550320?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjcwOGQ3YS03NmI3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S-Tt1FUj0sRn5VIu1zvbihqOhWD7b25xR8PoLcpWeZg=&emci=8a4606ea-62b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=7f708d7a-76b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4925535) asked by Todd Young and Mike Braun, but both politicians repeatedly shifted the goal posts to fulfill an partisan outcome that was predetermined the moment President Biden announced Jackson as his nominee. For Young and Braun, Justice Jackson’s confirmation process was more about political performance than fulfilling their constitutionally required duties. President Joe Biden and Democrats consistently prove to be the adults in the room and have plans to create a better future for _all Americans_ , while unfortunately, the only plan Indiana Republicans have is their partisanship - an agenda that does not reflect the values of this nation.” _**\- Mike Schmuhl, Chairman of the Indiana Democratic Party**_ **\- Holcomb, Indiana GOP Say “NO” to Hoosiers Saving $126 a Month at the Pump -** Indiana Democrats criticized Governor Eric Holcomb and the Indiana Republican Party this week for refusing to help ease the burden high gas prices have brought to Hoosier families. Holcomb announced this week he would not support lowering the price at the pump because the state hadn’t yet “[hit that threshold](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43929129/339330783/1933869343?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjcwOGQ3YS03NmI3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S-Tt1FUj0sRn5VIu1zvbihqOhWD7b25xR8PoLcpWeZg=&emci=8a4606ea-62b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=7f708d7a-76b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4925535)”. _Tell that to Hoosier families struggling to afford gas and make ends meet._ These comments follow the statehouse Republican supermajority’s decision to oppose pausing the gas tax during the 2022 legislative session.
### **Governor Holcomb’s remarks are another reminder the Indiana Republican Party has no plan to address higher costs burdening families, just partisanship.**
In contrast, Indiana Democrats have a plan to solve this important kitchen-table issue for Hoosier families. During the 2022 legislative session, statehouse Democrats proposed issuing a temporary pause on the state’s gas tax. This would have saved Hoosiers [30 cents and a 7-percent sales tax per gallon of gas](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43929139/339330792/1933869343?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjcwOGQ3YS03NmI3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S-Tt1FUj0sRn5VIu1zvbihqOhWD7b25xR8PoLcpWeZg=&emci=8a4606ea-62b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=7f708d7a-76b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4925535). For a Hoosier buying 20 gallons of gas a week, that would save them at least $126 a month. Indiana Democrats advocated for these savings, but the Indiana GOP said “NO” because they put their partisanship ahead of a brighter future for Hoosiers. **\- American Rescue Plan Provides Home Security for Hoosier Families -** Democrats also celebrated how President Joe Biden’s American Rescue Plan is providing home security for Hoosier families. Thanks to Democrats like Congressmen André Carson and Frank Mrvan, [about $167 million will be used to help homeowners](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43929149/339330801/1238166276?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjcwOGQ3YS03NmI3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S-Tt1FUj0sRn5VIu1zvbihqOhWD7b25xR8PoLcpWeZg=&emci=8a4606ea-62b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=7f708d7a-76b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4925535) catch up on mortgage, insurance, and property tax payments. Providing this kind of relief will no doubt create a better future for Hoosiers. In contrast, the Indiana Republican Party said “NO” to this brighter future. Politicians like U.S. Senator Todd Young voted “NO” on these investments, and in fact, Indiana GOP Chairman Kyle Hupfer called this program by the Indiana Housing Authority “[socialism](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43929158/339330812/-1180238315?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjcwOGQ3YS03NmI3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S-Tt1FUj0sRn5VIu1zvbihqOhWD7b25xR8PoLcpWeZg=&emci=8a4606ea-62b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=7f708d7a-76b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4925535)” – claiming this opposition was a “[great campaign to run on](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43929163/339330822/178131055?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjcwOGQ3YS03NmI3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S-Tt1FUj0sRn5VIu1zvbihqOhWD7b25xR8PoLcpWeZg=&emci=8a4606ea-62b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=7f708d7a-76b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4925535)”. Democrats will highlight how the Indiana GOP has no plan for Indiana’s future – just a divisive partisan agenda. **\- Indiana Democratic Party is Hiring -** **Regional Organizing Directors** The Indiana Democratic Party is hiring Regional Organizing Directors to to build a stronger party in the field throughout the Hoosier State. The role is ideal for someone looking to be more involved in politics and party building and who wants to dedicate themselves to learning more about the inner workings of campaigns, strategic planning, and voter targeting and contact. These are important roles to building back a fair and equitable two party system of government in Indiana. For full job descriptions and how to apply visit our website at [https://www.indems.org/jobs/](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43929165/339330825/1076440731?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjcwOGQ3YS03NmI3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S-Tt1FUj0sRn5VIu1zvbihqOhWD7b25xR8PoLcpWeZg=&emci=8a4606ea-62b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=7f708d7a-76b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4925535) **Spring and Summer Interns** The Indiana Democratic Party is offering a very exciting opportunity for talented and dedicated individuals interested in gaining experience in the fast-paced world of politics. The Party is seeking to fill internship roles at its headquarters in Indianapolis. This is an outstanding opportunity to get hands-on experience working in the office of a state political party and contribute to the success of all of our Democratic candidates.
#### Benefits
* Valuable skills and firsthand insight into the inner workings of the political and legislative process
* Networking with Indiana Democratic Party leaders, activists, staff, candidates, and elected officials
* Enhanced communication and organizational skills
* Work as part of a dedicated team that is interested in your personal development
* This position is a paid internship through a monthly stipend, interns will also be provided with free parking and opportunities for future training, travel, permanent positions, and career advancement in the field.
* We will work with academic institutions if interns are seeking college credit for this internship. Interns must submit the proper paperwork to the Party and their school.

#### _Intern Duties_
Interns will provide administrative support to party staff. Responsibilities may include:
* campaign research
* voter outreach
* data entry
* assistance with local campaign events
* special projects

####
_Qualifications_
Applicants must be:
* passionate about Democratic politics
* trustworthy and responsible
* able to communicate effectively with others
* flexible and willing to help when needed
* able to work on multiple tasks at once

#### _How to Apply_
Interested applicants need to submit their cover letter, resume, and three professional references to Lauren Ganapini at [lauren@indems.org](mailto:lauren@indems.org). ###
