name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: goin down to Mar-A-Lago
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
“They all come here,” he said.
#
Derek — did you catch Donald Trump’s new interview with the _Washington Post_?
> _Out on the patio was_** _David McCormick_** _, the Pennsylvania GOP Senate candidate and hedge fund honcho who wanted [Donald Trump’s] endorsement. McCormick met with Trump later Wednesday. Trump asked a reporter if he should endorse McCormick or Dr. Oz and said he would be making a decision in “about a week," noting that he was torn._**_“They all come here,” he said._**
Now BOTH of our ultra-wealthy GOP opponents have made trips down to Mar-A-Lago to court Donald Trump’s official endorsement. It sounds like the endorsement could be coming any day now. 😱😱😱
We cannot understate how urgent it is that we prepare for Donald Trump’s involvement in our race.
_After all, Trump won Pennsylvania in 2016._
**[Derek, can you help our team stand up and fight back against Trump by making a donation today? There is a lot of national attention on our race, and we need all hands on deck to help fight against whatever the Republicans and their super PACs are going to throw our way.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47029?refcode=em20220408-5312&t=1&akid=5312%2E434096%2En2Ux7p)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47029?refcode=em20220408-5312&amounts=5&t=20&akid=5312%2E434096%2En2Ux7p)**
TBH, no matter who Trump chooses, we know what to expect from the GOP nominee in this race. Because Dr. Oz + David McCormick both:
* Align themselves with Trump whenever they can
* Are two out-of-state carpetbaggers
* Have _millions of $$$_ from their own fortunes to spend on this race

At this point in the race, there’s only one Democratic candidate who has the support + resources to beat either of these guys. **John Fetterman.**
Derek, if we’re going to flip PA’s Senate seat blue + save our Democratic majority, we have to rise up to this moment. Any day now, Trump will make his endorsement + throw his weight into this race. We need to be ready.
**[If you’re ready to fight back against Trump, please consider chipping in a donation of any amount today to help send John to the U.S. Senate and flip this seat blue.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47029?refcode=em20220408-5312&t=21&akid=5312%2E434096%2En2Ux7p)**
Together, we can win this.
Thanks for your support,
— Team Fetterman HQ 💛

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220408-5312-footer&t=22&refcode2=5312_434096_n2Ux7p&akid=5312%2E434096%2En2Ux7p)**

clean_body: “They all come here,” he said. Derek — did you catch Donald Trump’s new interview with the Washington Post? Out on the patio was David McCormick , the Pennsylvania GOP Senate candidate and hedge fund honcho who wanted [Donald Trump’s] endorsement. McCormick met with Trump later Wednesday. Trump asked a reporter if he should endorse McCormick or Dr. Oz and said he would be making a decision in “about a week," noting that he was torn.“They all come here,” he said. Now BOTH of our ultra-wealthy GOP opponents have made trips down to Mar-A-Lago to court Donald Trump’s official endorsement. It sounds like the endorsement could be coming any day now. 😱😱😱 We cannot understate how urgent it is that we prepare for Donald Trump’s involvement in our race. After all, Trump won Pennsylvania in 2016. TBH, no matter who Trump chooses, we know what to expect from the GOP nominee in this race. Because Dr. Oz + David McCormick both: Align themselves with Trump whenever they can Are two out-of-state carpetbaggers Have millions of $$$ from their own fortunes to spend on this race At this point in the race, there’s only one Democratic candidate who has the support + resources to beat either of these guys. John Fetterman. Derek, if we’re going to flip PA’s Senate seat blue + save our Democratic majority, we have to rise up to this moment. Any day now, Trump will make his endorsement + throw his weight into this race. We need to be ready. Together, we can win this. Thanks for your support, — Team Fetterman HQ 💛 | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

body:
If we fall short, we are at risk of losing. And if Mark loses, that means Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell.
#
Peter,
We’re trying hard, but with just a few days to go before our must-reach flash fundraising deadline comes to a close, we’re short of where we need to be. _Real_ _short_.
That’s bad news.

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: a joyous day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VAN HOLLEN FOR SENATE
body:
As sweet as this moment is, it's also a strong reminder of the dangers that lie ahead
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43930127/339335821/396464211?refcode=em-logo&source=em220408-1-a&refcode2=a76fae6e-7ab7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&contactdata=LMygpPEvB8P+LkkiMbl898DVCSP3EkOYG4fhHuwCGdvqNYftuLQ5Fq52ZbFy9CW3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzZmYWU2ZS03YWI3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xkh0bXBNYgyTzEcJBXHlE1reY9Y9QOTwI87NzjlZNg0=)
Friend —
It's been said before, but it's worth saying again: Yesterday, was a joyous day!
We made history by confirming Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson to serve on our nation’s highest court. She is one of the most qualified nominees we have ever seen and her confirmation represents an important step forward in the long and difficult road we have traveled as a country to build a more just and perfect union.
But as sweet as this moment is, it's also a strong reminder of the dangers that lie ahead. Without our important victories at the ballot box in November 2020, this historic confirmation would not have been possible. Republicans know that and have been working overtime to pass legislation in states across our country to make it harder for key Democratic constituencies to vote in 2022.
And, in case there is any doubt, yesterday Mitch McConnell announced that if Republicans win control of the US Senate in November, and there is another opening on the Supreme Court, he refused to commit to even holding hearings on ANY Biden nominee to fill that opening.
The stakes we face in November don't get much clearer than that. We need to get every single Democratic voter energized and to the polls in these upcoming elections. And I don't think it's an exaggeration to say that our future depends on it.
[**So, I'm asking — are you up for the work ahead to protect and expand our majorities and ensure Mitch McConnell, Ted Cruz, Josh Hawley, and the rest of them don't get to control the agenda for the next two years — and maybe beyond? Click here to let us know you are in this fight.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43930129/339335823/-1193815466?source=em220408-1-a&refcode2=a76fae6e-7ab7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&contactdata=LMygpPEvB8P+LkkiMbl898DVCSP3EkOYG4fhHuwCGdvqNYftuLQ5Fq52ZbFy9CW3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzZmYWU2ZS03YWI3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xkh0bXBNYgyTzEcJBXHlE1reY9Y9QOTwI87NzjlZNg0=&emci=ce3fe57a-61b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=a76fae6e-7ab7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=2216363)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43930131/339335825/-1193815466?source=em220408-1-a&refcode2=a76fae6e-7ab7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&contactdata=LMygpPEvB8P+LkkiMbl898DVCSP3EkOYG4fhHuwCGdvqNYftuLQ5Fq52ZbFy9CW3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzZmYWU2ZS03YWI3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xkh0bXBNYgyTzEcJBXHlE1reY9Y9QOTwI87NzjlZNg0=&emci=ce3fe57a-61b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=a76fae6e-7ab7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=2216363)**
For 15 months now, with our slim 50:50 Senate majority, we have battled to move President Biden's agenda forward. We have made important progress helping American families, workers and small businesses that were battered by the pandemic, getting people back to work again, and passing a once-in-a-generation infrastructure plan. We have also made progress repairing some of the damage from Donald Trump’s assault on our institutions, our historic alliances with NATO and democratic countries around the world — and much more. But Senate Republicans have fought us practically every step of the way.
Even today, as we face Putin's brutal war, an unprecedented number of key national security positions still remain empty because Senate Republicans like Ted Cruz and Josh Hawley refuse to lift their holds on President Biden's nominees.
We need to recognize the very dangerous consequences if Mitch McConnell were to win control of the Senate — and we must work every day to make sure that doesn’t happen.
Thank you for all you do to protect and defend this democracy of ours.
Onwards.
Chris
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43930134/339335827/-1193815466?source=em220408-1-a&refcode2=a76fae6e-7ab7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&contactdata=LMygpPEvB8P+LkkiMbl898DVCSP3EkOYG4fhHuwCGdvqNYftuLQ5Fq52ZbFy9CW3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzZmYWU2ZS03YWI3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xkh0bXBNYgyTzEcJBXHlE1reY9Y9QOTwI87NzjlZNg0=&emci=ce3fe57a-61b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=a76fae6e-7ab7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=2216363)**

Time is running out, and we need bold leaders who aren’t afraid to advocate for a livable planet for future generations. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Together we can make real change for future generations. Thank you, Sara * | | = Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress Sara Jacobs for Congress 660 Pennsylvania Ave SE Suite 202 Washington, DC 20003 United States | | | ---|---|--- = If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please

name: Rob Secaur
subject: Weekly Update from the Campaign Trail
body:
Jane Timken for Ohio Update| | | [](https://)
---
| | Dear Peter, With early voting starting on Tuesday and the last scheduled debate of the primary in the books, Jane is in a great position and our best in the nation grassroots team is ready to finish strong. With just 25 days until Election Day, Jane is working hard every day to gain support and our team is knocking doors and making phone calls across the state so Jane can win this race. I hope you’ll take a few minutes to learn more.
---
| | **Jane is Tied for 2nd in a Wide-Open Race**
---
New polling shows that Jane continues to rise as we get closer to Election Day and she is in a statistical tie for 2nd place. Ohio voters are looking for the strongest candidate who can deliver for Ohio conservatives, champion the America First agenda, and defeat Democrats in November. Jane Timken is the obvious choice for Ohio Republicans and that is showing.
---
---
Despite being outspent by every single candidate, Jane continues to rise due to her message and strength as a candidate. Jane will continue to make the case to voters that she is the best candidate to stop the Biden socialist agenda in its tracks until we cross the finish line as the Republican nominee in just 27 days.
---
**From the Trail**
---
Last Saturday was our first Super Saturday of the spring! Volunteers across the state hit the streets and burned down the phone lines to support Jane’s America First campaign for U.S. Senate. Below is just a sampling of all the activity across the state!

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Jaworski?=
subject: what it takes to lead
disclaimer_text: paid for by Joe Jaworski
body:
It takes guts to lead. It takes vision. It takes experience. Joe Jaworski knows that because he's taken on the challenge before. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jaworskifortexas/2022-13618794?e=5d8d80652b)
---
| | [ ](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=566e037648&e=5d8d80652b)
---
| | , It takes guts to lead. It takes vision. It takes experience.

**But really, it takes guts.** Joe Jaworski knows that because he's taken on the challenge before.

When Joe became Galveston’s 55th Mayor in 2010, he was the first Mayor elected after Hurricane Ike severely flooded and damaged his community in 2008. **Included in the devastation was 569 units of public housing, lost to Ike’s flood waters. **

It was determined the properties were beyond repair, but before the bulldozers could raze the projects, legal and community advocates made a pledge to rebuild all 569 units - “one for one.”

One of Joe's first acts as Mayor was to announce a bold new vision for the Galveston Housing Authority, one in which mixed-income housing would replace the recently demolished projects. **Joe would see to it that Galveston built not just housing, but a true community.**

[](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=d68f3c3aef&e=5d8d80652b)

Unfortunately, a cabal of Galveston’s low-income apartment owners and Section 8 landlords considered this plan unwelcome competition, and these self-interested parties waged a negative misinformation campaign designed to block the effort. **The opposition was ugly and intense, but Joe stood his ground.**

**Today, the Cedars at Carver Park and the Villas on the Strand are fully occupied, wholesome, attractive neighborhoods.** Joe's team delivered on their promise, building not just housing, but realizing a community. The people who fought Joe's vision are silent now.

**It is a uniquely Galveston story, one of a community’s determination, resilience and rebuilding.**

And it's an example of why Joe Jaworski is the leader we need as the next Texas Attorney General.

**Joe Jaworski won't back down. And he will do what is right for the people. **

[**Donate today and help us make Joe the People's Attorney.**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=440cea6936&e=5d8d80652b)

— Team Jaworski

[**For more on this, read Joe's full account here.**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=05950d130d&e=5d8d80652b)

---

name: Laurel Imer
subject: We’re on the ballot!
body:
I am both humbled and excited
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qZhtI40s6YzmNWq2T7aCw82zaKSNdKrsDkRgO0OKvqDy5FfULqpGYfbPdrsbCU6wHXuV7qEQD9zGpygMGhx6EjiOw183IXYEiFPFn_lAk21H7eVbpbhEvTVYQ19EXKBd4Jxny0c_ZuZhMHlv7v7DzvTse2UFKCom7mr1iI7kCSF1BBMfrYbxlC9f1H4LKi-r&c=IROXwmGW3-gA9oURV1HOjanb7qiXKR-HEgNe-Hy3IEJaiH7eAdWkgQ==&ch=XLBUND0tO8K-9raGm0JmVS5CjAwweMVnOnSJ20ymKJ0oAv_nMS6ljA==)
---
|
---
| |
---
| Dear Fellow Patriot,
I am both humbled and excited to report we have made it on the ballot after winning a hefty vote at the CO-07 assembly.
Today, Republicans in Colorado sent a message to the woke Left, the power elite, and their establishment enablers. The message is this: the American people will not be silenced.
I make no bones about it- I am an America First Republican to the core. We are not relics of the past that the establishment can just shake off. NO! We are the future of this party, the future of this country, and we WILL turn Colorado Red Again.
Let's think back to 2018 when Trump's policies were in full swing. We had peace at home and abroad. We could fill our gas tank without worrying about paying for our children's school. We didn't worry about parents being investigated by the FBI and DOJ for saying their piece at school board meetings. This is bigger than Trump and we will show it in November. We know what freedom and prosperity look like in the 21st century and we will bring them back to our country.
From the bottom of my heart, I thank everyone who donated to my campaign and supported me in this convention. This is a banner day. Let it inspire us to work harder and take America back in 2022.
They tried to take us down with deceptive and dirty tactics, but we're still here and we're nowhere close to stopping. Help me send the establishment a message!
---

clean_body: I am both humbled and excited | | | | | | | == | | | | Dear Fellow Patriot, I am both humbled and excited to report we have made it on the ballot after winning a hefty vote at the CO-07 assembly. Today, Republicans in Colorado sent a message to the woke Left, the power elite, and their establishment enablers. The message is this: the American people will not be silenced. I make no bones about it- I am an America First Republican to the core. We are not relics of the past that the establishment can just shake off. NO! We are the future of this party, the future of this country, and we WILL turn Colorado Red Again. Let's think back to 2018 when Trump's policies were in full swing. We had peace at home and abroad. We could fill our gas tank without worrying about paying for our children's school. We didn't worry about parents being investigated by the FBI and DOJ for saying their piece at school board meetings. This is bigger than Trump and we will show it in November. We know what freedom and prosperity look like in the 21st century and we will bring them back to our country. From the bottom of my heart, I thank everyone who donated to my campaign and supported me in this convention. This is a banner day. Let it inspire us to work harder and take America back in 2022. They tried to take us down with deceptive and dirty tactics, but we're still here and we're nowhere close to stopping. Help me send the establishment a message! | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | Yours Truly, | == Laurel Imer Republican Candidate, CO-07 == | | | | | == | == == == | == | | | == | This email was Paid for By Laurel Imer for Congress This email was sent by Prodigy Consulting Group, LLC with authorization from Laurel Imer for Congress and approval by Laurel Imer | | Laurel Imer for Congress | PO Box 17747, Golden, CO 80402 | | Sent by mailto:contact@laurelimerforcongress.com powered by

body:
Sen. Steven Roberts discusses education funding and the 'Ahmaud Arbery Act' this week in Jefferson City. | | | |
---
| | |
# Capitol Report
April 8, 2022
---
|
---
| [ ](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=15a08dd53e&e=a088917f89)
---
Sen. Steven Roberts, D-St. Louis discusses education funding and the 'Ahmaud Arbery Act' this week in Jefferson City.
|
---
| **Contact Senator Roberts** 201 W. Capitol Ave., Rm 329
Jefferson City, MO 65101
(573) 751-4415
Steve.Roberts@senate.mo.gov
---
| | | | | | [](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=18b34ef867&e=a088917f89)

| | [](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=ec81599842&e=a088917f89)

| | [](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=bb72bb964a&e=a088917f89)
---
|
---
| **HOUSE APPROVES WEAKENING VOTING RIGHTS PROTECTIONS**
The House of Representatives on April 6 voted 97-45 to pass Republican legislation that could severely weaken the Missouri Constitution’s voting rights protections and allow lawmakers to exclude certain legal voters from participating. The measure advances to the Senate and would go on the Nov. 8 ballot for voter ratification if it wins final legislative passage.

The state constitution currently protects voting rights for “all” U.S. citizens who are at least 18 years old, Missouri residents and registered to vote. House Joint Resolution 131 would change it to say “only” people who meet those requirements can vote. However, that simple one-word shift would eliminate the constitution’s current absolute guarantee of voting rights to those who meet the constitutional requirements and enable the legislature to pass laws disenfranchising certain subsets of otherwise eligible voters.
---
|
---
| **GOP OFFICIALS SUE OVER CONGRESSIONAL REDISTRICTING FAILURE**
Two top Missouri Republican Party officials sued Secretary of State Jay Ashcroft on March 31 seeking to block him from using the state’s decade-old congressional districts for the 2022 elections and asking a judge to draw new districts given the General Assembly’s failure to do so. The lawsuit is similar to one filed weeks earlier on behalf of Democratic voters.

The House of Representatives and Senate, both controlled by Republicans, remain deadlocked over redrawing Missouri’s eight congressional districts to reflect population shifts under the 2020 U.S. Census. In the absence of new districts, Ashcroft, also a Republican, allowed candidates for the Aug. 2 congressional primaries to file under the state’s outdated congressional map enacted in 2011. Both the Republican and Democratic lawsuits contend the current districts are unconstitutional and can’t be used since they aren’t based on the most recent Census.

The two cases were filed in Cole County and assigned to the same judge. As of April 6, no action had been taken in either.
---
|
---
| **HOUSE VOTES TO SIGNIFICANTLY REDUCE UNEMPLOYMENT BENEFITS** Republicans on April 6 took another run at significantly weakening the unemployment safety net by granting preliminary approval to legislation cutting the maximum number of weeks of benefits from the current 20 weeks to as low as six weeks. A second vote is required to advance the bill, which Democrats opposed, to the Senate.

Reducing unemployment benefits has been a Republican goal for more than a decade. In 2015, a bill cutting the duration of benefits to as few as 13 weeks cleared the legislature, but then-Gov. Jay Nixon, a Democrat, vetoed it. The Missouri Supreme Court later ruled a subsequent veto override invalid because the Senate missed the constitutional window for taking its override vote.

Republicans have been trying to enact unemployment benefit cuts into law ever since but so far have been unsuccessful. The latest legislation seeking to do so is House Bill 1860.
---
|
---
| **2022 SENATE BILLS**
[**SB 714**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=3abcfe6412&e=a088917f89) \- Modifies provisions relating to parole eligibility

[**SB 715**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=5bc77fa9cb&e=a088917f89) \- Authorizes a property tax credit for certain senior citizens

[**SB 716**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=ecd2198578&e=a088917f89) \- Creates new provisions relating to financial institutions

[_**SB 965**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=8cf70ec4b0&e=a088917f89) \- Modifies the practice of dentistry to include the prescription and administration of vaccines

[_**SB 1013**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=edca89a1bf&e=a088917f89) \- Modifies the Show-Me Heroes Program to provide for grants for veteran apprenticeship training programs

[_**SB 1016**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=52ed1f5e7b&e=a088917f89) \- Modifies provisions relating to the offense of unlawful use of weapons

[_**SB 1079**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=0f9114a407&e=a088917f89) \- Relating to the legal minimum standard for valuation of insurance policies and contracts

[_**SB 1087**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=8331f9af31&e=a088917f89) \- Creates provisions relating to certificates of moral character for persons convicted of certain offenses

[_**SB 1116**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=da6dac1a0a&e=a088917f89) \- Modifies provisions relating to travel insurance

[_**SB 1131**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=fd97a50cae&e=a088917f89) \- Modifies provisions relating to arrests by private persons

[_**SB 1132**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=35434518ee&e=a088917f89) \- Modifies provisions relating to wrongful convictions

[_**SB 1136**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=7f863ccd10&e=a088917f89)\- Authorizes a tax credit for employers providing educational assistance to employees

[_**SB 1137**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=153f32c112&e=a088917f89) \- Establishes provisions relating to inquiries of wage ranges

[_**SB 1148**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=9f2010a75a&e=a088917f89) \- Establishes provisions relating to alternative dispute resolution processes

[_**SB 1151**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=537f57b1f0&e=a088917f89) \- Creates provisions relating to grants to not-for-profit organizations for physical security measures

[_**SB 1165**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=572504e78c&e=a088917f89)\- Designates "Police Officer Tamarris Bohannon Memorial Bridge"

[_**SB 1190**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=9fb23c8972&e=a088917f89) \- Modifies provisions relating to the Municipal Land Reutilization Law

[_**SB 1233**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=b4b5972345&e=a088917f89) - Authorizes a tax credit for contributions made to refugee resource centers

[_**SB 1234**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=ca55f0c367&e=a088917f89) - Modifies provisions relating to warrants executed by law enforcement officers

[_**SCR 24**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=6d9b7a2438&e=a088917f89) \- Designates every November 7th as Victims of Communism Memorial Day

[**SJR 41**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=e49e5ae299&e=a088917f89) \- Authorizes a freeze on property tax assessments for senior citizens

| **HELP FOR SMALL BUSINESS AND NON- PROFITS **
The U.S. Small Business Administration approved Missouri’s request for assistance through the federal agency’s disaster loan program. This move makes low-interest disaster loans available to small businesses and private non-profits severely impacted by the Coronavirus (COVID-19).

SBA’s Economic Injury Disaster Loans offer up to $2 million in assistance for each affected small business or non-profit. These loans can provide vital economic support to small businesses to help overcome the temporary loss of revenue they are experiencing.

Applicants will be able to apply online, receive additional disaster assistance information and [download applications](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=fbf378711a&e=a088917f89). Applicants may also call SBA’s Customer Service Center at (800) 659-2955 or email [disastercustomerservice@sba.gov](mailto:disastercustomerservice@sba.gov) for more information on SBA disaster assistance.

| **RX OUTREACH EXPANDS ELIGIBILITY **
Below is a memo from a trusted non-profit:

As a non-profit, mail-order pharmacy, Rx Outreach is uniquely positioned to help stop the spread of COVID-19 for people who are quarantined and those who may be afraid to travel outside of their homes to the clinic or pharmacy.

Rx Outreach lifted its income guidelines during this crisis so that **anyone, regardless of income, can participate in their program.**

Rx Outreach medication prices are generally 70-80% below retail and are transparent. Shipping is free.

---
|
---
| **LOW-COST INSULIN** Before COVID-19 insulin users were having a difficult time affording medication due to the tripling of the cost over the last decade. In the wake of COVID-19, it has become even more difficult for those who rely on insulin to afford the inflated cost. Eli Lilly and Company has introduced a program to purchase Basaglar insulin at significant cost savings. Please call Lilly Diabetes Solution Center at 833-808-1234 between 9 am and 9 pm, M-F to see if you qualify for these savings. More information can be found at the [Eli Lilly and Co. Website](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=274ce28e8d&e=a088917f89).

clean_body: Sen. Steven Roberts discusses education funding and the 'Ahmaud Arbery Act' this week in Jefferson City. | | | | | | | Capitol Report April 8, 2022 | | Sen. Steven Roberts, D-St. Louis discusses education funding and the 'Ahmaud Arbery Act' this week in Jefferson City. | | Contact Senator Roberts 201 W. Capitol Ave., Rm 329 Jefferson City, MO 65101 (573) 751-4415 Steve.Roberts@senate.mo.gov | | | | | | | | | | | | HOUSE APPROVES WEAKENING VOTING RIGHTS PROTECTIONS The House of Representatives on April 6 voted 97-45 to pass Republican legislation that could severely weaken the Missouri Constitution’s voting rights protections and allow lawmakers to exclude certain legal voters from participating. The measure advances to the Senate and would go on the Nov. 8 ballot for voter ratification if it wins final legislative passage. The state constitution currently protects voting rights for “all” U.S. citizens who are at least 18 years old, Missouri residents and registered to vote. House Joint Resolution 131 would change it to say “only” people who meet those requirements can vote. However, that simple one-word shift would eliminate the constitution’s current absolute guarantee of voting rights to those who meet the constitutional requirements and enable the legislature to pass laws disenfranchising certain subsets of otherwise eligible voters. | | GOP OFFICIALS SUE OVER CONGRESSIONAL REDISTRICTING FAILURE Two top Missouri Republican Party officials sued Secretary of State Jay Ashcroft on March 31 seeking to block him from using the state’s decade-old congressional districts for the 2022 elections and asking a judge to draw new districts given the General Assembly’s failure to do so. The lawsuit is similar to one filed weeks earlier on behalf of Democratic voters. The House of Representatives and Senate, both controlled by Republicans, remain deadlocked over redrawing Missouri’s eight congressional districts to reflect population shifts under the 2020 U.S. Census. In the absence of new districts, Ashcroft, also a Republican, allowed candidates for the Aug. 2 congressional primaries to file under the state’s outdated congressional map enacted in 2011. Both the Republican and Democratic lawsuits contend the current districts are unconstitutional and can’t be used since they aren’t based on the most recent Census. The two cases were filed in Cole County and assigned to the same judge. As of April 6, no action had been taken in either. | | HOUSE VOTES TO SIGNIFICANTLY REDUCE UNEMPLOYMENT BENEFITS Republicans on April 6 took another run at significantly weakening the unemployment safety net by granting preliminary approval to legislation cutting the maximum number of weeks of benefits from the current 20 weeks to as low as six weeks. A second vote is required to advance the bill, which Democrats opposed, to the Senate. Reducing unemployment benefits has been a Republican goal for more than a decade. In 2015, a bill cutting the duration of benefits to as few as 13 weeks cleared the legislature, but then-Gov. Jay Nixon, a Democrat, vetoed it. The Missouri Supreme Court later ruled a subsequent veto override invalid because the Senate missed the constitutional window for taking its override vote. Republicans have been trying to enact unemployment benefit cuts into law ever since but so far have been unsuccessful. The latest legislation seeking to do so is House Bill 1860. | | 2022 SENATE BILLS \- Modifies provisions relating to parole eligibility \- Authorizes a property tax credit for certain senior citizens \- Creates new provisions relating to financial institutions \- Modifies the practice of dentistry to include the prescription and administration of vaccines \- Modifies the Show-Me Heroes Program to provide for grants for veteran apprenticeship training programs \- Modifies provisions relating to the offense of unlawful use of weapons \- Relating to the legal minimum standard for valuation of insurance policies and contracts \- Creates provisions relating to certificates of moral character for persons convicted of certain offenses \- Modifies provisions relating to travel insurance \- Modifies provisions relating to arrests by private persons \- Modifies provisions relating to wrongful convictions \- Authorizes a tax credit for employers providing educational assistance to employees \- Establishes provisions relating to inquiries of wage ranges \- Establishes provisions relating to alternative dispute resolution processes \- Creates provisions relating to grants to not-for-profit organizations for physical security measures \- Designates "Police Officer Tamarris Bohannon Memorial Bridge" \- Modifies provisions relating to the Municipal Land Reutilization Law - Authorizes a tax credit for contributions made to refugee resource centers - Modifies provisions relating to warrants executed by law enforcement officers \- Designates every November 7th as Victims of Communism Memorial Day \- Authorizes a freeze on property tax assessments for senior citizens | | 2022 CO-SPONSORED BILLS \- Establishes the "Truth in Medicine Act" (Schupp) | | "Signed By Governor" | "Truly Agreed Bills" | | | | | HELP FOR SMALL BUSINESS AND NON- PROFITS The U.S. Small Business Administration approved Missouri’s request for assistance through the federal agency’s disaster loan program. This move makes low-interest disaster loans available to small businesses and private non-profits severely impacted by the Coronavirus (COVID-19). SBA’s Economic Injury Disaster Loans offer up to $2 million in assistance for each affected small business or non-profit. These loans can provide vital economic support to small businesses to help overcome the temporary loss of revenue they are experiencing. Applicants will be able to apply online, receive additional disaster assistance information and . Applicants may also call SBA’s Customer Service Center at (800) 659-2955 or email mailto:disastercustomerservice@sba.gov for more information on SBA disaster assistance. | | | | SAFE SHELTERING RESOURCES Sheltering in place can be difficult for anyone, and some of our neighbors might not be safe due to violence at home. If you or someone you know needs help, please visit or call 314-531-2003. You can also contact at 314-993-2777. | | COMMUNITY RESOURCE LIST The has a COVID-19 Community Economic Relief Fund. If you need help paying bills, rent, or food call 866-211-9966. : : | | | | | | MEDICAL RESOURCES The Department of Health COVID-19 hotline is open from 8 a.m. - 10 p.m. Call 314-657-1499 with questions or concerns. The Missouri Department of Health and Senior Services hotline can be reached at tel:%20\(877\%20435-8411). | | | | | | RX OUTREACH EXPANDS ELIGIBILITY Below is a memo from a trusted non-profit: As a non-profit, mail-order pharmacy, Rx Outreach is uniquely positioned to help stop the spread of COVID-19 for people who are quarantined and those who may be afraid to travel outside of their homes to the clinic or pharmacy. Rx Outreach lifted its income guidelines during this crisis so that anyone, regardless of income, can participate in their program. Rx Outreach medication prices are generally 70-80% below retail and are transparent. Shipping is free. | | LOW-COST INSULIN Before COVID-19 insulin users were having a difficult time affording medication due to the tripling of the cost over the last decade. In the wake of COVID-19, it has become even more difficult for those who rely on insulin to afford the inflated cost. Eli Lilly and Company has introduced a program to purchase Basaglar insulin at significant cost savings. Please call Lilly Diabetes Solution Center at 833-808-1234 between 9 am and 9 pm, M-F to see if you qualify for these savings. More information can be found at the . | | "COVID-19 Food Stamp Information" | "Student Loans - COVID-19" | "When and How to Use Masks" | | Stay up to date on COVID -19 by using this online resource guide for creditable information while at home. | | Check the Status of your Missouri State Tax refund | | | CITIZENS SERVICE BUREAU If you are having issues with street lights, dumpsters, trees, graffiti, potholes or other such items, please report them to the Citizens' Service Bureau. subject: re: Amazon workers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
Please don't skip this email

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43931803/339342555/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDc4NTNhNS04MWI3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m8r5Nc5bIxmms5RwrJNGcVpA_aJkWm1fGy6Lz3Mqt3s=)
---
Peter, I know you don’t always have the time to read a longer email like this one. But this is a really important one to me, all about labor rights, so I hope you’ll read the whole thing.

**[If you’re not able to, I hope you’ll consider chipping in $3 to my reelection campaign so I have the resources to keep fighting for working families »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43931804/339342556/653852622?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20220408_EMDF_E1_T1_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDc4NTNhNS04MWI3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m8r5Nc5bIxmms5RwrJNGcVpA_aJkWm1fGy6Lz3Mqt3s=)** | [$1,500 GOAL: CHIP IN $3 TO REELECT PROGRESSIVE MARK TAKANO »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43931805/339342557/653852622?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20220408_EMDF_E1_T1_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDc4NTNhNS04MWI3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m8r5Nc5bIxmms5RwrJNGcVpA_aJkWm1fGy6Lz3Mqt3s=)
---
**You may have heard but earlier this week, Amazon workers made history by organizing the first ever Amazon labor union in New York.**

This is a huge win, not just for the Amazon Labor Union, but for every single Amazon employee and every worker in our country.

**As a high school teacher for 20 years, I was a proud union member of the National Education Association** – _I know how critical unions are to supporting workers rights._

Workers are the backbone of America and we cannot “Build Back Better” without strong labor unions and guaranteed workers' rights. It’s why I introduced legislation to reduce the workweek to 4 days instead of 5, paying employees overtime for hours worked over 32 hours per week.

Unfortunately, Republicans couldn’t care less about working class Americans. They’re busy picking petty fights, spreading conspiracy theories, and spouting hate – _they’re being completely useless!_

**That’s why it would be so tragic if Democrats lose the House in 2022, like many pundits are predicting.**

Because the honest truth is, we’re on the precipice of instituting our progressive vision for America. We just need a little more time.

**[Peter, that’s why I’m humbly asking: Will you chip in $3 to help me keep my new Congressional district blue and save our House majority? I am committed to worker’s rights but I need your help to keep serving you. »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43931806/339342558/653852622?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20220408_EMDF_E1_T1_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDc4NTNhNS04MWI3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m8r5Nc5bIxmms5RwrJNGcVpA_aJkWm1fGy6Lz3Mqt3s=)**

clean_body: Please don't skip this email | = Peter, I know you don’t always have the time to read a longer email like this one. But this is a really important one to me, all about labor rights, so I hope you’ll read the whole thing. = | = You may have heard but earlier this week, Amazon workers made history by organizing the first ever Amazon labor union in New York. This is a huge win, not just for the Amazon Labor Union, but for every single Amazon employee and every worker in our country. As a high school teacher for 20 years, I was a proud union member of the National Education Association – I know how critical unions are to supporting workers rights. Workers are the backbone of America and we cannot “Build Back Better” without strong labor unions and guaranteed workers' rights. It’s why I introduced legislation to reduce the workweek to 4 days instead of 5, paying employees overtime for hours worked over 32 hours per week. Unfortunately, Republicans couldn’t care less about working class Americans. They’re busy picking petty fights, spreading conspiracy theories, and spouting hate – they’re being completely useless! That’s why it would be so tragic if Democrats lose the House in 2022, like many pundits are predicting. Because the honest truth is, we’re on the precipice of instituting our progressive vision for America. name: Doug White
subject: Leading together - Liderazgo en unidad
body:
Trabajamos duro, y cuando trabajamos juntos logramos grandes cosas. La capacidad de liderar y unir a las personas es un don y una necesidad.
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.dougwhite4congress.us/so/2bO0A3SnX/c?w=q-peSYG22OE30HUW1-rfTrg3x1KDhYaML75sFsuHYF4.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZG91Z3doaXRlNGNvbmdyZXNzLnVzL3NvLzJiTzBBM1NuWD9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjA0OTZmZmUwLWMwYmEtNDYwNi05OTg2LWMyODAzN2U4ZDE1NSJ9)_**
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | Leading together. Liderazgo en unidad.
---
| |
---
| |
---
| | Trabajamos duro, y cuando trabajamos juntos logramos grandes cosas. La capacidad de liderar y unir a las personas es un don y una necesidad. Por el contrario, Newhouse representa el fracaso de nuestros funcionarios electos. Ya no definen nuestro futuro, sino que eligen bandos que nos dejan atrapados en la decadencia. Hay esperanza; en Central Washington somos un tipo especial de personas que hacen las cosas, piden poco y dan mucho. Ya no permitiremos que nuestros funcionarios electos nos vuelvan unos contra otros, votando en contra de llevar nuestros dólares de impuestos a casa y creando una economía en declive. Yo digo "¡no más!" Es hora de que nos unamos y construyamos nuestro futuro. Empleos mejor pagados, infraestructura sólida, vivienda asequible, atención médica y comunidades seguras. Estas son todas las cosas que podemos tener si trabajamos juntos. Todos somos vecinos y los vecinos nos ayudamos. #vecinostrabajanjuntos We work hard, and when we work together we accomplish great things. The ability to lead and bring people together is a gift and a necessity. By contrast, Newhouse represents the failure of our elected officials. They no longer define our future, but choose sides that leave us trapped in decline. There is hope; in Central Washington we are a special type of people that get things done, ask for little, and give a lot. We will no longer allow our elected officials to turn us against each other, voting against bringing our tax dollars home and creating a declining economy. I say “no more!” It is time for us to come together and build our future. Better paying jobs, strong infrastructure, affordable housing, healthcare and safe communities. These are all things we can have if we work together. We are all neighbors and neighbors help each other. #neighborsworktogether
---
| |
---
| |
---
|
---
| | El sábado en Yakima inicié nuestra campaña de alcance puerta a puerta. Nuestro objetivo es 50,000 puertas en todo el Distrito 4 de Washington, y las alcanzaremos trabajando arduamente juntos. Tuve tantas conversaciones importantes sobre cómo las políticas de inmigración dañan a las familias en nuestros vecindarios. Escuchar con franqueza las experiencias de las personas solo fortalece la determinación de trabajar más duro y hacerlo mejor. Se debe agradecer a las personas que se sacrifican al servicio de nuestra comunidad; no agobiados por el papeleo excesivo, los gastos y los temores que gobiernan nuestro sistema de inmigración en este momento. Saturday in Yakima I kicked off our door-to-door outreach campaign. Our goal is 50,000 doors throughout Washington’s District 4, and we’ll reach them working hard together. I had so many important conversations about how immigration policies hurt families in our neighborhoods. Hearing candidly about people’s experiences only strengthens the resolve to work harder and do better. People making sacrifices in the service of our community should be thanked; not burdened in the excessive paperwork, expenses and fears that govern our immigration system right now.
---
| |
---
| Buena comida y buena conversación en Tacos Yuliza by MLK park en Yakima. Good food and great conversation at Tacos Yuliza by MLK park in Yakima.
---
| |
---
| | El miércoles fue el segundo ayuntamiento en persona en White Salmon, en Columbia High School. Rick George y los demócratas del condado de Klickitat fueron excelentes anfitriones. La discusión sobre la política de la mesa sigue siendo crucial. Con demasiada frecuencia, las necesidades básicas de los trabajadores se pasan por alto en favor del partidismo, y quiero algo mejor para la gente de CD4. Wednesday was the second in person town hall in White Salmon, at Columbia High School. Rick George and the Klickitat County Democrats were great hosts. The discussion about dinner table politics remains crucial. Too often, the basic needs of working people are overlooked in favor of partisanship, and I want better for the people of CD4.
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
| | El resto de la semana se llenó de trabajo en red y planificación. Esta es una campaña impulsada por las personas, el compromiso y el trabajo duro. ¡Mi determinación se fortaleció con la gran noticia de que nuestra campaña estableció un récord de recaudación de fondos para un demócrata en el primer trimestre en CD4! Seguiré trabajando para ustedes con agradecimiento por la inversión que se ha hecho. The rest of the week was filled with networking and planning. This is a campaign that is driven by people, commitment, and hard work. My resolve was strengthened by the great news that our campaign set a fundraising record for a Democrat in the 1st quarter in CD4! I will continue to work for you with gratitude for the investment that has been made.

subject: BBB: Biden's Border Blight ⚠️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burchett for Congress**
body:
TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country. [](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=4cb7d4224b2c437895cc5c7e93101bb9&_e=2IfQlsTkNT9NiRhaoOF-yjt3F8e6_ErbcG-yhf0bOpFUolWozcQNCqzoeT1A2-9WBV3pwKIde_wcIq3oftQ83NbtqJfaBSPKJ_U5YfYH3vsJspoCKDBExESgg5ggHi9bpHH8ix78heECpHaEVezTc7RL55tdI1xxxxVshEtBxcZDg0WMpiOWVpGo1xQ0DsKDgxqWkJH2y2GceUm0CHrwEAIAFXex4-WZIiNcjMugYkC2Q0Olj2il1uxmQ8pAt4c_w8hSzrQ1p7zY8ZYwT1uD9ZToAMGAXM0vKy5B62JW0oK7roQq1AI0m-kvPOfPY-Ra-ESWkIuB8NloNMSrVYDaP9ITH-y3UvOWzmnn71L7ti-VJOeTniKGk123-lGF_5zRO2SfD5c-GqI1tkW26dmsdw%3D%3D) | |
---
**BBB: Biden's Border Blight ⚠️
**
Remember during the presidential debates when Republicans hammered Democrats for their [open border proposals](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=4cb7d4224b2c437895cc5c7e93101bb9&_e=2IfQlsTkNT9NiRhaoOF-yhtVO62MVTOjmiPhkIb5sIMmyWImTrwbHpTWFWEA-vgyiElTrWs73fp1De2pj3aEfLs4GMzB_80TcHalY9er-YQWO7_letGv7WBEFenN-VwRekrZkbF4Z99bM8Wdz1TN2D3A4MCF1J_nWIKnTwTjWGJ85JJKnkXYNSxHvE5oEOOxKOXWgud5mdinZ9Jba5AqEbtQ6Z4WctkfEIGgBsMqisc6fzwXyhk1nDzMoIjOvx8pt0DD7uNAlVptnytweTT5HKYUrPrOboB9r9mXKO3qdzFC2BakzdnOobLqdDmvPpk_x0zBXiwbkdSoseXPLAzTFw%3D%3D) [](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=4cb7d4224b2c437895cc5c7e93101bb9&_e=2IfQlsTkNT9NiRhaoOF-yhtVO62MVTOjmiPhkIb5sIMmyWImTrwbHpTWFWEA-vgyiElTrWs73fp1De2pj3aEfLs4GMzB_80TcHalY9er-YQWO7_letGv7WBEFenN-VwRRiQBOIIE2CecMttWAFaAaIuvJs4TIGpFFW4CiniCo05G5M7WJztqx2fWtyfd7LsOEMJ2GX0l0tfoG8SOgCxMzEnH8DoWRIUi266HGZ2B7UUcn9WuN3vhyfmMlLmiQ_ylsSUGYjKYix6r4MZCkZEPufufqdZUo1zPZVbLvdTkjUQi38MWdFNr1F_ddQ1AHcgsf1Q8jscISoLq4ZSTBOYaqg%3D%3D)and predicted disaster?

Well, disaster is here. We told you so.

From the very beginning of Joe Biden’s presidency, he has courted a border catastrophe by rejecting President Trump’s successful border security policies and sending a welcoming message to illegal immigrants the world over.

How’s that working out for America? Well, more than [170,000 migrants](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=4cb7d4224b2c437895cc5c7e93101bb9&_e=2IfQlsTkNT9NiRhaoOF-ysF20WsH4dYO7dpBRCMuRTXJALu3mFRWADQlAmSFeI8zbfojkuqocZYyocqAouZsIwiHC3Ybc4oNpdOb5y3HfuaElpcwpq9myw1b9vtJPTGPbUehyJzeuvockbuL5-1WNVBBQKXlPmMmdu-fPeIbIvv05gv8sUQKoxfnZxHu3IwQtRQUHZMDY0DYM8DUpnDUdyVgYw0Ec6vLPydn2IAke46Y_uTIA3tD15gc8eA0TPwnXVnd_GL-7-6NPiZgHZt4aCTGQvsYPIo9WGo06b4WBeSZdPBkfpwNg0-n-HSjTHNJb8fRdr8Sbj29X15S-QX2khAmc8azNq4V2l2A9xleFQKziRmviLpeZk4_QVe8ibEcOSto-CIEiEdIr2vLCPc8gQ%3D%3D) overwhelmed our southern border in March alone. And how did Biden respond?

By spitballing the numbskull idea to end [Title 42](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=4cb7d4224b2c437895cc5c7e93101bb9&_e=2IfQlsTkNT9NiRhaoOF-ygpwDC8gWIT0cXSVHYXeHLDck44pLFBjTN9_62sdmBIDcT7CPc-QVh2V-xiCtnHvRLxNHR2g6KmSfKFfX5MLBgdRWcfnTJQ7scT59CFeN8yX5xxxLQcsBKw3qh5xejB7fgUKHxaucVMILsfN3ajluhMrSM65dGrtTnRTz7A-nfjneOkPSLceR9Uk5q5G11hoXOJEm79oSQVxQppRMTCZPdvsOzmxoUCp3EK98Vy78bsXtGQK_zBJ1v-OsFr81lXUKi6_tKy-HhWfZSRhT88W_i3L-FUlk1acqOEF2CbbJFUJAhODA8eG1eID5kjhiQr3ow%3D%3D), a Trump-era policy border patrol uses to deport illegal aliens migrating from regions where public health efforts are failing...like during a global pandemic.

Border patrol agents are predicting that ending Title 42 will open the floodgates and turn our current border disaster into a catastrophic event. America could see as many as [18,000 illegal migrants](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=4cb7d4224b2c437895cc5c7e93101bb9&_e=2IfQlsTkNT9NiRhaoOF-ykhpnVjB0HAeSVQ0E9hd4HgvlXwgWXPcoXVxiyrjsp-Yqyru2C7tGT67VbuTXtSFEnsx-9puJh7o-xOrujb5itr-qRz4eKvP4M3o03zwZQRAiLakAyhaa3M0oQi7PO52g2V4kzHWvdjy46-Tobh8zfjwgDKHt8nP9rnhiWo1G7jVuZZ6gDGFRTCd-9LHUJWIhDkUtdFAk4KyCopk8R31RXeqZYLtcXltzBmCUINNbzfxopjfHBqKkO48z--GB8GCBgTGPZVTFeYZz_4RCW1IJIw_JsO6PKtV_CY7CxT7DWLIAeeRZZ1rJwtfcjNI0gL1Q0cSnNui3RFnBx4URkin_cE%3D) streaming through its border every day — or more than 6 million per year. That’s [triple the record](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=4cb7d4224b2c437895cc5c7e93101bb9&_e=2IfQlsTkNT9NiRhaoOF-ykXBvlYkZlql22T_9n4a9o8UDhjisnXXm5XttcncBKVEg_gsvIR8UCOgTyLnH7LiZzyEd-C6D00i2g2Qxelhjqk6Ty6Snoaum__BW8ExIFS_Lj3CzB4r9RSKoa0ZpaMYo3BHjBjijEr3ZMYXpKUFcLDWpf46rt4_R8zdAKdyrejpEM9oqs77tnUe0mclREtFDgwvIOt7t-zm9GZ7ZmRb5cXQ7BY4OVkStdIiWckpGIez8tOORU8RFiWd9xmqqX_CiKX2k17ZMgxzObvusSWrrT4vVSRBPXIHUhViXvTzD3lD) we set last year!

Thanks to Biden’s failed policies, Mexican drug cartels are [booming](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=4cb7d4224b2c437895cc5c7e93101bb9&_e=2IfQlsTkNT9NiRhaoOF-ynYk4UcHnmE9UFtS4upvL5RRd7515bKOl7j08w4u7idTP4x_yiGo64eOQy1SX2nSIPojj2Htcvg061Pfnv0FQz1ouSP9-ZkM9i24AX7ZZ7kS_uWqAenXrEeTTJf25VIz5DR_GXl2z-9Z7UFn4b-tZHId9d-Z3CL2ot3HkEwcpRCRDQC7w0NCk2ZqQreq-ZyiQdfbMcfR7wk4kwJH-_eFrRF-i-j2qFc91i9KVsNXFxTJC6-KGL3dcjvxsMVc-_JBYOo6f3cB0FVLKxLLV-9j9k2s7L0qfY8uxk-KVyw3pNVysOElorpNlS5yIFF7OHXI_Q%3D%3D), [fentanyl arrests](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=4cb7d4224b2c437895cc5c7e93101bb9&_e=2IfQlsTkNT9NiRhaoOF-yog-UfuGVaSAOgauqmriKOBrZqIK4PzSrzO_UzkJD928PJVeInS5Gh9JJpX9Kwf9stKsGZJVqDRVqTdWJzZMpA8F5TetScsDLvApwMl-uQBtnRNmkoE5ev3fC9NW0qzyagtmeX2xKuF8TZ_RSNvGdhByN8gb4YFNaF0MgZ3Lt9SNNkUIEzl3ZW0w8t7Zfyb2tpkRkDeqo21sj_di3w-UXHvzy5Q-VtHTnNOy2z53kM__viPp80C7fOVr-lXKt4-P8_XMzqwpn1h14ZcFX4hlzkdSEABTnkQqWvfWBmxzzNoIx6Ln4wC47acpXZrhA_t6a7ITvLuRVd4oilsJqAvk2yg%3D) are at an all-time high, and border cities are completely [overwhelmed.](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=4cb7d4224b2c437895cc5c7e93101bb9&_e=2IfQlsTkNT9NiRhaoOF-ynYk4UcHnmE9UFtS4upvL5RZjhBR0RQlk3ejKUfw0HNsRSKlJ0aLA3AvZe-3ODaQNJDqDcipHxEP_hxxwaZpx3mSRLEa28qyPRphJ1xmmjlEx_Z719gvzai7eRzkq3v98XMb3oAHv4wna7XAtPILOrvzz0ZQrYc8Cal9hy0UooigJEDm-vVpj7JvNY6n_R9VsQ8ayUMaOeQMOmEXWCzDQle4jQtNSetY4KIz2b5j6YXII5OjjxxvG1iOWa1LHAZS90iQQO_b4k5UoZTlm6vknfyqX0lElR5tE6-43gsfbiNLOZVpHEtiSBZ3jatmEQELpnx7DCwO9egxNpXvi8yIRUE%3D)

The University of Tennessee is honoring those brave UT service members lost in the line of duty from World War One to the present, and they need our help.

The school hopes to display the names of servicemen who paid the ultimate sacrifice on a [new campus memorial](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=4cb7d4224b2c437895cc5c7e93101bb9&_e=2IfQlsTkNT9NiRhaoOF-ykadqs6fvEaC4tD8Au1Xu8uuBjUGeBE4336ZW5e4XWsis_TtfOwZLiELwm0Mt4YcA91I9etgviAh3B0MtCoskz2IdJajUfN1mbDAp_yRn9Q_trS1T4uKKD761Jcl8Hkv1wVDNFZpGXU8hIhTVbZnngENAUm41acizypl6O9F0sWufFJCa3mNT-29rG3t3ab3k2nlRfHIzXAbMBlUpXYeL3jc31zhKyuXB1Hzu3TxxTNNfqK-c9TsvtLFCRLUkO91oxxmkt3R-W1IZBbSza8LbzSY_hjQpKOTmJ9Oz5mlDemfK4XC0F-uBjBAcoaVaGXuBZ4c1VPkSn-D8D37_eTLdYY7GlR1aCXYo-whReCpf8qvokGj5gYUWnUC01oC5gPfDpgXZ4Lz3eYWN1ojlkYREAuII8COdH60Ap7L7crBKHbGNZMqJgVi-hYyzfKHWjBy7g%3D%3D) that will be dedicated in September of 2022. And they want to be sure every veteran is accounted for.

Knoxville's own Jack Ruggles III, who gave his life in Vietnam aiding a fallen comrade, will be one of those names.

Know someone that should appear on this tribute to fallen service members? You can contact Cynthia Tinker at the University of Tennessee Center for the Study of War and Society at ctinker@utk.edu.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43935899/339384070/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2E0NWM4MS1hOGI3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MFy426iU5n0HlwsUejGKbGfKhXuhZD4cmgY1GdCs6_Q=)

I’ve been getting messages every day from Seniors across my district expressing how worried they are about this Medicare privatization scheme. One woman told me that it’s a matter of life and death, because if it continues, many Seniors won’t be able to afford their premiums and other healthcare costs. I oppose the privatization of Medicare. Over one-fifth of WA-06 is 65+ years old, and we cannot afford to jeopardize their healthcare. Continuing Trump’s program to sell off Medicare to private insurance corporations would be a disaster. Privatization worsens health outcomes for Seniors, because it takes away their medical choice. Seniors’ health is more important to me than lining the pockets of private equity firms and Wall St CEOs. Seniors don’t need corporate middlemen getting between them and their doctor. I stand with Physicians for a National Health Program and Rep Pramila Jayapal in opposing the enrichment of healthcare CEOs at the expense of Seniors. I stand with Medicare. I stand with our Seniors. [**We need to improve and expand Medicare, not privatize it. Chip in now if you can, so I can fight for Medicare in Congress.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43935900/339384071/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2E0NWM4MS1hOGI3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MFy426iU5n0HlwsUejGKbGfKhXuhZD4cmgY1GdCs6_Q=) subject: Let’s get our economy back on track
body:
Can I count on you?

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/6b72d1f8a6f3/lori-chavez-deremer-announces-candidacy-for-congress-7042417?e=c87c5d8d97)
https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-4-7-22?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eblast47

Friend,

We all know who to blame when it comes to the inflation that is devastating our economy.

Ever since Joe Biden took office our economy has been in a downward spiral and prices have skyrocketed. Biden has consistently put the American people last while putting his radical policies first.

We need policies that work for the people, not Joe Biden.

Contribute $5, $10, or even $25 today and together let’s FIGHT to save our economy and restore conservative leadership!>>> (https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-4-7-22?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eblast47)

https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-4-7-22?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eblast47?amount=100
https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-4-7-22?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eblast47?amount=50
https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-4-7-22?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eblast47?amount=25
https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-4-7-22?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eblast47?amount=10

We have suffered through the Left’s reckless spending and failed agenda for too long.

When I’m in office, I will stand up for the American people and fight to make our country affordable again.

Can I count on your support?>>> (https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-4-7-22?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eblast47)

https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-4-7-22?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eblast47

Thank you,

Lori Chavez-DeRemer
Republican Candidate for U.S. Congress

https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-4-7-22?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eblast47

name: Team Booker
subject: He’ll never do the right thing.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

It’s getting tiring,
Peter. Rand has shown us over and
over again that he would rather play political games than do the right
thing.

Yesterday: Rand Paul intentionally delayed the vote to confirm Judge
Kentanji Brown Jackson to the Supreme Court and then ended up voting
against her confirmation.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220408-2?refcode=em20220408-1741&amp;amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&refcode2=1741_346206_UY2dr4&akid=1741%2E346206%2EUY2dr4 ][IMG]

After Russia invaded Ukraine: The Senate was racing to increase sanctions
and deliver urgent aid for Ukrainians. But Rand Paul single-handedly held
up this bill and delayed the Senate from taking action.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220408-2?refcode=em20220408-1741&amp;amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&refcode2=1741_346206_UY2dr4&akid=1741%2E346206%2EUY2dr4 ][IMG]

We’re sick and tired of Rand Paul using his political power to play games.
Kentuckians are fed up and tired of being ignored while politicians like
Rand Paul make a mockery of the Senate.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220408-2?refcode=em20220408-1741&amp;amp;amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&refcode2=1741_346206_UY2dr4&akid=1741%2E346206%2EUY2dr4 ]Will you make a $5 donation right now to help us
replace Rand Paul and send a working-class champion to the Senate? A
powerful grassroots movement is rising up in Kentucky and we have a real
chance to make history with your help.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220408-2?refcode=em20220408-1741&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&refcode2=1741_346206_UY2dr4&akid=1741%2E346206%2EUY2dr4 ]Contribute $5

For the ten years he’s been in office, Rand has consistently ignored
Kentuckians and our needs.

He’s a politician who will say or do anything to get in the news, put the
spotlight on himself and his conspiracy theories, and sell us out to big
industries.

It’s clear that Kentuckians are hungry for real change: The support our
campaign has received from folks has made it clear that a major shift is
happening on the ground right now. From passing Medicare for All, to
canceling student debt, we know these are the bold solutions everyday
folks want that Charles is fighting for.

But here’s the biggest challenge we face this election. One of the biggest
reasons Rand’s still in office is because Kentucky has one of the worst
records of voter disenfranchisement in our country’s history — allowing
failed leaders like Rand to keep their seats at the expense of all our
communities.

We can’t allow this to continue. It's finally time to elect someone who
actually cares about our families and our future, and Charles is the best
opportunity we have to send Rand packing in 2022. But that means putting
in the hard work right now to reach out to voters and talk to as many
Kentuckians as we can about this upcoming election:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220408-2?refcode=em20220408-1741&amp;amp;amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&refcode2=1741_346206_UY2dr4&akid=1741%2E346206%2EUY2dr4 ]It costs $0.05 for us to reach 1 voter. Will you please chip
in $5 or anything you can to our campaign right now?

Thank you,

Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220408-1741-footer&t=1025&refcode2=1741_346206_UY2dr4&akid=1741%2E346206%2EUY2dr4

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1741%2E346206%2EUY2dr4

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

Even after the people of Iowa had spoken, and my election win was certified, Nancy Pelosi spent MONTHS trying to STEAL OUR ELECTION.

name: Tiffany Shedd
subject: We have the power
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General
body:
Biden won’t address our border crisis, but I will Friend, With Joe Biden’s recent announcement that he will repeal Title 42, he could not make it more clear that our border crisis is the last thing on his mind. [**We MUST defend Arizona and stand up for a secure border >>**](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=8f3dbec096004a3b9aa3a7a5f3ac6c17&_e=IlsIVF7hgNPnKBAaWEaQWtOeD9csgOtMY1eNApN6A0Rhx8egqwTK0Z0sZSymaiaz_Kw5Ju9swFBF7-Z0QdKOBKpPJzAqTS9Gb3dZD0ydKWQYYY3RSGO1CorEWIQSZjensMBQOd2MJ3g7GLkcJxu4cPnpwgp0S83ubT6iOuCZLYBH5OKCeVmUwXargVAxLAyl03m7K0H9V4q2eN6WN85luGGCOCX-RUKPbfyJLlEzYazMdZrYtG49-zp-Ujpt6trap7C-cFK6I3vjMg7PFPf1NXUFaOs0UD0YeJo_WwNckdXUtI1h1eu1nvtKgXo7i-4OrKaxbQzmCFnU2y-5RhQSbgxx_z_BRcuw3I1DwMjVN-cAbU2KO0td5PLIDJI2RAkK4Y4RDRp-h_-laNuDIKzlL3oqqO8KAmEdCTDL7M_9z1-1M4H3AIXoN9n1jGDwLQkkKdRTWRG-jioxIySQuONjiA%3D%3D) By repealing this final Trump border regulation, the Biden Administration will make it even easier for drug cartels, human traffickers, and criminals to gain access to our country. This reckless decision will further endanger communities and families like mine that are already under attack from these threats. **If Biden wants to leave us to fend for ourselves, then I’ll take up that fight.** The Tenth Amendment of the U.S. Constitution gives states the power to enforce laws if the federal government won’t. Sadly, some of my opponents for Arizona Attorney General plan to roll over and let Biden get his way. Not me. **I’ll use the full power of the law to keep our border secure and Arizonans safe. And if Joe Biden doesn’t like that, he can meet me in court.** Friend, [**can you chip in $22 to help me defend Arizona from this invasion?**](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=8f3dbec096004a3b9aa3a7a5f3ac6c17&_e=IlsIVF7hgNPnKBAaWEaQWtOeD9csgOtMY1eNApN6A0Rhx8egqwTK0Z0sZSymaiaz_Kw5Ju9swFBF7-Z0QdKOBKpPJzAqTS9Gb3dZD0ydKWQYYY3RSGO1CorEWIQSZjensMBQOd2MJ3g7GLkcJxu4cPnpwgp0S83ubT6iOuCZLYBH5OKCeVmUwXargVAxLAyl03m7K0H9V4q2eN6WN85luGGCOCX-RUKPbfyJLlEzYawP46A5prxQ8m4vOK_lUvwzoKqrxoBaeMbm7XVgpRbtIam3ZHNiyOs7nUij_Ldu0_6Zi2ooGPb9wQ7yXEqupwoNRJJeYxeceEP7WJJ7RJa63C920C7f8g3PgqqXEoB-ZYsd7uUIuL87RCp7KCujn0GPYs7DVElPXeWOn86yyKorO75seFqeBC_Mf4DOkiMGPEy4cHNw0IVOPeC8mKhU9GbtutSQjusAI-0YUGO2uGXnTg%3D%3D) **The Cavalry isn’t coming. We ARE the Cavalry.** It’s time we defend our borders, declare cartels as terrorists (even when my opponent says we can’t do that), and _**finish the border wall.**_ I won’t give the Biden Administration an inch and I won’t let him, or anyone else, stop me. Will you stand with me? Sincerely, Tiffany Shedd [**CONTRIBUTE**](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=8f3dbec096004a3b9aa3a7a5f3ac6c17&_e=IlsIVF7hgNPnKBAaWEaQWtOeD9csgOtMY1eNApN6A0Rhx8egqwTK0Z0sZSymaiaz_Kw5Ju9swFBF7-Z0QdKOBKpPJzAqTS9Gb3dZD0ydKWQYYY3RSGO1CorEWIQSZjensMBQOd2MJ3g7GLkcJxu4cPnpwgp0S83ubT6iOuCZLYBH5OKCeVmUwXargVAxLAyl03m7K0H9V4q2eN6WN85luGGCOCX-RUKPbfyJLlEzYazMdZrYtG49-zp-Ujpt6traBgQTnd_1Wscx9uI4XnoMXbKDmL6kzSqdlvEplBb2FCq_NiE3EM170GvrGXhevnF-1TwZkwBPbctQOH9VGP_J5p5U-a8sua-u2MZ_MCdw0Sdm8i-j_lxPURKFfay9jhbF_u1v2woDHExyRhW4KkIxbbC38SavSAriVdsdTZlUpDyPsDgl_JOdF9RY4UpzEgnQYwLhqSzaHd9zp8i5GtO6Xw%3D%3D) Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General.

name: Emily Creighton
subject: what if I told you…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=3196%2E3611125%2ECcN18- ][IMG]

Folks—We only have two more days to hit our $75,000 goal or
we’ll have to take our ads off the air and our millionaire GOP opponents
will continue outspending us by miles.

Sounds daunting, doesn’t it?

But what if it wasn’t as bad as it sounds? What if I told you that all we
needed from you is a single $5 donation? Seriously, what if I told you
that all it took to help Tim keep our ads on the air and expand our
Democratic Senate majority was you deciding—right now—to give just $5?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10456?t=1010&amount=5&akid=3196%2E3611125%2ECcN18- ]Would you do it? Would you chip in $5?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10456?t=1011&amount=5&akid=3196%2E3611125%2ECcN18- ]Donate $5

I know, I know. But just think about it—as you’re deciding whether or not
to chip in your $5, someone else just gave $5. And someone else just
pitched in $10 because they were feeling really generous. And soon enough,
we’ve hit our $75,000 goal in no time.

That’s the type of small-dollar, grassroots energy it will take to defeat
all of the far-right GOP millionaires who think they can just buy Ohio’s
open Senate seat.

Tim knows we’ll never be able to match the GOP’s dark-money machine dollar
for dollar. And trust me, that’s more than OK by him.

But what we can do is build an army of grassroots supporters willing to
chip in $5 here and $10 there. Because that is the single best way to take
down these millionaires and their billionaire buddies, anyway.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10456?t=1012&amount=5&akid=3196%2E3611125%2ECcN18- ]So, will you add your grassroots donation today? I can promise you
someone else is pitching in right now, and we’re all counting on you to
step up and join us.

Seriously, what if I told you that all it took to help Tim keep our ads on the air and expand our Democratic Senate majority was you deciding—right now—to give just $5? [ - ]Would you do it? Would you chip in $5? [ - ]Donate $5 I know, I know. But just think about it—as you’re deciding whether or not to chip in your $5, someone else just gave $5. And someone else just pitched in $10 because they were feeling really generous. And soon enough, we’ve hit our $75,000 goal in no time. That’s the type of small-dollar, grassroots energy it will take to defeat all of the far-right GOP millionaires who think they can just buy Ohio’s open Senate seat. Tim knows we’ll never be able to match the GOP’s dark-money machine dollar for dollar. And trust me, that’s more than OK by him. But what we can do is build an army of grassroots supporters willing to chip in $5 here and $10 there. Because that is the single best way to take down these millionaires and their billionaire buddies, anyway. [ - ]So, will you add your grassroots donation today? I can promise you someone else is pitching in right now, and we’re all counting on you to step up and join us. [ - ]Donate $5 [ - ]Donate $25 [ - ]Donate $50 [ - ]Donate $100 [ - ]Donate $250 [ - ]Other Amount Emily Creighton Digital Fundraising Director Tim Ryan for Ohio [ - ]Emily Creighton headshot [ - ][IMG] We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Beto for Texas
subject: If Abbott gets another four years
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
Beto’s veto power could be our last line of defense in Texas.
#
There are so many reasons Texas will benefit if we elect a Governor who truly cares about the people of this state.
But one reason that doesn’t get talked about as much as it should? **Veto power.**
As Governor, Beto will have the power to stop extreme legislation that hurts us — like voter suppression schemes, hate-fueled anti-LGBTQ+ bills, or corrupt tax loopholes for the ultra-wealthy. Look to Kentucky for a recent example, where the governor just vetoed a radical anti-trans bill (one that Abbott would have signed in a flash.)
[A donation to our campaign today will help us put Beto at the governor’s desk, where he will only give his signature to laws that serve the people of Texas. We’re relying completely on grassroots resources to win this election. With the stakes this high, will you pitch in now? ](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54951?refcode=ema20220408-184160&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=184160%2E444211%2EkBFknj)
Let’s review just a few of the devastating bills that Greg Abbott has signed into law:
* A historic voter suppression law that has already made national headlines for wreaking havoc on our elections
* A cruel abortion ban that has stolen reproductive freedoms from millions
* A dangerous permitless carry measure that allows almost any Texan to carry a loaded gun in public without a background check

**And if Greg Abbott gets another four years in office, we can only expect worse.** Extreme far-right attacks on women, LGBTQ+ folks, and democracy itself are on the rise across the country. If these trends continue, Beto’s veto power could be our last line of defense in Texas.
**[Beto is running for Governor to get past the corruption, bigotry, and fringe policies that have defined Abbott’s time in office. But it’s going to take all of us to make it happen. Will you pitch in your first donation now to help us elect new leadership in Texas?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54951?refcode=ema20220408-184160&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=184160%2E444211%2EkBFknj)**
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54957?refcode=ema20220408-184160&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=184160%2E444211%2EkBFknj)**
We need a governor who is focused on the big things — great jobs, world-class schools, and the ability to see a doctor. Beto is running to deliver on that positive, unifying vision that will help the people of Texas.
Thank you for showing your support today,
Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220408-184160-footer&t=22&refcode2=184160_444211_kBFknj&akid=184160%2E444211%2EkBFknj)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=23&akid=184160%2E444211%2EkBFknj)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=184160%2E444211%2EkBFknj)

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

name: Kara Hahn
subject: Reflecting on a first
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kara Hahn for Congress Kara Hahn for Congress
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43933688/339350612/922507959?refcode=em21_emailheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmZjN2Q1OS04YmI3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7nRjoQPnisd8qJOlpvUXbdNabHaB7deB3auFQ7r_taQ=)

Friend,

Yesterday, we witnessed history being made when the Senate voted to confirm Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson as the first Black woman to serve on the nation's highest court, where she will advance the cause of justice and equality under the law.

It was a moment of monumental significance. Until 1981 no woman had served on the high court. It has taken four more decades, and more than 200 years since the court's inception to arrive at this inspirational moment, but here we are.

Marian Wright Edelman has said, "You can't be what you can't see." Now an entire race of women who have been historically excluded from so many areas of endeavor will be able to envision new paths, new futures for themselves and their families and we will all be better off for it. That does not suggest the path will be any less daunting, but it does mean it will be illuminated in a way never before known. As the mother of a half-Black daughter, I could not be more moved to know that from this day forward more girls and women will forever know that they can aspire to the high court too.

I hope you'll have a chance to reflect on the history we just witnessed, and all that it means for the future.

Kara
| Kara Hahn is a lifelong Long Islander, social worker, county legislator, and candidate for Congress in NY-01. This open seat is a _must win_ for Democrats to defend our majority in the House and continue driving progress in America, but we can't do it without your help. **Follow us on Twitter or Facebook for the long haul and send Kara to Congress!** [FACEBOOK](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43933689/339350613/711872121?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmZjN2Q1OS04YmI3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7nRjoQPnisd8qJOlpvUXbdNabHaB7deB3auFQ7r_taQ=&emci=026f89c6-7bb7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=16fc7d59-8bb7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=25369896) [TWITTER](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43933690/339350614/377200527?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmZjN2Q1OS04YmI3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7nRjoQPnisd8qJOlpvUXbdNabHaB7deB3auFQ7r_taQ=&emci=026f89c6-7bb7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=16fc7d59-8bb7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=25369896)

name: Charity Barry
subject: 2nd Congressional District Caucus Straw Poll
body:
Thank you for your support
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001x5wOrQKSWUuxQNi7SCgC8vhsyw8qPfQ0IjxypA1Jqpz936iPokxx9lUw1z-o_9TK2YBu6lMPpxQYazQe_AryQAJ4c-6NGxUf3vkJRlMErGV-7oifr8jRfzUvE1mgg5s6Jo_nuqQd13hTy6wEmIcTpAzLg1MqH-sP&c=5CiZWYMkV2-Ke4sYyez2gIXYIB6QDnLXC3wz36sg19tuEalrplE9fA==&ch=0EUUsg0atcICoRhigMPvwycCfJwpQDHw43ffy358R1FYs48KDIFPEg==)

---|---
|
Thank You So Much to the Delegates of the 2nd Congressional District!!! I am beyond grateful and humbled by the people of our district and the support I received at the straw poll at last Saturday's caucus. I plan to continue in the fight for every one of you and am thankful to have so many great people behind my candidacy.
The turnout at the caucus was terrific! A red wave is growing to take back not only our nation, but also right here in District 2! A special thanks to 2nd District Chair Kim Babler and Vice-Chair John Fandrich for an extremely well-run caucus.
Our message of hope, enthusiasm, and confidence that the people of District 2 don't have to settle for the destructive policies of Mark Pocan just because it's not an easy seat to win is a message that resonates with the voters! We are all ready for new and accurate representation, and we can get it if we work hard, implement both old and new campaign techniques, and leave no rock unturned.
Thank you to all those who voted in the poll on Saturday! Let's keep up the momentum! Volunteer and make a donation today!
|
