name: Patty Murray
subject: Cheri Beasley could really use your support
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
Donald Trump is going to North Carolina on Saturday
#
Peter,
You’ve heard from my friend, Cheri Beasley, a few times before and I think she has a good shot at flipping North Carolina and helping keep the Senate blue. But this weekend, Donald Trump is going to North Carolina to hold a rally for his hand-picked candidate in the North Carolina Senate race.
That’s not all. Trump is bringing other extreme, out of touch conservatives with him in an attempt to fire up the far-right base and pretend their brand of divisive politics is what the people of North Carolina want.
These kind of events and attention are why it’s so important that Cheri Beasley has the resources to be prepared for anything — and so she can fight back against any attacks by Trump and continue talking to the voters of North Carolina.
**[Can you please split a $5 donation between Cheri Beasley and my campaign before Donald Trump gets to North Carolina for his rally? Every dollar will help flip North Carolina blue and defend and expand the Senate Democratic majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43935988/339384445/613592720?refcode=pm_em_220408_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGI5YjRhNS1hZmI3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I5FddheR3p0-v9I-6FJexW519v4O_rV1-eoHMZwssyE=)**
Cheri and I both know that the best way to represent the people of your state is to focus on the real issues people care about — like health care, climate change, voting rights, an economy that works for everyone, and lowering costs for families. That’s exactly what we’ll keep fighting to do with your support.
Thank you,
Patty
** **
** **
** **
****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43935989/339384446/613592720?refcode=pm_em_220408_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGI5YjRhNS1hZmI3LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I5FddheR3p0-v9I-6FJexW519v4O_rV1-eoHMZwssyE=)****

**_As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._**

clean_body: Donald Trump is going to North Carolina on Saturday Peter, You’ve heard from my friend, Cheri Beasley, a few times before and I think she has a good shot at flipping North Carolina and helping keep the Senate blue. But this weekend, Donald Trump is going to North Carolina to hold a rally for his hand-picked candidate in the North Carolina Senate race. That’s not all. Trump is bringing other extreme, out of touch conservatives with him in an attempt to fire up the far-right base and pretend their brand of divisive politics is what the people of North Carolina want. These kind of events and attention are why it’s so important that Cheri Beasley has the resources to be prepared for anything — and so she can fight back against any attacks by Trump and continue talking to the voters of North Carolina. = Cheri and I both know that the best way to represent the people of your state is to focus on the real issues people care about — like health care, climate change, voting rights, an economy that works for everyone, and lowering costs for families. That’s exactly what we’ll keep fighting to do with your support. Thank you, Patty **= As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values. PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY

| | | Friend,**** The Senate race in New Hampshire is going to be one of the closest and most expensive in the entire country... _The Granite State could even hold the keys to flipping this entire chamber_** _RED_** _in November!_ So it goes without saying that we can’t afford to start another month BEHIND Maggie Hassan and her team of D.C. Donors. Instead, we have to start April on a high note since this critical election season is now in _full swing._ [**Can proven leader Chuck Morse count on your support to start the month?**](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xOTI0MTkwNTExOTU5MTIwNzE1JmM9YTFrOCZlPTAmYj05NTQ3NDMwNjgmZD13MGoycDB2.DwPaNlYJ-cUtnQPu2OmYDKiS41YEIJirHkbSf5-UBlU) We can’t allow the powerful Washington crowd to jump out far ahead of us... or else they will use their dark money to ensure this Senate seat represents **_the radical liberal agenda_** rather than the values of the 603!

---

| |
---
| | [HELP US COMPETE THIS MONTH! CHIP IN TO BACK CHUCK](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xOTI0MTkwNTExOTU5MTIwNzE1JmM9YTFrOCZlPTAmYj05NTQ3NDMwODAmZD1vNGUxaTJk.gV4-S4W-zf22TpgLGHq8e9Uazxy0xepJU2ZMWLNDb0U)

It doesn’t have nearly enough small business owners, folks who have lived the American Dream, or genuine leaders with a proven record of lowering costs for the people they serve. But Chuck Morse represents all of those qualities and more. He’s the product of all the best parts of our state and country. _And we can help him get to work standing up for OUR voices in Washington - but not if we let an important month on the campaign trail pass us by..._ **So we have an important favor to ask:****[Can you help us start April on a high note instead by contributing just $10 or more to Chuck’s campaign today?](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xOTI0MTkwNTExOTU5MTIwNzE1JmM9YTFrOCZlPTAmYj05NTQ3NDMwODYmZD1nNm01ejl6.5TKFAyA5ry4257haQLOeGZmhIQV2X2MlGswPf39L74U)** Thank you in advance for helping kick off this month strong and standing up for the 603!__

body:
Hey! It’s Sarah.

I’ve been going over some of the responses to our grassroots survey, and it looks like you haven't filled it out yet. We moved our strategy meeting to Monday, so you still have time to share your feedback. It’s really important to me that I hear from you.

**[Please take a minute or two to fill out my election-year issues survey. As you know, I’m focused on setting a campaign agenda that’s tailored to our state. That's why I’ve been out on the road so much, listening to folks from all over Wisconsin, having important conversations about what’s going on in their communities, and asking how I can help.

Over the past few days alone, I’ve knocked on doors in Eau Claire, Waukesha, Green Bay, La Crosse, Oshkosh, and more to hear directly from voters. We talked about the issues folks are most concerned about right now — everything from rising gas prices to the lack of affordable childcare to the skyrocketing cost of prescription drugs.

Too many people are stretching their pocketbooks just to try to make ends meet. Instead of working to lower costs for families, Ron Johnson is more interested in lining his own pockets and the pockets of his wealthy donors. That’s why I decided to get in this race, and it’s why I’m putting in the work to make sure our campaign priorities are shaped by yours.

I like to send out these short surveys to ensure every person on this team has the opportunity to share their thoughts and suggestions with me. The more responses I receive from supporters like you, the more insight our campaign has from the ground about how we can get this Senate seat working for the people of Wisconsin again.

name: Morris Katz, Campaign Manager
subject: Not a fundraising email
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ERICA FOR US
body:
The conversations we have over the next few weeks will be critical in electing Erica and protecting this seat.
#
Hey, it’s Morris — Erica’s campaign manager.
**The North Carolina primary election is on May 17th, and in-person early voting starts in 20 days.**
We’re putting the pedal to the metal during this home stretch, connecting with voters to tell them about Erica, her policies, and why we need a rural champion in Congress. But, we need all hands on deck to reach as many voters as possible.
**That’s why I’m asking:**[**Will you join us Monday, April 11th to call voters and help build support for Erica? Our phone banks are hosted virtually, so you can join from anywhere!**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/47988?t=1&akid=1073%2E3698%2ExHs_Mk)
**Phone Bank for Erica Smith** Monday, April 11th, 2022
5:30PM — 7:30PM ET **[Sign up or learn more »](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/47988?t=2&akid=1073%2E3698%2ExHs_Mk)**
---
This is an important race, and not just for North Carolina’s 1st District. This is a crucial swing district and a must-win race for Democrats to defend our Democratic House majority.
Erica is the candidate with the track record and message to turn out voters and defend this Democratic seat in the general election — but we have to win our primary election first.
**The conversations we have over the next few weeks will be critical in electing Erica and protecting this seat.** [**If you’re free Monday evening, will you sign up to make calls with us and help voters make a plan to vote for Erica? We’ll provide training, an easy-to-follow script, and a list of voters to call!**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/47988?t=3&akid=1073%2E3698%2ExHs_Mk)
Thank you,
Morris
Morris Katz
Campaign Manager
Erica Smith for Congress
P.S. Can’t make it? [**Sign up for an upcoming phone bank**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/47988?t=4&akid=1073%2E3698%2ExHs_Mk) or [**make a donation to help power our organizing efforts to elect Erica!**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/47989?t=5&akid=1073%2E3698%2ExHs_Mk)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20220408-1073-footer&t=6&refcode2=1073_3698_xHs_Mk&akid=1073%2E3698%2ExHs_Mk)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=7&akid=1073%2E3698%2ExHs_Mk)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=1073%2E3698%2ExHs_Mk)

body:
Did you see my latest interview on Fox News? This is a critical message – in the middle of the worst border crisis we’ve seen in decades, President Bi Peter, Did you see my latest interview on Fox News? This is a critical message – in the middle of the worst border crisis we’ve seen in decades, President Biden has decided to make matters worse by ending Title 42. President Trump put this in place and it has been the only thing that has done anything to slow down illegal immigration. But now President Biden will be ending it shortly and putting even more New Mexicans at risk. Take a quick look at my interview: [](http://links.markronchetti.com/u/click?_t=b07bd752cdb64edc94e23391776d0f53&_m=86f5810371ad41a8a58169aa1046dd81&_e=CiOOtX_biW8243YV0OBLK5Mmw8lskZbb352RjsZoXZ13Eu52nIkyeLxmGzPeIy7fgjXnwW5-kGkItUJZkY3uGiJYHfHXhhuflAWOrxHYN0b1gfZWZr-Ia5xYmb6Y_8kyQAdBDHY4k7q01r4femwbUv7FmR8JYfGGLQ8GsGSJILphgNR7NoaN1HwaeorNti-8Ep8kecCoF-ePOvVhQqf4_h3L-B6avf_aQqR3Lnu33a2CEVKHI0ek7SRqrTbc2qdkqT_hE59CVsETIpqLLCsrRNcKTBTETS3j7jNWqESsG17Q1MTEOhnwMkcThGz3VE_FEkhK488EtibTIZ3wEhpFRPcIqBPYMhU5o-XHyBZDTgfe_BTdJUhA5jBXsxKogaXV8McEwxsf13SIRJtdm2JEQa_QjjbRzL01VBvXkFyy-jz0ymh4BiPtUTUhfqKWIu6sIqjzyMCQA0y3M5kQbZ8c0MUIhO6pbiQUBWrrVI61DJnqJBqiwbCkDJ8ozrfIr4_jAiggrjFzBYYed6m3LTRESA%3D%3D) [**WATCH VIDEO**](http://links.markronchetti.com/u/click?_t=b07bd752cdb64edc94e23391776d0f53&_m=86f5810371ad41a8a58169aa1046dd81&_e=CiOOtX_biW8243YV0OBLK5Mmw8lskZbb352RjsZoXZ13Eu52nIkyeLxmGzPeIy7fgjXnwW5-kGkItUJZkY3uGiJYHfHXhhuflAWOrxHYN0b1gfZWZr-Ia5xYmb6Y_8kyQAdBDHY4k7q01r4femwbUv7FmR8JYfGGLQ8GsGSJILphgNR7NoaN1HwaeorNti-8Ep8kecCoF-ePOvVhQqf4_h3L-B6avf_aQqR3Lnu33a2CEVKHI0ek7SRqrTbc2qdkqT_hE59CVsETIpqLLCsrRNcKTBTETS3j7jNWqESsG17Q1MTEOhnwMkcThGz3VE_FjXxjtY6uWN_MJiilR2kEnFwGsgHKR2tusWISzg-udb0FIwIfIs1sSkIirr9j1MH3PKJRsJNQ5zhRtyqNNi2iI7CmPYL_B8OOoIuFb5LGe-cYU_RE886Rf0P7BMuJeGEfRmu3E7FbvME_Z5XNfeQfSvRkqC03Mlydn-RG_e9ErUUfvp9jgQ15BtnusYMNY2Fc9QkplDrBacH980MRfYjJ6Q%3D%3D) Let me be clear, there has been a disaster at our border since Biden took office. name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: ‘A moral hazard’
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Alexandria used her time with President Biden to discuss permanent student loan debt cancellation.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20220408-2932-header&t=1&akid=2932%2E2526796%2EOZr0pm)
No matter who you are, when you’re presented with an organizing opportunity, you have to take it.
...and that’s just what Alexandria did Wednesday at the White House.
After a bill signing ceremony for a bill Alexandria co-sponsored to strengthen the postal service, she used her time with President Biden to discuss student loan debt cancellation:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220408?refcode=em20220408-2932-P_FND_ANO_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2932_2526796_OZr0pm&akid=2932%2E2526796%2EOZr0pm)
It’s because of our pressure from inside and outside Congress that this week, President Biden extended the emergency pause on federal student loan payments through August.
It’s something, but it’s not enough. These pauses only extend the panic and disorder folks feel every time we near a deadline. Alexandria and our movement cannot understate the economic danger and risk for our country if President Biden does not make the emergency pause on federal student loan payments permanent.
Alexandria has been outspoken that the $1.75 trillion dollar student loan debt emergency is “a moral hazard.” Forgiveness is the right thing to do.
President Biden made student loan forgiveness a major talking point while campaigning for president in 2020. **We cannot let up the pressure until President Biden keeps his campaign promise and permanently forgives federal student loan debt for the millions of Americans crushed under this economic burden.**
[We need Alexandria in Congress fighting for student loan debt cancellation. If you’re able to, please make a contribution right now so we have the resources to keep Alexandria in Congress.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220408?refcode=em20220408-2932-P_FND_ANO_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&refcode2=2932_2526796_OZr0pm&akid=2932%2E2526796%2EOZr0pm)
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220408?refcode=em20220408-2932-P_FND_ANO_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2932_2526796_OZr0pm&akid=2932%2E2526796%2EOZr0pm)**
Together we can keep up the pressure on President Biden to not only do what’s in the best interest of our nation’s economic recovery, but also what is morally right: cancel student loan debt permanently.
Thank you,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220408?refcode=em20220408-2932-P_FND_ANO_GRM&t=23&refcode2=2932_2526796_OZr0pm&akid=2932%2E2526796%2EOZr0pm)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20220408-2932-P_FND_ANO_GRM&t=24&akid=2932%2E2526796%2EOZr0pm)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=25&akid=2932%2E2526796%2EOZr0pm) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=26&akid=2932%2E2526796%2EOZr0pm) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=27&akid=2932%2E2526796%2EOZr0pm)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=28&akid=2932%2E2526796%2EOZr0pm)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=29&akid=2932%2E2526796%2EOZr0pm)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

## “Biden, Inc.” outlined in _Radical Nation_ ...
This week the mainstream media has “verified” content from Hunter Biden’s laptop that confirms his sketchy international business dealings, the same laptop they called “Russian disinformation.”Well most of us have known the truth for awhile, I wrote an entire chapter in _Radical Nation_ about Biden, Inc. There’s an excerpt below, but if you’re interested in reading more:|
---
[Get a copy here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=c66645be46&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
### Excerpt of Biden, Inc. — Chapter 7 of _Radical Nation_ :
In 2017, Joe Biden mused to _Vanity Fair_ writer David Kamp, “I should have raised one Republican kid.” Surprised, Kamp asked Biden what he meant. Biden explained that he sometimes wished that one of his children had made a lot of money to provide for him in his old age. That way, “when they put me in a home, I’d have a window with a view, you know what I mean?”What an odd thing to say. At that time, Joe Biden was certainly aware that his son Hunter was raking in megabucks from international business dealings. Four years earlier, in December 2013, Joe Biden, then the sitting vice president, took _Air Force Two_ to Beijing for a meeting with Xi Jinping—and Hunter tagged along. During their stay, Hunter arranged for his father to meet his Chinese business partner, Jonathan Li.According to an April 2015 email, Hunter also arranged for his Ukrainian business associate, Vadym Pozharskyi, to meet with Vice President Biden in Washington (the Biden team says no such meeting was on Biden’s schedule but has not denied that it took place). So Joe Biden was clearly aware of Hunter’s lucrative deal- ings when he made his Republican kid remark. Here are some of Hunter’s international dealings:
* Beginning in 2013, Hunter was a partner in a China-based private equity fund BHR Partners, holding a 10 percent stake.
* Beginning in 2014, Hunter had a seat on the board of Ukraine’s Burisma Holdings, for which he was paid $83,333 a month to serve as a “ceremonial figure” with a “powerful name.”
* In early 2014, Hunter received a wire transfer of $3.5 mil- lion from billionaire Elena Baturina, widow of the former mayor of Moscow, for unknown reasons (according to an 87-page report produced by Senate Republicans).
* In 2017, Hunter signed a consulting contract with China’s largest private energy company, CEFC China Energy, guaranteeing Hunter $10 million a year plus a 50 percent stake in the company “for introductions alone,” according to leaked emails.

Hunter Biden has made quite a haul by trading on the Biden family name. So have other members of Joe Biden’s family. In fact, the media have nicknamed Joe Biden’s clan “Biden, Inc.” There are troubling questions about whether or not Joe Biden himself might have received a share of the proceeds—and whether his involvement might compromise his ability to deal effectively with Communist China and other nations.
| | | | | | |
